Bake in the preheated oven until golden and bubbly, about 45 minutes. Serve with a little enchilada sauce and a dollop of sour cream on top of each serving.

tamale-pie-with-mint-yogurt.name: Tamale Pie With Mint Yogurt

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth

ingredients.prep: scallions, pickled onions, sliced avocado (for serving)

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high. Add beef and cook, breaking into small clumps with a wooden spoon, until it just starts to brown, 6–8 minutes. Season with salt and continue to cook, stirring, until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 4 minutes. Transfer beef to a medium bowl; set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in same pot and add onions, chiles, and garlic; season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally and scraping any browned bits stuck to bottom of pot, until vegetables have softened, 6–8 minutes. Add tomato paste, ras-el-hanout, and cumin; cook, stirring, until heated through, about 1 minute.

Return reserved beef to pot and add beer. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid has reduced, 2–4 minutes. Add chicken stock, season with salt and pepper, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid has thickened, 45–60 minutes.

Meanwhile, preheat oven to 375°. Whisk cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and 1 tsp. salt in a large bowl. Whisk eggs, milk, cheese, and remaining ⅓ cup oil in a medium bowl. Stir egg mixture into dry ingredients until just combined.

Skim fat from surface of chili if needed, then transfer to a 13x9" baking dish. Dollop batter over chili and spread in an even layer with the back of wooden spoon (it’s okay if it doesn’t cover the entire surface). Bake casserole until top is golden brown and filling is bubbling around edges, 30–40 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine yogurt with mint; season with salt.
Serve tamale pie with mint yogurt, cilantro, scallions, pickled onions, and avocado.

tamales-tamales-mexican-pie-argiro.name: Tamales (tamales) Mexican Pie
instructions: Ξεκινάμε τη μεξικάνικη πίτα ταμάλες, βράζοντας το νερό σε κατσαρόλα.
Μόλις πάρει βράση ρίχνουμε 2 κ.γ. αλάτι. Βροχηδόν ρίχνουμε το καλαμποκάλευρο και ανακατεύοντας σε χαμηλή φωτιά αφήνουμε να δέσει και να πυκνώσει το μίγμα. Πρέπει να γίνει σαν πουρές.
Αφού πήξει η κρέμα αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά, ρίχνουμε το βούτυρο και σκεπάζουμε να μείνει ζεστό μέχρι να το χρησιμοποιήσουμε.
Ζεσταίνουμε το λάδι σε μεγάλο τηγάνι και βαθύ. Ροδίζουμε τον κιμά, μετά το κρεμμύδι, το σκόρδο και τις πιπεριές.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε. Προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες, τις σπάμε με κουτάλα και προσθέτουμε και τα μπαχαρικά.
Χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε με σκεπασμένη την κατσαρόλα για 10′, να πιει σχεδόν τα υγρά της η σάλτσα.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 180-200ºC βαθμούς.
Βουτυρώνουμε πυρίμαχο οβάλ ή τετράγωνο σκεύος.
Κάνουμε μια στρώση, περίπου 2 φλ. από την κρέμα καλαμποκιού, αδειάζουμε όλο τον κιμά σε μια στρώση και καλύπτουμε με τον υπόλοιπο πουρέ καλαμποκιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε με το τυρί και ψήνουμε για περίπου 35′, να κάνει ελαφριά κρούστα.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 15′ και σερβίρουμε με σαλάτα άισμπεργκ, αβοκάντο, ντομάτα, κρεμμύδι και φρέσκο κόλιανδρο.
Αν σας αρέσει η μεξικάνικη κουζίνα, εκτός από την ταμάλες, πεντανόστιμη είναι και η παρακάτω συνταγή.

tamales-de-frijoles-bean-tamales.name: Tamales De Frijoles (bean Tamales)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Start the tamales: Place corn husks into a bowl, cover with boiling water, and soak for about 3 hours. Drain, place on a work surface, and cover with a clean, damp towel.
Make the salsa: Place ancho chiles into a saucepan, cover with water, and bring to a boil over medium heat; cook until soft, about 10 minutes. Drain.
Combine ancho chiles, garlic, cumin, salt, and pepper in a blender. Add water and blend until smooth. Strain through a sieve.

Finish the tamales: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add 1/2 of the salsa and cook for 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in refried beans until well combined; cook until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Beat lard with an electric mixer in a large bowl until fluffy. Gradually add masa flour and beat until well combined. Add remaining salsa and continue beating until dough is uniformly red in color.

Select one wide corn husk. Starting 2 inches from the bottom of the husk, spread about 2 tablespoons masa mixture over the surface, ending about 1/4 inch from the top. Place 1 tablespoon beans and 1 jalapeño slice in the center of masa mixture. Fold the sides of the husk together, one over the other. Fold the bottom of the husk over the seam of the two folded sides. Repeat to make remaining tamales.

Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add tamales with the open side up; cook until filling is heated through and separates from the husk, about 1 hour.
Let tamales rest for 15 minutes before serving.

tamales-in-green-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Tamales In Green Sauce Recipe
tamales-in-green-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de tamales en salsa verde

ingredients.item: 1 libra  de harina para tamales o de maíz

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta colocando la hojas de maíz en agua tibia por 20 minutos.
En una cacerola, pondremos a hervir los tomatillos y el chile hasta que estén blanditos o hasta que cambien de color. Apaga y deja reposar.
En una licuadora o mixer, añadirás la cebolla, los dos dientes de ajo, la rama de cilantro, los tomatillos y licúa hasta que todo esté integrado.
Es turno de colocar la pechuga de pollo a hervir hasta que esté blandita. Cuando repose, la vas a deshebrar y reservas.
En una cacerola, vas a añadir un poco de aceite y agregarás la salsa anterior, cocina por 5 minutos.
Posteriormente, le añadirás el cubo de pollo, el pollo deshebrado y mezclarás hasta que todo se integre. Deja cocinar por 5 minutos más. Apaga y reserva.
En un bol, añade la manteca de cerdo y bate hasta que esponje.
Luego, agrega sal y 1/4 de cucharada de polvo de hornear, la harina para tamales y el caldo de pollo.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que te quede una masa manejable.

Procede a realizar la prueba del agua, que consiste en hacer una bolita pequeña de masa, la colocas en un vaso con agua y mira si flota. Si lo hace, quiere decir que nuestra masa está perfecta y esponjosa. Si se hunde, estará muy pesada y te tocará hacerla otra vez.
Es hora de armar nuestros tamales, toma las hojas que deben estar secas. Vas a extender un poco de la masa, luego en el centro le añadirás el pollo. Cierra y ata con un cordel.
Al tenerlos listos todos, cocínalos por 1 hora en una vaporera o usa la técnica baño de maría.
Pasado ese tiempo, sácalos y sírvelos con la salsa verde en donde se cocinó el pollo.
¡Disfruta!

tamales-rojos-de-pollo-red-chicken-tamal.name: Tamales Rojos De Pollo (red Chicken Tamales)
instructions: Place corn husks in a bowl, cover with boiling water, and soak for a few hours. Drain, place on a work surface, and cover with a clean, damp towel.

Place chicken in a pot, season with salt, and cover with water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until chicken is cooked through, 20 to 25 minutes. Drain chicken and shred with 2 forks.

Heat a griddle over medium heat and toast mulato and ancho chiles until fragrant, 3 to 5 minutes. Place in a bowl and cover with boiling water. Soak until soft, about 25 minutes. Combine ancho and mulato chiles, garlic, cumin seeds, and about 1/2 cup of the soaking water in a blender; blend until a thick, smooth, mole-like sauce forms, adding more water if necessary.

Heat 1 tablespoon lard in a saucepan over medium heat and add the sauce; cook for 3 to 5 minutes. Add shredded chicken and cook until flavors are combined and chicken is heated through, about 5 minutes.

Place remaining lard in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until creamy. Add masa harina, chicken broth, baking powder, and 1 1/2 teaspoon salt, and beat until all ingredients are well combined. Test if the masa is ready by dropping a small ball of masa into a glass of cold water; if it floats, it's ready, if not, keep working the dough a little longer.

Select 1 wide corn husk. Spread about 2 tablespoons masa mixture onto the the corn husk, filling it up to 2 inches from the bottom and 1/4 inch from the top. Add 1 tablespoon of the chicken filling in the center of the masa mixture. Fold sides of husk together, one over the other. Fold the bottom of the husk over the seam of the 2 folded sides. Repeat with remaining husks.

Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add tamales with the open side up and cook until filling is heated through and separates from the husk, about 1 hour. Let tamales rest for 15 minutes before serving. This recipe was originally submitted to Allrecipes.com.mx.

tamarind-date-agua-fresca.name: Tamarind & Date Agua Fresca
instructions: Combine tamarind, dates, and 2 1/2 quarts water in a medium pot and bring to a boil; simmer briskly, stirring often and mashing pulp and dates with the back of a spoon until they break down, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and let steep for 2 hours.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible (you should have about 4 cups).
Transfer tamarind mixture to a pitcher. Stir in sugar and 3 cups water. Chill until cold.
Fill glasses with ice. Divide agua fresca among glasses.

tamarind-and-vodka-cocktail.name: Tamarind And Vodka Cocktail
instructions: Stir 8 cups water, sugar, 1/2 cup tamarind concentrate, and 2 tablespoons lime juice in large pitcher until sugar dissolves. DO AHEAD Cocktail base can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.

Combine 1/2 cup cocktail base, 3 tablespoons vodka, 2 teaspoons tamarind concentrate, and 1 teaspoon lime juice in cocktail shaker. Add 1 cup ice cubes; shake 30 seconds to chill. Strain into 2 Martini glasses. Garnish with lime slices. Repeat 3 more times for 8 cocktails.

tamarind-caramel-brownies.name: Tamarind Caramel Brownies

ingredients.prep: or instant coffee granules dissolved in 1 tsp. hot water

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C and set up the middle shelf for baking. Roast the macadamia nuts for 6–8 minutes, or until golden brown, then remove and set aside while you make the caramel.

To make the caramel, melt the golden syrup and sugar together in a small heavy-based saucepan on medium-low heat. Swirl the ingredients in the pan together, rather than stirring them. Once the sugar has dissolved and the caramel starts bubbling, continue cooking on a gentle simmer until it begins to bubble and foam, about 3–5 minutes in total.

Remove from the heat, then stir in the cream and butter until melted and combined. Finally, add the salt and tamarind and stir well. Transfer to a wide bowl (this will help it cool faster), cover and leave to cool in the freezer for 20 minutes or in the fridge for around 30 minutes, until thick and gooey.
Grease and line an 8 x 12-inch pan with parchment paper, ensuring there is some overhang of paper over the edges so you can easily lift the brownies out of the pan later.
Begin making the brownie batter. Gently melt the butter in a small saucepan. Once melted, remove from the heat, add the chocolate and leave to sit for 2 minutes, without stirring it.
Stir the chocolate and butter together after 2 minutes; they should have melted together. Transfer to a large mixing bowl and combine with the sugar and salt.

After the chocolate has cooled down for 2–3 minutes, add the room-temperature beaten eggs gradually, a little at a time, mixing well in between additions by hand. Fold in the sifted flour, macadamia nuts, and espresso powder (or instant coffee and water mixture) until well combined.

Pour half the brownie mixture into the prepared pan. Remove the tamarind caramel from the freezer or fridge and drizzle half of the caramel over the brownie mixture in the pan. Cover with the remaining brownie mixture and smooth the surface with a spatula. Drizzle with the remaining caramel, covering the surface as evenly as possible.

Using the end of a dessert spoon, gently ripple the caramel through the brownie mixture. To do so, dip the end of the spoon about ½ inch deep into the mixture and draw squiggly lines and figure-eight shapes all over the surface until the caramel is evenly distributed.

Bake for 25–30 minutes, or until cooked but gooey in the middle. Test with a toothpick; there should still be a few moist crumbs on the toothpick when inserted into the center of the brownie, or a very slight smear of brown goo, but you don’t want wet batter. Sprinkle over a large pinch of sea salt while the brownie is still hot from the oven.
Leave in the pan until completely cool. Lift the brownie out of the pan using the parchment paper and transfer to a cutting board, then cut into squares and serve.

tamarind-chicken-thighs-with-collard-gre.name: Tamarind Chicken Thighs With Collard Greens Salad

ingredients.prep: bone-in chicken thighs  (about 2 0.5 lb.), patted dry

ingredients.item: Japanese sweet potatoes or other sweet potatoes (about  1 lb.)
Half a bunch collard greens (about 6 oz.)
ingredients.prep: stems removed, leaves cut or torn into bite-size pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Place chicken in a large bowl and season all over with salt; set aside.

Blend chiles, ginger, garlic, tamarind concentrate, coconut aminos, agave, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ½ cup orange juice in a blender until smooth. Transfer to a small saucepan and place over medium heat. Cook, stirring often, until glaze is sticky and easily coats a spoon, 6–8 minutes. Let cool. Pour glaze over chicken and toss to coat.

Pour 2 Tbsp. oil into a large skillet and, using tongs, arrange chicken, skin side down, in pan, leaving excess glaze behind in bowl. Cook, undisturbed, over medium heat, until skin is browned and crisp, 10–12 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate.

Let skillet cool 5 minutes, then arrange sweet potatoes in an even, slightly overlapping layer in pan. Season with salt and add 2 Tbsp water. Place chicken, skin side up, on top. Transfer pan to oven and roast until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear when flesh is pierced with the tip of a small knife, 10–12 minutes. Let rest in pan 10 minutes.

While the chicken is resting, toss collard greens, remaining 3 Tbsp. orange juice, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to combine; season with a pinch of salt and a few grinds of pepper. Lightly massage greens with your hands to soften slightly.
Serve chicken and sweet potatoes with collard greens salad alongside.

tamarind-juice-step-by-step-comedera.name: Tamarind Juice, Step By Step
tamarind-juice-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Jugo de tamarindo, paso a paso
instructions: En medio litro de agua coloca el tamarindo sin semillas ni cáscara. Deja en remojo el mayor tiempo posible, remueve algunas veces para que vaya hidratándose la pulpa.
Vierte en un vaso de licuadora la pulpa en remojo y añade el azúcar.
Licúa por 45 segundos o un minuto, verifica que el tamarindo se haya disuelto por completo.
Prueba el jugo y certifica que tiene el dulzor que te gusta.
Cuela y vierte dentro de una jarra.
Añade hielo en cada vaso y sirve.

tamarind-sherbet-lezzet.name: Tamarind Sherbet

ingredients.item: 500 g demirhindi (ayıklanmış ve 1 gece boyunca suda ıslatılmış)

instructions: 1. Demirhindiyi tencereye alarak su ilave edin ve kaynatın.
2.  İyice kaynamaya başladığında karanfil, kakule, zencefil, çubuk tarçın ve limonu ekleyip karıştırarak 5 dakika daha kaynatın.
3. Karışım birbirini bulduğunda ocaktan alarak ılınmaya bırakın.
4. Şerbetin sıcaklığı 70 dereceye düşünce balı da ilave edin ve 8 saat süreyle dinlenmeye bırakın.
5. Buz ilave ederek soğuk servis edin.

tamarind-vinaigrette.name: Tamarind Vinaigrette
instructions: Combine rice vinegar, tamarind concentrate, maple syrup, shallot, salt, and pepper in the bowl of a small food processor or blender. Pulse to combine.
With the unit running, stream in the oil a bit at a time, until thoroughly emulsified.

tamarind-whiskey-sour.name: Tamarind Whiskey Sour

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar

instructions: Tamarind concentrate is available at Asian markets or online.
Bring palm sugar and ⅓ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan; cook, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved. Let cool.

For each cocktail, combine 1½ oz. bourbon, 1 oz. lime juice, 1 oz. palm sugar syrup, and ½ oz. tamarind concentrate in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice and shake until outside is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with ice and serve with an orange wedge and a cherry.

tamarind-cabbage-slaw-with-crispy-onions.name: Tamarind-cabbage Slaw With Crispy Onions

ingredients.prep: often labeled “concentrate cooking tamarind” can be found at Asian and Thai markets.

instructions: Whisk buttermilk and mayonnaise in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add onions and toss to coat; let sit 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, fit a large saucepan with thermometer; pour in oil to measure 2". Heat over medium-high heat until thermometer registers 375°.

Whisk flour and chili powder in a shallow dish; season with salt and pepper. Working in batches, remove onion from buttermilk, letting excess drip back into bowl, toss in seasoned flour, and fry, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt.
Whisk vinegar, oil, fish sauce, honey, and tamarind in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add cabbage, scallions, basil, mint, and peanuts and toss to combine.
Serve slaw topped with crispy onions.

tamis-tri-color-caprese-salad.name: Tami's Tri Color Caprese Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Arrange alternate slices of yellow tomato, whole basil leaves, slices of red tomato, and mozzarella cheese slices on a serving platter in rows; sprinkle with shaved shallot. Drizzle olive oil and balsamic vinegar over the salad; season with salt and black pepper.

tandoori-bread-recipe-lezzet.name: Tandoori Bread Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarı buğday + yarı un (glutensiz karışımda pirinç unu veya mısır unu)
Tuz yerine az tuzlu deniz tuzu
Şeker yerine bal veya pekmez (mayanın aktivasyonu için az miktarda)
Susam yerine çörek otu, haşhaş tohumu veya keten tohumu
Tuzlu veya tatlı ekmek yapmak için üzerine az miktarda zeytinyağı veya tereyağı sürülebilir

instructions: 1. Ilık suya şekeri ekleyin, kuru mayayı ilave edin ve 5–10 dakika bekleyin, maya aktifleşip kabaracaktır.
2. Unu geniş bir kaba alın, tuz ve zeytinyağını ekleyin.
3. Maya karışımını unun ortasına dökün ve yoğurmaya başlayın.
4. Yumuşak ama ele yapışmayan bir hamur elde edene kadar 8–10 dakika yoğurun.
5. Hamuru üzerini kapatarak ılık bir yerde 1 saat kadar mayalanmaya bırakın, hacmi iki katına çıkacaktır.
6. Mayalanan hamuru hafifçe unlayarak bezelere ayırın.
7. Her bezeyi yuvarlayıp biraz açın, istersen üzerine susam veya çörek otu serpin.
8. Fırını 200°C’ye ısıtın.
9. Hamurları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin ve yaklaşık 15–20 dakika, üzeri altın rengi olana kadar pişirin.
10. Alternatif olarak sac veya dökme demir tava kullanarak orta ateşte pişirebilirsiniz, her iki tarafı da kızarana kadar çevirin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

tandoori-cauliflower.name: Tandoori Cauliflower
instructions: Whisk garlic, vinegar, tandoori paste, and 2 tablespoons oil in a large bowl to blend. Add cauliflower and toss to fully coat florets. Marinate at room temperature for at least 1 hour, or cover and chill overnight.
Attach deep-fry thermometer to the side of a large heavy pot. Pour in oil to a depth of 1 inch. Heat oil over medium heat to 350°.

Place cornstarch in a medium bowl. Working with a few florets at a time, toss cauliflower in cornstarch, then transfer to a coarse-mesh sieve, shaking excess cornstarch back into bowl. Place florets on a rimmed baking sheet.
Working in batches, fry florets until light golden and crispy, 3-4 minutes per batch. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Season with salt and dust with tandoori masala, if desired.

tandoori-chicken-wings.name: Tandoori Chicken Wings
instructions: Season chicken wings generously with salt and place in a one-gallon resealable plastic bag.

Pulse chiles, ginger, garlic, garam masala, paprika, and 2 cups cilantro in a food processor until finely chopped. Add yogurt and lemon juice and pulse, scraping down sides as necessary, until smooth and well combined. Pour marinade into bag with chicken. Seal bag and turn to evenly coat chicken with marinade. Chill at least 2 hours and up to 8.
Let chicken sit at room temperature 1 hour before grilling.

Prepare a grill for medium heat; oil grate. Remove chicken from marinade, letting excess drip back into bag, and grill, turning every 3–4 minutes, until charred in spots and cooked through, 10–12 minutes total. Transfer to a platter and let rest 5 minutes.
Chop remaining ¼ cup cilantro and sprinkle over wings. Serve with lemon wedges alongside.

tandoori-masala-spice-mix.name: Tandoori Masala Spice Mix
instructions: Combine coriander, cumin, garlic powder, ginger, cloves, mace, fenugreek, cinnamon, black pepper, cardamom, and nutmeg together in a bowl; store in an airtight container.

tandoori-octopus.name: Tandoori Octopus

ingredients.item: Coarse sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Rub octopus with sea salt to season it, then rinse well to remove excess. Place octopus and peppercorns in a large pot and fill pot with cold water; bring to a boil. Cook, uncovered, until octopus can be easily pierced with the tip of a knife, 45–55 minutes.

Invert a large bowl inside an even larger one, creating a dome. Drain octopus and place on inverted bowl so tentacles hang down. Chill at least 2 hours. Cut tentacles from octopus; discard head. Thinly slice tentacles crosswise into ½”-thick pieces.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add half of octopus; season with kosher salt. Cook until lightly browned and almost crisp, about 2 minutes per side. Sprinkle with 1½ tsp. tandoori powder and toss to coat. Wipe out skillet and repeat with remaining oil, octopus, and tandoori powder.
DO AHEAD: Octopus can be boiled 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

tandoori-spice-blend.name: Tandoori Spice Blend
instructions: Whisk all ingredients into small bowl to blend. DO AHEAD: Spice blend can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

tandoori-turkey.name: Tandoori Turkey
instructions: Toast spices in a skillet over medium heat, swirling often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool. Working in batches, finely grind mixture in a spice mill. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Toast spices in a skillet over medium heat, swirling often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool. Working in batches, finely grind mixture in a spice mill. Sift through a medium-mesh strainer into a small bowl; stir to combine. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Rub inside and out with salt; transfer to roasting bag. Stuff turkey with cardamom pods and cumin seeds, then onion, celery, and garlic.
Purée all ingredients in a blender. Pour marinade into roasting bag. Smear all over turkey. Tie bag and arrange turkey, breast side down, in a large heavy roasting pan. Refrigerate overnight.
Let turkey stand in a bag at room temperature for 1 hour. Turn breast side up. Create steam holes in bag if required by manufacturer's instructions.

Preheat oven to 400°. Roast turkey for 30 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°. Roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh (puncturing bag with thermometer) registers 160°, about 1 1/2 hours longer. Cut top of bag open, being careful of steam and juices, and pull back over turkey. Roast turkey until breast is deeply browned but not burned and a thermometer inserted into thigh registers 165°, 15–30 minutes longer.
Transfer to a platter. Let rest for at least 20 minutes before carving.
Meanwhile, strain juices into a large saucepan. Spoon fat from surface. Simmer over medium heat until sauce is reduced to 3 1/2 cups, about 20 minutes.
Carve turkey. Serve with accompanying gravy.

tangerine-and-apricot-cake-turkiye-telec.name: Tangerine And Apricot Cake (türkiye)
instructions: Coloque os damascos numa tigela, cubra-os com água e deixe-os de molho durante 30 minutos.
Após o tempo indicado, descasque as tangerinas, coloque os gomos numa trituradora, junte os damascos escorridos e triture até obter um puré.
À parte, bata os ovos até ficarem volumosos e esbranquiçados. Junte o puré de tangerina e damascos, a amêndoa, o fermento, o açúcar, os pistácios e as nozes e misture tudo muito bem.
Verta a massa para uma forma, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha, e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 1 hora. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

tangerine-and-prosecco-sorbet.name: Tangerine And Prosecco Sorbet
instructions: Combine sugar and 3/4 cup water in small saucepan. Stir over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat and bring to boil. Transfer syrup to medium bowl and chill until cold, about 2 hours.
Add strained tangerine juice, Prosecco, and finely grated tangerine peel to syrup; whisk to blend well. Transfer mixture to ice cream maker and process according to manufacturer's instructions.
Transfer sorbet to freezer container. Cover tightly with lid and freeze until firm, at least 8 hours or overnight. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Keep frozen.
Divide sorbet among wine goblets or dessert glasses. Serve immediately.

tangerine-cake-argiro.name: Tangerine Cake
instructions: Ρίχνουμε τον παπαρουνόσπορο στο χλιαρό γάλα, το σκεπάζουμε και το αφήνουμε 15 λεπτά να βγάλει άρωμα.
Εν τω μεταξύ, στύβουμε τα μανταρίνια και, αν θέλουμε, τα αλέθουμε σε πολτό μαζί με το ξύσμα.
Σε ένα μίξερ με κάδο, χτυπάμε με το σύρμα το βούτυρο με τη ζάχαρη για λίγα λεπτά, μέχρι να γίνει κρέμα.
Προσθέτουμε τα αυγά ένα-ένα, ώστε να απορροφώνται καλά από το μείγμα.
Χαμηλώνουμε την ταχύτητα του μίξερ και προσθέτουμε εναλλάξ το αλεύρι με το γάλα και τον χυμό μανταρινιού. Ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να ενσωματωθούν καλά όλα τα υλικά.
Βουτυρώνουμε και αλευρώνουμε μια φόρμα 23 ή 25 εκ. Αδειάζουμε μέσα το μείγμα και στρώνουμε την επιφάνεια ομοιόμορφα.
Ψήνουμε στους 170°C στις αντιστάσεις για περίπου 1 ώρα, μέχρι να βγαίνει καθαρή η μύτη ενός μαχαιριού.
Αφήνουμε το κέικ να σταθεί 10 λεπτά στη φόρμα και στη συνέχεια το βγάζουμε σε σχάρα να κρυώσει.
Μόλις κρυώσει, ξαναβάζουμε το κέικ στη φόρμα και το τρυπάμε ολόγυρα με ένα σουβλί.
Περιχύνουμε σιγά-σιγά το ζεστό σιρόπι και αφήνουμε το κέικ να απορροφήσει το σιρόπι και να κρυώσει τελείως.
Ξεφορμάρουμε και σερβίρουμε.

tangerine-cake-economical-and-recipe-tel.name: Tangerine Cake - Economical And Recipe
tangerine-cake-economical-and-recipe-tel.original_name: Bolo de tangerina- Receita Económica e Fácil
instructions: Parta os ovos para uma tigela, junte o açúcar e o óleo e envolva. Reserve.
Lave as tangerinas, elimine os caroços, corte-as em pedaços e triture-os com a varinha mágica.
Adicione a tangerina triturada ao preparado anterior e, de seguida, acrescente a farinha e o fermento. Envolva até ficar tudo bem incorporado.
Unte uma forma com manteiga e polvilhe farinha. Deite a massa na forma e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 30 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

tangerine-cakes-lezzet.name: Tangerine Cakes
instructions: 1. Suyu bir kaseye alıp üzerine toz jelatini serpiştirin ve 10 dakika bekletin.
2.  Süt, mandalina suyu, şeker, vanilya, rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu, birkaç damla gıda boyası, yumurta sarısı ve nişastayı tencereye alıp çırpıcı ile iyice karıştırın.
3.  Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
4.  Ocaktan alıp jelatini ekleyin ve tamamen eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
5.  Karışımı ıslatılmış silikon pasta kalıplarına paylaştırın.
6.  Pasta tabanını kalıp büyüklüğünde kesip üzerine yerleştirin.
7.  Derin dondurucuda 1-1.
8. 5 saat beklemeye bırakın.
9.  Pastaları kalıptan ters çevirerek çıkarın ve servis yapın.
10. Daha kalabalık sofralar için, klasik mandalinalı pasta tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

tangerine-cheesecake-recipe-comedera.name: Tangerine Cheesecake Recipe
instructions: Tritura las galletas hasta obtener textura pulverizada.
Mezcla las galletas con la mantequilla derretida hasta obtener una textura arenosa.
Pasa la mezcla a un molde desmoldable de 22 centímetros y presiona bien al fondo para que se adhiera muy bien.
Refrigera 20 minutos para que compacte.
Precalienta el horno a 160 °C.
Bate el queso crema con el azúcar hasta lograr textura lisa y sedosa.
Añade uno a uno los huevos y mezcla con ligereza hasta que se integren a la mezcla.
Incorpora la crema, el jugo, la ralladura y vainilla. Mezcla todo muy bien.
Agrega la fécula de maíz tamizada e integra hasta que se disuelva en la mezcla.
Vierte la mezcla sobre la base.
Hornea a baño María de 60 a 65 minutos o hasta que el centro quede tembloroso.
Apaga el horno y deja reposar con la la puerta entreabierta por 1 hora.
Pasado ese tiempo, retira del horno y refrigera por 4 horas.
Una vez esté firme, corta en porciones y disfruta. Acompaña con unos gajos de mandarina.

tangerine-compote-teleculinaria.name: Tangerine Compote
instructions: Retire o máximo de pele branca aos gomos de tangerina. Retire-lhes também os caroços e corte-os ao meio.
Num tacho, coloque os gomos de tangerina, o açúcar e o sumo de tangerina. Mexa e leve a lume brando, durante 1 hora e 10 minutos.
No final, veja se ficou com a consistência desejada, retire do lume e coloque em frascos esterilizados.

tangerine-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: Tangerine Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: Ayçiçek yağı veya zeytinyağı (daha hafif bir lezzet)
Toz şeker (daha kıtır bir doku için)
Stevia veya eritritol (düşük kalorili versiyon için)
Limon ve portakal karışımı (ferah ve hafif asidik tat için)

instructions: 1. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağını derin bir kaba alın.
2.  Sıvı yağ ve pudra şekerini ekleyip krema kıvamına gelene kadar karıştırın.
3. Yumurtayı ilave edip homojen olana kadar çırpın.
4. Mandalina kabuğu rendesi ve mandalina suyunu ekleyerek karıştırmaya devam edin.
5. Vanilin ve kabartma tozunu ekleyin.
6. Unu azar azar ilave ederek ele yapışmayan, yumuşak bir hamur yoğurun.
7. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp yuvarlayın ve yağlı kâğıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak dizin.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında 12–15 dakika, üzeri hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin.
9. Fırından çıkan ve soğuyan kurabiyelerin üzerine pudra şekeri serpiştirerek servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

tangerine-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Tangerine Cookies
instructions: Aqueça o forno a 200ºC e unte um tabuleiro com manteiga. Numa tigela bata bem a manteiga com o açúcar até obter uma massa cremosa, junte o ovo e a farinha misturada com o fermento e o sal e envolva bem até ter uma massa homogénea.

Lave e raspe a casca do limão, esprema o sumo e reserve. Adicione a raspa de limão à massa e molde pequenas bolinhas. Disponha no tabuleiro, bem separadas uma das outras, espalme-as um pouco e com uma colher de café faça cavidades na massa.

Leve ao forno (no centro) durante 12 minutos. Retire as bolachas e deixe arrefecer. À parte misture o doce de laranja com um pouco de sumo e coloque dentro das cavidades. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e acompanhe com gomos de tangerina.

Aqueça o forno a 200ºC e unte um tabuleiro com manteiga. Numa tigela bata bem a manteiga com o açúcar até obter uma massa cremosa, junte o ovo e a farinha misturada com o fermento e o sal e envolva bem até ter uma massa homogénea.

Lave e raspe a casca do limão, esprema o sumo e reserve. Adicione a raspa de limão à massa e molde pequenas bolinhas. Disponha no tabuleiro, bem separadas uma das outras, espalme-as um pouco e com uma colher de café faça cavidades na massa.

Leve ao forno (no centro) durante 12 minutos. Retire as bolachas e deixe arrefecer. À parte misture o doce de laranja com um pouco de sumo e coloque dentro das cavidades. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e acompanhe com gomos de tangerina.

tangerine-cream-argiro.name: Tangerine Cream
instructions: Για την κρέμα μανταρίνι, διαλέγουμε αρωματικά μανταρίνια με σφιχτή σάρκα. Αφαιρούμε το ξύσμα και το κρατάμε στην άκρη. Τα στύβουμε και κρατάμε το χυμό.
Σε κατσαρόλα βάζουμε το βούτυρο, τη ζάχαρη, το ξύσμα και την κιτρινόριζα και με σύρμα ανακατεύουμε.
Ένα ένα ρίχνουμε τα αυγά, ανακατεύοντας με το σύρμα. Τέλος προσθέτουμε το χυμό και το αλάτι.
Βάζουμε το μείγμα σε σιγανή φωτιά και ανακατεύοντας συνεχώς αφήνουμε να πήξει για περίπου 10′, πάντα σε πολύ χαμηλή φωτιά.
Βάζουμε σε βάζο να κρυώσει και αφού κρυώσει το σκεπάζουμε και το συντηρούμε στο ψυγείο για 12 ημέρες.
-Διαλέξτε ζουμερά και αρωματικά, μεγάλα και ώριμα μανταρίνια.
-Διαλέξτε βούτυρο με πλούσια γεύση και άρωμα και ολόφρεσκα αυγά.
-Ζάχαρη μπορείτε να αυξήσετε ή να μειώσετε την ποσότητα, ανάλογα με το πως επιθυμείτε.
-Καλύτερα να τη φτιάξετε μια μέρα πριν τη χρησιμοποιήσετε ώστε να κρυώσει σωστά και να σταθεροποιηθεί αν πρόκειται να γεμίσετε τούρτα η μπισκότα.
-Όλα τα υλικά να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
-Μη χρησιμοποιήσετε έτοιμο χυμό εμπορίου, η φρεσκάδα του μανταρινιού κάνει την διαφορά σε αυτή την συνταγή.
-Αν τα μανταρίνια σας είναι πολύ γλυκά, μπορείτε να μειώσετε τη ζάχαρη στη συνταγή.
-Την κιτρινόριζα τη βάζουμε για να πάρει η κρέμα μανταρίνι έντονο χρώμα. Μπορείτε να την παραλείψετε αν δεν έχετε στο ντουλάπι σας.

-Σιγουρευτείτε ότι ανακατεύετε συνεχώς την κρέμα μανταρίνι μέχρι να πήξει πάντα όμως σε σιγά η φωτιά. Η κρέμα δεν πρέπει να φτάσει σε σημείο βρασμού, αλλά να πήξει σιγά σιγά με την παρατεταμένη παραμονή της σε χαμηλή θερμοκρασία λίγο πριν φτάσει στο στάδιο βρασμού.
-Αφού πήξει και γίνει παχύρρευστη (θα πυκνώσει κι άλλο τον παγώσει ) βάλτε την σε αποστειρωμένο βάζο.  Αφού έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου σφραγίστε τη και διατηρήστε τη στο ψυγείο.
-Αν την αραιώσουμε με λίγη χτυπημένη κρέμα, έχουμε μια υπέροχη μους μανταρίνι.
Αγαπάτε τα μανταρίνια; Εδώ θα βρείτε περισσότερες μοναδικές συνταγές!

tangerine-jam-argiro.name: Tangerine Jam
instructions: Διαλέγουμε ακέρωτα μανταρίνια, μέτρια σε μέγεθος, ώριμα αλλά σφιχτά και κατά προτίμηση χωρίς κουκούτσια. (Αλλιώς αφαιρούμε τα κουκούτσια).
Πλένουμε τα μανταρίνια και αφαιρούμε τα κοτσάνια.
Σε κατσαρόλα με νερό που βράζει, βυθίζουμε τα μανταρίνια ολόκληρα και βράζουμε για 4-5′.
Τα αφαιρούμε με τρυπητή κουτάλα και τα βάζουμε σε μπολ με κρύο νερό να κοπεί ο βρασμός τους.
Πετάμε το νερό.
Μετά, με κοφτερό μαχαίρι, κόβουμε τα μανταρίνια σε λεπτές φέτες με τη σάρκα και τη φλούδα μαζί.
Με ψαλίδι, αφαιρούμε τις λεπτές λευκές μεμβράνες στις ενώσεις.
Αν υπάρχουν κουκούτσια, τα συγκεντρώνουμε όλα και τα δένουμε σε τουλπάνι. Έχουν μεγάλη περιεκτικότητα σε πηκτίνη και θα βοηθήσουν στο να δέσει ωραία η μαρμελάδα.
Μετά το βράσιμο, αφαιρούμε το τουλπάνι με τα κουκούτσια, αφού το στύψουμε πολύ καλά.
Σε καθαρή κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση, ρίχνουμε τα μανταρίνια και 5 φλ. νερό.
Αφήνουμε να βράσουν για 15 ´ σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά, μέχρι να μαλακώσει ελαφρά η φλούδα.
Τότε, προσθέτουμε τα 3 φλ. ζάχαρη.
Ανακατεύουμε να λιώσει η ζάχαρη.
Από την ώρα που θα πάρει βράση, ανακατεύουμε τακτικά με ξύλινη κουτάλα.
Βράζουμε σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά, ανακατεύοντας τακτικά για περίπου 30′ μέχρι να σκουρύνει ελαφρά και να πυκνώσει.
Στα τελευταία λεπτά του βρασμού, ρίχνουμε το χυμό λεμόνι κι αφήνουμε να πάρει μια βράση.
Ισομοιράζουμε την καυτή μαρμελάδα σε καυτά αποστειρωμένα βάζα.
Γεμίζουμε τα βάζα με μαρμελάδα μανταρίνι μέχρι πάνω.
Τα αναποδογυρίζουμε στον πάγκο της κουζίνας κι αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν τελείως.
Τα διατηρούμε σε δροσερό και σκιερό σημείο της κουζίνας.
Αν ανοίξουμε ένα βάζο το συντηρούμε στο ψυγείο.

tangerine-jam-and-recipe-pequerecetas.name: Tangerine Jam ( And Recipe)
tangerine-jam-and-recipe-pequerecetas.original_name: Mermelada de mandarina casera (receta fácil y rápida)

ingredients.item: 1/2 cucharadita de cardamomo en polvo o semillas de cardamomo

instructions: Pelamos y cortamos las mandarinas en pequeños pedazos.
Ponemos las mandarinas en una olla con el agua y el azúcar. Cocinamos a fuego medio hasta que se forme un almíbar espeso y las mandarinas estén suaves.
Agregamos el cardamomo en polvo o las semillas de cardamomo (deben ser machacadas antes) y mezclamos bien.
Cocinamos por unos minutos más hasta que la mermelada tenga la consistencia deseada.
Dejamos enfriar y transferimos la mermelada a un frasco esterilizado.

tangerine-jam-and-economical-recipe-tele.name: Tangerine Jam - And Economical Recipe
tangerine-jam-and-economical-recipe-tele.original_name: Compota de tangerina- Receita fácil e económica
instructions: Retire o máximo de pele branca aos gomos de tangerina. Retire-lhes também os caroços e corte-os ao meio.
Num tacho, coloque os gomos de tangerina, o açúcar e o sumo de tangerina. Mexa e leve a lume brando, durante 1 hora e 10 minutos.
No final, veja se ficou com a consistência desejada, retire do lume e coloque em frascos esterilizados.

tangerine-jam-recipe-lezzet.name: Tangerine Jam Recipe
instructions: 1. Mandalinaları güzelce yıkayın.
2.  Kabuklarıyla birlikte kullanacağınız için özellikle yüzeylerini fırçalayarak temizleyin.
3. Her mandalinayı dörde bölün veya küçükse ikiye ayırın.
4.  Çekirdekleri varsa çıkarın.
5. Mandalinaları kaynar suya atın ve 5 dakika haşlayın.
6.  Ardından suyunu süzüp soğuk suya alın.
7. Bu işlemi 2 kez tekrarlayın.
8.  Böylece kabuğun acılığı tamamen giderilir ve reçeliniz daha hoş bir tada kavuşur.
9. Haşlanmış mandalinaları tencereye alın.
10.  Üzerine şekeri serpin.
11. Oda sıcaklığında en az 4 saat, mümkünse bir gece bekletin.
12.  Bu sürede mandalinalar suyunu salacak ve reçelinizin kıvamı daha net olacaktır.
13. Şekeri erimiş mandalinaları ocağa alın.
14.  Üzerine 1 su bardağı suyu ekleyin.
15. Orta ateşte, kaynamaya başladıktan sonra kısık ateşte 35–40 dakika kadar pişirin.
16. Üzeri köpüklenirse kevgirle alın.
17.  Reçelinizin kıvamını kontrol etmek için bir damla reçeli soğuk tabağa damlatın; yayılmadan duruyorsa kıvam hazır demektir.
18. Ocaktan almadan 5 dakika önce yarım limonun suyunu ekleyin, birkaç dakika daha kaynatın.
19. Sıcak reçeli sterilize edilmiş kavanozlara doldurun, kapağını sıkıca kapatın ve ters çevirerek soğumaya bırakın ve servis edin.

tangerine-macarons-lezzet.name: Tangerine Macarons

ingredients.item: 1 çay kaşığı ince rendelenmiş mandalina kabuğu
1 çay kaşığı ince rendelenmiş mandalina kabuğu

instructions: 1. Pudra şekeri, toz badem ve mandalina kabuğunu bir kasede karıştırın.
2.  Ayrı bir kasede yumurta aklarını sertleşene kadar mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
3.  Toz şekeri yavaşça ilave edip çırpmaya devam edin.
4.  Gıda boyasını ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Bir kaşık yardımıyla yavaş yavaş bademli karışıma ekleyin.
6.  Karışımı sıkma torbasına doldurun.
7.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serin.
8.  Aralarında boşluk bırakarak kurşun kalemle 3 cm çapında yuvarlaklar çizin.
9.  Sıkma torbasına doldurduğunuz harcı bu yuvarlakları dolduracak şekilde sıkın.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış 150 derece fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
11.  Dolgusu için pudra şekeri, tereyağı, mandalina kabuğu ve mandalina suyunu bir mikser yardımıyla pürüzsüz bir kıvam alana kadar iyice çırpın.
12.  Dolguyu bir sıkma torbasına doldurun.
13.  Fırından çıkarttığınız makaronların düz taraflarına mandalinalı dolgudan sıkın.
14.  Üzerini diğer parçayla kapatıp servis yapın.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

tangerine-marmalade-lezzet.name: Tangerine Marmalade
instructions: 1. Mandalinaları güzelce yıkayın.
2.  Kabuklarını soyun ama kabukların yarısını ayırın.
3.  (Acılığı azaltmak için kabukları sıcak suda 2-3 dakika haşlayıp süzebilirsiniz.
4. )Mandalina içlerini çekirdeklerinden ayırın ve doğrayın.
5.  Ayırdığınız kabukları ince ince doğrayın veya rondodan geçirin.
6. Tencereye mandalina içlerini ve doğradığınız kabukları alın.
7. Üzerine şekeri ekleyin.
8.  30-60 dakika kadar meyvenin suyunu salması için bekletin.
9.  Orta ateşte kaynamaya bırakın.
10. Kaynadıktan sonra kısık ateşte, kıvam alana kadar (yaklaşık 30-45 dakika) pişirin.
11.  Kıvam alırken karıştırarak dibi tutmasını önleyin.
12. Kıvam testini yapmak için bir tabağa biraz marmelat alın, soğuyunca çok akışkan değilse olmuş demektir.
13. Limon suyunu ekleyin ve birkaç dakika daha kaynatın.
14. İsteğe bağlı olarak tarçın veya karanfili ekleyip birkaç dakika kaynatıp çıkarabilirsiniz.
15. Sıcakken temiz kavanozlara doldurun ve kapağını kapatıp ters çevirin.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

tangerine-pie-argiro.name: Tangerine Pie
instructions: Ανοίγουμε πρώτα το φύλλο κρούστας από τη συσκευασία και το απλώνουμε να στεγνώσει για 15′.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε το λάδι, τη ζάχαρη, το ξύσμα, το baking powder, τη βανίλια, τα αυγά και το γιαούρτι.
Με σύρμα τα χτυπάμε καλά, μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί το μείγμα.
Ψιλοκόβουμε το στεγνό πλέον φύλλο και το ανοίγουμε με τα δάχτυλα, ώστε να ξεχωρίσει κομμάτι κομμάτι. Το προσθέτουμε στα υγρά υλικά.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά, ώστε να βραχούν τα φύλλα από τα υγρά υλικά.
Βουτυρώνουμε ή λαδώνουμε μακρόστενο ταψί 35×24 εκ. και αδειάζουμε το μείγμα. Πρέπει να είναι λεπτή σε πάχος.
Ισιώνουμε την επιφάνεια με κουτάλι.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 15′ σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Την ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 180ºC στις αντιστάσεις, στην κάτω σχάρα, ή στους 160ºC στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα. Ψήνουμε για περίπου 35′, μέχρι να ροδίσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Σιροπιάζουμε τη ζεστή μανταρινόπιτα με το κρύο σιρόπι.

tangerine-salad-lezzet.name: Tangerine Salad
instructions: 1. Kabuksuz bademleri zeytinyağı ile tavaya alın ve sürekli karıştırarak kavurun.
2.  Soğumaya bırakın.
3.  Akdeniz yeşilliklerini yıkayıp iyice kurutun ve servis tabağına alın.
4.  Mandalinanın kabuklarını soyup üzerini iyice temizleyin ve salataya ekleyin.
5.  Badem ve yaban mersinlerini ekleyip harmanlayın.
6.  Sos için mandalinanın suyunu sıkın.
7.  Bal, zeytinyağı, tuz ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
8.  Salatanın üzerine sos gezdirip servis yapın.

tangerine-sorbet-recipe-comedera.name: Tangerine Sorbet Recipe
instructions: Para esta receta, no peles las mandarinas, córtalas a la mitad.
Exprímelas muy bien hasta que suelten todo su jugo.
Cuela el zumo para desechar las semillas o cualquier impureza. Reserva.
En una olla pequeña. vierte el agua y el azúcar.
Lleva al fuego y cocina hasta que el azúcar se haya disuelto y tengas un buen almíbar. Apaga y deja enfriar.
Cuando el almíbar esté frío, mézclalo con el zumo de la mandarina y agrega la cucharada de limón.
Una vez esté todo mezclado, vierte en un envase de metal.
Lleva al congelador por unas 4 horas. Cada 30 minutos debes remover para conseguir la textura del sorbete. También es vital mezclar para deshacer los cristales y procurar que no se congele.
Pasado ese tiempo, el sorbete debe estar ligero, un poco granizado y cremoso a la vez.
Sirve y acompaña con hojas de mente.

tangerine-sweet-of-the-spoon-argiro.name: Tangerine Sweet Of The Spoon
instructions: Πλένουμε καλά τα μανταρίνια.
Αφαιρούμε το κοτσάνι.
Με τη μύτη του μαχαιριού αφαιρούμε ένα κομματάκι φλούδα στην ένωση του κοτσανιού.
Τα ζεματάμε για 3 φορές από 2 λεπτά.
Τα αφήνουμε να στραγγίσουν σε σουρωτήρι.
Τα στύβουμε ένα ένα να φύγουν τα πολλά υγρά και τα αφήνουμε ανάποδα με το κομμένο σημείο να ακουμπάει σε πετσέτα καθαρή για 5-6 ώρες.
[adrotate banner=”72″]
Βράζουμε τη ζάχαρη με το νερό για 5-6′ και ρίχνουμε τα μανταρίνια.
Αφήνουμε να βράσουν για 5′.
Σβήνουμε τη φωτιά, σκεπάζουμε με καθαρή πετσέτα και αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν μέσα στο σιρόπι τους.
Τα βγάζουμε με τρυπητή κουτάλα.
Δένουμε το σιρόπι να σχηματίζει κόμπο και ξαναρίχνουμε τα μανταρίνια.
Βράζουμε για 5-6′ και προς το τέλος του βρασμού προσθέτουμε το χυμό λεμονιού.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει και το βάζουμε σε αποστειρωμένο βάζο.

tangy-and-tasty-kale-salad.name: Tangy And Tasty Kale Salad

ingredients.prep: center stems discarded and leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Combine olive oil, lemon juice, mustard, shallot, garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Set dressing aside.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add almonds and cook until just browned, 1 to 2 minutes.
Toss kale, Brussels sprouts, and toasted almonds in a bowl with the dressing. Add Pecorino Romano cheese and serve immediately or allow to sit about 30 minutes for flavors to meld.

tangy-balsamic-pasta-with-sun-gold-tomat.name: Tangy Balsamic Pasta With Sun Gold Tomatoes

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
. balsamic glaze (preferably nonna pia’s); plus more for drizzling

instructions: Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil.

Heat ½ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large saucepan over medium. Cook 5 garlic cloves, finely chopped, stirring, until golden, 30–60 seconds. Add 14 oz. Sun Gold tomatoes, halved through stem ends, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, and ½ cup boiling salted water from pot; season with freshly ground black pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally and smashing tomatoes with a wooden spoon, until tomatoes are jammy and falling apart, 5–7 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook 1 lb. campanelle or other medium pasta in pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente.

Add 2 Tbsp. torn basil leaves and remaining 14 oz. Sun Gold tomatoes, halved through stem ends, to sauce and cook, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes have burst, 5–8 minutes. Stir in 1 Tbsp. balsamic glaze. Drain pasta and add to sauce; toss to coat.
Transfer pasta to a large shallow bowl; top with remaining 2 Tbsp. torn basil leaves and drizzle with more balsamic glaze if desired.

tangy-beet-cashew-dressing-with-chile.name: Tangy Beet-cashew Dressing With Chile

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. raw apple cider vinegar

instructions: Put the beet, water, nut or coconut butter or tahini, vinegar, olive oil, garlic, and salt in an upright blender and blend until completely smooth. Scrape down the sides with a rubber spatula and blend again. Adjust the seasoning to taste and blend again. Use immediately, or store in a glass jar in the fridge for up to 3 days. Shake well before using. The dressing will thicken once chilled; thin it out with a little water if needed.
Make the dressing following the instructions for the base recipe, adding the chile to the blender along with the other ingredients.

tangy-carolina-style-barbeque-sauce.name: Tangy Carolina-style Barbeque Sauce
instructions: Combine yellow mustard, cider vinegar, brown sugar, white sugar, water, vinegar, chili powder, black pepper, white pepper, cayenne pepper, and soy sauce in a saucepan over medium-low heat.
Cook and stir until flavors blend, about 20 minutes. Add butter and liquid smoke flavoring and simmer until butter melts and flavors blend, about 10 minutes more.

tangy-cucumber-slaw-for-tacos.name: Tangy Cucumber Slaw For Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Add cabbage, cucumber, red onion, and cilantro in a large bowl.
Whisk vinegar, oil, sugar, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a separate bowl. Add dressing to coleslaw mix. Let sit until flavors settle, at least 1 hour.

tangy-greens-with-bacon-y-breadcrumbs.name: Tangy Greens With Bacon-y Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: Of little gem lettuce or 1 large head of romaine lettuce

instructions: Vigorously whisk buttermilk, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, and ¼ cup dill in a medium bowl to combine; season dressing with salt and pepper. Set aside for serving.

Cook bacon in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring often as it begins to crisp, until browned and mostly crisp, 6–8 minutes. Keep bacon in pan and spoon out all but 2 Tbsp. fat into a small bowl.

Add panko to skillet and return to medium heat. Cook, stirring often, until panko is golden and crisp, about 2 minutes (don’t walk away; panko will toast slowly at first but can easily burn around edges of skillet). Add up to 1 Tbsp. fat in bowl back to pan if breadcrumbs look dry. Remove from heat, add remaining ¼ cup dill, and toss to combine. Season breadcrumb mixture with salt and pepper and transfer to a medium bowl.

Arrange one third of lettuce on a platter and top with one third of tomatoes; season with salt. Generously drizzle some reserved dressing over and scatter some breadcrumb mixture on top. Repeat layers 2 more times. Top salad with an extra shower of breadcrumb mixture, then lemon zest.

tangy-grilled-chicken-wings-with-giardin.name: Tangy Grilled Chicken Wings With Giardiniera

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 2 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: flats and drumettes separated, patted dry

instructions: Whisk ⅓ cup double-concentrated tomato paste, 1 Tbsp. garlic powder, 1 Tbsp. Italian seasoning, 1 Tbsp. smoked paprika, ¼ cup white wine vinegar, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl. Add 2 lb. chicken wings, flats and drumettes separated, patted dry, and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and, preferably, up to 3 hours.

Meanwhile, place ½ medium head of cauliflower, cut into florets, 1 large carrot, peeled, cut into 3"-long sticks, 3 celery stalks, cut into 3"-long sticks, and ½ cup pickled hot cherry peppers, halved, in a medium heatproof bowl. Bring 2 Tbsp. sugar and remaining 1 cup white wine vinegar and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt to a simmer in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat and stir in ¼ cup cherry pepper brine; pour mixture over vegetables. Let sit 15 minutes, then chill until ready to serve.
Combine 12 oz. feta and 2 Tbsp. buttermilk or sour cream in a food processor; season generously with freshly ground pepper. Process until very smooth, about 3 minutes. Set whipped feta aside.

Prepare a grill for medium heat; oil grate. Remove chicken wings
from marinade, letting excess drip back into bowl, and arrange on grate. Cover and grill,
turning occasionally, until charred in spots and an instant-read thermometer inserted into
thickest part of a wing registers 165°, 20–25 minutes.

To serve, spread reserved whipped feta on a platter; arrange chicken wings on top. Tuck drained pickled vegetables around. Drizzle hot honey over.
Do Ahead: Vegetables can be pickled 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

tangy-honey-glazed-ham.name: Tangy Honey-glazed Ham
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Place ham on a rack set in a roasting pan.
Bake uncovered in the preheated oven for 2 hours.

While the ham is baking, combine brown sugar, pineapple juice, and 1/3 cup honey in a saucepan. Zest orange into the saucepan, then squeeze in the juice. Add Dijon mustard and ground cloves; whisk mixture over medium-high heat as it comes to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until glaze thickens slightly, 5 to 10 minutes.
Taste glaze and adjust seasonings. Add lemon juice for more tang, or honey to make it sweeter. Set aside.
Remove ham from the oven after it has baked for 2 hours. Brush with glaze. Bake for an additional 30 to 45 minutes, brushing ham with glaze every 10 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy!

tangy-meatloaf-sauce.name: Tangy Meatloaf Sauce
instructions: Stir ketchup, chili sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce together in a bowl with a whisk until the sugar dissolves.

tangy-mustard.name: Tangy Mustard

ingredients.item: Half pint canning jars with lids and rings

instructions: Combine the yellow mustard seeds, brown mustard seeds, and Oriental mustard seeds in a bowl. Pour the vinegar over the seeds and stir. Cover and store in refrigerator for 24 hours. If the seeds absorb all the vinegar too quickly, add more as needed or add a little water.
Blend the soaked mustard seeds, garlic, honey, salt, and thyme in a blender until it is to your desired consistency, depending on how grainy you like your mustard.

Sterilize the jars and lids in boiling water for at least 5 minutes. Pack the mustard into the hot, sterilized jars, filling the jars to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a knife or a thin spatula around the insides of the jars after they have been filled to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids and screw on rings. Refrigerate at least 2 weeks before using.

tangy-oven-baked-chicken-tenders-without.name: Tangy Oven-baked Chicken Tenders Without Breading
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray lightly with nonstick spray.
Combine chili sauce, honey, lime juice, dried onion, brown sugar, garlic, and Sriracha in a small bowl. Let the sauce sit for 5 minutes to allow the dried onion to soften a bit.
Spread out chicken tenders on the prepared baking sheet; brush with a thin coat of the sauce.

Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, remove from oven, and brush on the remaining sauce. Return to the oven and bake until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 5 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Serve with lime wedges.

tangy-rhubarb-salsa.name: Tangy Rhubarb Salsa

ingredients.prep: seeded and coarsely chopped - or to taste

instructions: Stir rhubarb into a large pot of boiling water and cook for 10 seconds. Quickly drain rhubarb and rinse with cold water until cool; transfer rhubarb to a large bowl.

Place red onion, green, red, and yellow bell peppers, jalapeño pepper, and cilantro into a food processor and pulse 3 or 4 times to finely chop; transfer pepper mixture to bowl with rhubarb. Stir in tomatoes.

Dissolve brown sugar in Key lime juice in a bowl; lightly stir lime juice mixture into rhubarb mixture. Sprinkle salsa with salt, garlic powder, and black pepper and stir salsa again. Refrigerate at least 3 hours to blend flavors.

tangy-shrimp-dip.name: Tangy Shrimp Dip
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese, mayonnaise and sour cream until smooth. Spread into the bottom of a serving dish. Top with layers in the following order: shrimp, cocktail sauce, mozzarella cheese, green onion, green pepper, and tomato. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.

tangy-spinach-salad.name: Tangy Spinach Salad
instructions: Whisk onion, sugar, apple cider vinegar, canola oil, yellow mustard, salt, celery seed, and black pepper together in a bowl until well combined. Chill in refrigerator at least 2 hours to blend flavors.
Mix spinach, stuffing mix, eggs, and bacon together in a large bowl. Add dressing and stir to coat.

tangy-tamari-dressing.name: Tangy Tamari Dressing
instructions: Blend olive oil, nutritional yeast, tamari, cider vinegar, lemon juice, garlic powder, basil, oregano, and thyme together in a food processor or blender until dressing is smooth.

tangy-tomato-chile-popcorn.name: Tangy Tomato-chile Popcorn

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 3 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Grind ½ cup tomato powder, 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 3½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 tsp. garlic powder, and 1 tsp. cayenne pepper in spice mill until very fine, about 30 seconds. Transfer spice blend to an airtight container.

Heat 3 Tbsp. avocado oil or vegetable oil and 3 Tbsp. ghee or unsalted butter in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add 2 yellow popcorn kernels (from ½ cup) and shake pot gently to coat. As soon as kernels begin to pop, add remaining popcorn kernels, cover pot with a large splatter screen or lid (leaving it slightly askew), and cook, shaking often, until most of kernels have popped, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit until popping has stopped. Transfer popcorn to a large bowl.

Sprinkle about 4 Tbsp. spice blend over popcorn and toss to coat (save remaining spice blend for more batches of popcorn).
Do Ahead: Spice blend can be made 3 weeks ahead. Store at room temperature.

tangy-turkey-taco-cups.name: Tangy Turkey Taco Cups
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Separate 6 biscuits into 2 rounds each. Gently stretch each round into a 5-inch circle. Press into cups of a non-stick muffin tin.

Lightly oil a skillet and place over medium-high heat. Cook turkey in skillet, separating into small pieces as it browns. When turkey is no longer pink, turn heat down to medium-low. Add taco seasoning, stirring to combine. Stir in Sloppy Joe sauce; continue cooking until heat through, about 5 minutes.
Fill biscuit-lined muffin cups with turkey mixture.
Bake in preheated oven until browned and hot, about 13 minutes.
Divide each slice of cheese into quarters, and place one-quarter slice on top of each filled cup.
Bake 3 minutes more, or until cheese is melted.
Allow to cool in the pan 5 minutes, then place on a rack until cool enough to eat.

tantuni-in-bazlama-lezzet.name: Tantuni In Bazlama
instructions: 1. Eti yapışmaz bir tavaya alıp suyunu çekene kadar kısık ateşte pişirin.
2.  Etler suyunu çekince zeytinyağı ve tereyağını ilave edip soğanları da ekleyin ve kavurmaya devam edin.
3.  Soğanlar diriliğini kaybedince baharatları ekleyip kısık ateşte kavurmaya devam edin.
4.  Ekmeği için unu geniş bir kaba alıp ortasını havuz yapın.
5.  Maya ve şekeri koyup, unun üzerine tuz ve yoğurdu ekleyin.
6.  Suyu ortaya yavaş yavaş dökerek hamuru yoğurun.
7.  Daha sonra hamuru 30 dakika dinlendirip mayaya gelmesini bekleyin.
8.  Dinlenen hamurdan istediğiniz büyüklükte bezeler alıp yuvarlayın.
9.  Bezeleri bazlama yapıp tavada pişirin.
10.  Soğan salatası için soğanları ince ince uzun şekilde doğrayın.
11.  Domatesin kabuklarını soyup küp küp doğrayın.
12.  Maydanozu ince ince kıyın.
13.  Soğanın acısının gitmesi için yıkayıp suyunu sıkın.
14.  Tüm malzemeyi bir kaba alın baharat ve yağını ilave edip karıştırın.
15.  Bazlamaları yağlamak için etin üzerine bastırıp et ve salatayı içine koyup dürüm yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

tantuni-recipe-lezzet.name: Tantuni Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 gr dana veya tavuk eti (ince jülyen doğranmış)
2 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağı veya sıvı yağ
Dana eti yerine tavuk göğsü veya hindi eti kullanılabilir.
Vejetaryen versiyon için mantar, tofu veya kabak jülyen doğranıp kullanılabilir.
Ayçiçek yağı veya avokado yağı ile değiştirilebilir.
Daha hafif bir seçenek için tavayı az yağ ile kullanabilirsiniz.
Kırmızı soğan, arpacık soğan veya pırasa ince doğranmış şekilde tercih edilebilir.
Daha hafif tat için soğan miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Taze domates yerine közlenmiş domates veya domates rendesi kullanılabilir.
Yaz mevsimi dışında konserve domates de uygundur.
Dolmalık yeşil biber, sivri biber veya kırmızı biber kullanılabilir.
Acı sevenler için jalapeno veya acı biber ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tuz, karabiber ve pul biber yerine kırmızı toz biber veya sumak da eklenebilir.
Baharat karışımı olarak isot veya kırmızı biber-pul biber karışımı kullanılabilir.
Tam buğday, kepekli dürüm veya ince pide ile değiştirilebilir.
Sağlıklı versiyon için marul veya göbek salata yaprakları içine sarabilirsiniz.
Maydanoz yerine taze nane veya dereotu da tercih edilebilir.
Limon yerine limon suyu veya nar ekşisi ile hafif ekşilik katabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Tavayı veya sacı yüksek ısıda ısıtın.
2. Zeytinyağını ekleyin ve eti hızlıca soteleyin.
3. Tuz, karabiber ve isteğe bağlı pul biber ile tatlandırın.
4. Soğan ve yeşil biberleri ekleyin, birkaç dakika soteleyin.
5. Domatesleri ekleyip hızlıca karıştırın, fazla yumuşamasına izin vermeyin.
6. Ocaktan alın ve ince kıyılmış maydanoz ile karıştırın.
7. Lavaş veya dürüm ekmeğine yerleştirip sarın, yanında limon dilimleri ile servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

tanyas-date-cake.name: Tanya's Date Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour an 8-inch round springform pan.
Bring a small saucepan of water to a boil. Add dates and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Drain dates and transfer to a food processor. Puree dates into a smooth paste.
Sift together flour and baking soda into a large bowl. Stir in chopped walnuts until combined and set aside.

Beat together butter and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Slowly add beaten eggs, allowing them to thoroughly blend into the butter mixture. Stir in ground dates and mix until combined. Pour in flour mixture and stir with a wooden spoon until just incorporated. Add 3/4 cup hot water or as needed to thin the batter into a pourable consistency. Transfer the batter to the prepared pan.
Bake cake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 45 to 50 minutes. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing to cool completely on a wire rack.

tapas-board-teleculinaria.name: Tapas Board

ingredients.item: 2 colheres (sopa)  molho pesto + molho pesto q.b.
Grãos de pimenta rosa e outra a gosto q.b.

instructions: Escorra as azeitonas, coloque-as num frasco, cubra com azeite e adicione folhas de alecrim. Disponha numa taça os pimentos assados cortados em tiras, tempere com sal e pimenta moída e regue com azeite.

Desenrole a massa folhada e, no centro, espalhe as colheres (sopa) de molho pesto. Coloque por cima o queijo camembert e envolva tudo com a massa folhada. Pincele com gema batida e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºc, até o folhado ficar bem douradinho.

Leve ao lume uma frigideira, junte o recheio da farinheira e deixe cozinhar. Bata os ovos numa tigela, adicione à farinheira, envolva e deixe cozinhar até ficar a seu gosto. Coloque num prato e salpique com coentros picados.
Toste ligeiramente algumas fatias de pão, raspe nelas 1 dente de alho descascado e coloque por cima metade dos tomates-cereja cortados ao meio.
Corte o queijo da ilha em cubos, deite num frasco, tempere com folhas de alecrim e grãos de pimenta e cubra com azeite. Esmague o requeijão, disponha numa taça e tempere com sal e pimenta rosa.
Corte os restantes tomates-cereja ao meio e a mozarela em fatias. Coloque-as num prato, intercalados com folhas de manjericão. Tempere com sal e pimenta moída.

Num tacho, refogue a cebola e os restantes alhos picados num pouco de azeite. Junte o tomate redondo cortado em pedaços e o tomate pelado, tempere com sal, pimenta moída e orégãos e deixe cozinhar muito bem.
Coloque a burrata numa taça com azeite e um pouco mais de pesto noutra taça. Num recipiente, disponha as fatias de paio, presunto e salame. Sirva todas as tapas sobre uma tábua.

tapas-with-goat-cheese-and-artichoke-lez.name: Tapas With Goat Cheese And Artichoke
instructions: 1. Enginarları tencereye alın.
2.  Üzerini geçecek kadar su ekleyin.
3.  Limon suyunu da ekleyin.
4.  Enginarları yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın.
5.  Enginarlar yumuşadıktan sonra sudan çıkarın ve 4’e bölüp mutfak robotuna alın.
6.  Badem, keçi peyniri, sarımsak, zeytinyağı, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip robotta iri parçalı olacak şekilde çekin.
7.  Kaparileri ekleyip kaşıkla karıştırın.
8.  Kızartılmış ekmeklerin üzerine hazırladığınız karışımı yayın.
9.  Maydanozla süsleyip servis yapın.

tapenade-the-black-olive-pate-from-prove.name: Tapenade, The Black Olive Pâté From Provence
tapenade-the-black-olive-pate-from-prove.original_name: Tapenade, el paté de aceitunas negras de la Provenza

ingredients.item: 200 g de aceitunas negras sin hueso

instructions: En un procesador de alimentos o batidora, agrega las aceitunas negras sin hueso, los filetes de anchoa, los dientes de ajo y las alcaparras.
Tritura los ingredientes hasta obtener una pasta suave y homogénea. Si lo prefieres, puedes dejar algunos trozos más gruesos para darle textura al tapenade.
Agrega el aceite de oliva y el jugo de limón al procesador de alimentos y mezcla nuevamente hasta que todos los ingredientes estén bien combinados.

Prueba el tapenade y ajusta la sazón según tu preferencia. Si deseas un sabor más intenso, puedes agregar más anchoas o alcaparras. Agrega pimienta negra molida al gusto y vuelve a mezclar para incorporarla.
Transfiere el tapenade a un recipiente hermético y déjalo reposar en el refrigerador durante al menos 30 minutos para que los sabores se fusionen.
tapenade-the-black-olive-pate-from-prove.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

tapioca-pearl-pudding.name: Tapioca Pearl Pudding
instructions: Whisk milk, cream, milk powder, and salt in a medium saucepan; add tapioca and let sit 30 minutes to hydrate.

Add sugar to tapioca mixture and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring often, until the consistency of a thick soup, 10–12 minutes. Whisk in egg yolk and cook, stirring occasionally, 2 minutes (it will thicken slightly). Let cool, stirring occasionally, 10 minutes.
Divide among small glasses. Chill pudding until cold (it will thicken), at least 2 hours. Serve topped with nutmeg.
DO AHEAD: Pudding can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

tapioca-pearl-pudding-with-grilled-peach.name: Tapioca Pearl Pudding With Grilled Peaches And Pistachios
instructions: Place tapioca in a medium bowl and cover with cold water. Let sit 10 minutes to hydrate (the pearls should be doubled in their size). Drain and return to bowl.

Meanwhile, bring half-and-half and cardamom to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in sugar and salt, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cook, stirring often, until reduced by one-third, 8–10 minutes. Add tapioca and cook until mixture is the consistency of a thick soup, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
Layer tapioca, peaches, and pistachios in glasses. Chill pudding until cold (it will thicken), about 1 hour.

tapsilog.name: Tapsilog

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced against the grain into bite-size strips

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Pat beef dry with paper towels. Whisk garlic, brown sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, cornstarch, red pepper flakes, black pepper, and salt in a medium bowl. Add beef to marinade and toss well to coat. Cover and chill at least 6 hours and up to 1 day.

Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over high. Drain beef in a sieve, letting as much excess marinade drip off as possible. Add half of beef to skillet, arranging in a single layer and cook, turning halfway through, until beef is cooked through and deeply browned in spots, about 3 minutes (be careful; the marinade will splatter). Transfer beef to a plate. Discard any garlic remaining in pan and repeat process with remaining beef. Keep warm. Clean skillet and set aside.
Place rice in a large bowl and break up with a rubber spatula. Stir in 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; set aside.

Heat oil in reserved skillet over medium-low. Cook garlic, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, about 5 minutes. Drain garlic in a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl; transfer to a small plate.

Pour 2 Tbsp. garlic oil back into skillet and heat over medium-high. Add reserved rice mixture and stir to coat in oil. Cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through, about 5 minutes. Set 1 Tbsp. fried garlic aside for serving and stir remaining fried garlic into rice. Transfer to a bowl and keep warm.

Heat remaining garlic oil in the same skillet over medium-high (you should have 2 Tbsp.; add vegetable oil to make up the difference if needed). Crack eggs into skillet and season with salt. Cook until whites are almost set, about 2 minutes. Carefully tilt skillet so oil pools on one side. Spoon oil over egg whites until fully set, about 1 minute.
Divide rice mixture, meat, and eggs among plates and top with reserved fried garlic.

taqueria-guacamole.name: Taqueria Guacamole
instructions: Mash avocado, lime juice, and a pinch of salt in a mortar and pestle or a medium bowl with a fork until thick and smooth. Mix in 1/4 cup water 1 tablespoonful at a time until mixture is creamy and smooth. Stir in cilantro. Season with salt.

taqueria-style-spicy-pickled-carrots.name: Taqueria-style Spicy Pickled Carrots
instructions: Whisk vinegar, water, and sea salt together in a small saucepan; bring to a low boil over medium-high heat, reduce heat, and simmer until salt is completely dissolved, about 3 minutes. Set aside.
Peel carrots; cut into ½-inch diagonal slices. Cut onion into quarters; cut each quarter into 3 strips. Cut stems off jalapeños; cut each jalapeño into 6 strips. Slightly crush each garlic clove.

Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add carrots; cook, stirring occasionally, for 6 minutes. Add bay leaves, peppercorns, oregano, and cumin seeds; cook and stir for 2 minutes. Add onion, jalapeños, and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender and fragrant but not soft, about 15 minutes.

Pack vegetable mixture into a 24-ounce wide mouth canning jar; pour in cooled vinegar mixture until liquid reaches 1 inch from the top. Pour 1 teaspoon olive oil on top; secure the lid. Cool to room temperature. The carrots are ready to serve after 1 hour but best after sitting for 24 hours.

tarako-spaghetti.name: Tarako Spaghetti

ingredients.item: Of salted cod roe with red pepper

instructions: Cut open the casing on the roe, and squeeze the eggs out onto a plate. Discard the casings.

Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add roe, and cook, stirring until the color of the roe changes from dark orange to light orange. Stir in the heavy cream until well blended and heated through. Turn off the heat.
Meanwhile bring a pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add angel hair pasta, and cook until al dente, 2 to 3 minutes. Drain, and toss with sauce to serve.

taramo-salad-mousse-without-bread-argiro.name: Taramo Salad Mousse Without Bread
instructions: Στο μίξερ (ιδανικά με ραβδομπλέντερ και ψηλό-στενό δοχείο), βάζουμε τον ταραμά, τον χυμό λεμονιού και το τριμμένο ή ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι.
Χτυπάμε τα υλικά μέχρι να γίνουν λεία αλοιφή.
Προσθέτουμε σιγά σιγά το ηλιέλαιο, συνεχίζοντας το χτύπημα σταθερά. Αρχίζει να δένει και να γίνεται κρεμώδης.
Ρίχνουμε και το ελαιόλαδο για περισσότερο σώμα και άρωμα. Η υφή θα γίνει πιο πυκνή.
Ρίχνουμε σταδιακά παγωμένο νερό, λίγο-λίγο, χτυπώντας παράλληλα, μέχρι να αποκτήσει η μους την επιθυμητή, ανάλαφρη υφή. Μπορεί να μη χρειαστεί όλο το νερό.
Προαιρετικά, προσθέτουμε λίγο ψιλοκομμένο άνηθο στο τέλος και ανακατεύουμε απαλά με κουτάλι.
Δοκιμάζουμε και, αν χρειάζεται, προσθέτουμε λίγο λεμόνι για περισσότερη οξύτητα ή λίγο ακόμη λάδι για πιο απαλή γεύση.
Μεταφέρουμε τη μους ταραμοσαλάτα σε γυάλινο σκεύος με καπάκι.
Διατηρείται στο ψυγείο για αρκετές ημέρες.

taramokeftedes-argiro.name: Taramokeftedes
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε λίγο λάδι σε ένα τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε τα κρεμμυδάκια για 2–3 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαραθούν και να γλυκάνουν. Τα αφήνουμε στο πλάι να κρυώσουν.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το ψωμί και το μουσκεύουμε με λίγο νερό.
Σε ένα άλλο μπολ βάζουμε τον ταραμά, τον άνηθο, το δυόσμο, τα κρεμμυδάκια και λίγο πιπέρι. Στύβουμε ένα λεμόνι και ανακατεύουμε το μείγμα για να αραιώσει ο ταραμάς.
Στραγγίζουμε και στύβουμε καλά το μουλιασμένο ψωμί, ψιχουλιάζοντάς το στο μείγμα του ταραμά. Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά για να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Αν το μείγμα είναι αραιό και δεν πλάθεται, προσθέτουμε 1–2 κουταλιές αλεύρι γ.ο.χ. ώστε να μπορεί να πλάθεται εύκολα.
Με βρεγμένα χέρια πλάθουμε τους ταραμοκεφτέδες και τους πατάμε ελαφρά ώστε να έχουν πλακέ σχήμα.
Αφού τους πλάσουμε όλους, τους πανάρουμε ελαφρά σε λίγο αλεύρι, τινάζοντας το περιττό.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε μέτρια ένταση. Τηγανίζουμε λίγους-λίγους τους ταραμοκεφτέδες για περίπου 2 λεπτά από κάθε πλευρά, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τοποθετούμε τους ταραμοκεφτέδες σε απορροφητικό χαρτί κουζίνας για να απορροφηθεί το περιττό λάδι.

taramos-salad-with-potato-argiro.name: Taramos Salad With Potato
instructions: Πλένουμε καλά τις πατάτες και τις βράζουμε ολόκληρες, με τη φλούδα τους. Ξεκινάμε πάντα το βράσιμο σε κρύο νερό, ώστε να μαλακώσουν ομοιόμορφα και να μη σκάσουν κατά τον βρασμό. Δεν τις ξεφλουδίζουμε πριν το βράσιμο για να μην τραβήξουν νερό.

Βράζουμε τις πατάτες για περίπου 35 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν. Τις ελέγχουμε τρυπώντας τες με ένα πιρούνι· αν τρυπιούνται εύκολα, είναι έτοιμες. Τις στραγγίζουμε σε σουρωτήρι και τις αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν ελαφρά.

Όταν μπορούμε να τις πιάσουμε, τις ξεφλουδίζουμε, τις κόβουμε σε κομμάτια και τις αφήνουμε για περίπου 5 λεπτά να πέσει η θερμοκρασία τους. Είναι σημαντικό να μην είναι καυτές όταν προστεθούν ο ταραμάς και το κρεμμύδι.
Μεταφέρουμε τις πατάτες στον κάδο του μίξερ ή στο μπλέντερ και τις πολτοποιούμε.
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι, τον χυμό λεμονιού και τον ταραμά και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Με το μίξερ σε λειτουργία, ρίχνουμε σταδιακά το λάδι σε λεπτή ροή, μέχρι να δέσει το μείγμα και να αποκτήσει κρεμώδη υφή.
Προσθέτουμε το νερό και χτυπάμε για λίγο ακόμα, μέχρι η ταραμοσαλάτα να γίνει ανάλαφρη και αφράτη, σαν μους.
Αδειάζουμε την ταραμοσαλάτα σε μπολ, δοκιμάζουμε και προσαρμόζουμε, αν χρειάζεται, το λεμόνι ή το λάδι σύμφωνα με την προτίμησή μας.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε τον ψιλοκομμένο άνηθο και ανακατεύουμε απαλά.

taramosalata.name: Taramosalata
instructions: Place bread in a bowl, cover with water and let sit until the bread is well soaked, 5 to 10 minutes. Drain water from the bowl and squeeze all of the excess water from the bread.
Combine bread, olive oil, onion, and lemon juice in a food processor; process until smooth. Add tarama and process until well combined.

taramosalata-of-argyros-argiro.name: Taramosalata Of Argyros
instructions: Κόβουμε το μπαγιάτικο ψωμί σε κομμάτια και το βάζουμε σε ένα μπολ.
Σκεπάζουμε με άφθονο νερό και τοποθετούμε από πάνω ένα βάρος (π.χ. πιάτο), ώστε να μείνει πλήρως βυθισμένο και να μουλιάσει καλά.
Μουλιάζουμε και την κόρα, καθώς προσθέτει έξτρα γεύση.
Αφήνουμε για περίπου 20 λεπτά.
Στραγγίζουμε το ψωμί πολύ καλά, πιέζοντάς το με τα χέρια ώστε να φύγει όλη η περίσσεια υγρασία.
Ρίχνουμε το ψωμί στον κάδο του μίξερ (ή του πολυκόφτη).
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε κομμάτια και τον ταραμά.
Χτυπάμε καλά μέχρι να πολτοποιηθεί πλήρως το μείγμα και να μην φαίνονται κομμάτια ψωμιού ή κρεμμυδιού.
Προσθέτουμε τον φρεσκοστυμμένο χυμό λεμονιού και ξαναχτυπάμε το μείγμα μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Με το μίξερ σε λειτουργία, ρίχνουμε το λάδι σιγά-σιγά με σταθερή ροή, σαν “κλωστή”, για να «δέσει» σωστά η ταραμοσαλάτα και να αποκτήσει κρεμώδη υφή.
Προσθέτουμε λίγο νερό σταδιακά, μέχρι να πετύχουμε την επιθυμητή υφή (ούτε πολύ πηχτή, ούτε πολύ ρευστή).
Ανακατεύουμε λίγο ψιλοκομμένο άνηθο μέσα στο μείγμα, αν μας αρέσει.
Δοκιμάζουμε και αν θέλουμε, προσθέτουμε λίγο επιπλέον λεμόνι για πιο όξινη γεύση.
Μια-δυο κουταλιές ελαιόλαδο στο τέλος προσθέτουν έξτρα άρωμα και νοστιμιά.
Σερβίρουμε την ταραμοσαλάτα κρύα, απλώνοντας την ποσότητα με ένα κουτάλι σε πιάτο.
Ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και γαρνίρουμε προαιρετικά με φρέσκο άνηθο ή ελιές.
Συνοδεύεται ιδανικά με φρέσκο ψωμί, κρίθινα παξιμάδια ή πίτες.
Η σπιτική ταραμοσαλάτα διατηρείται στο ψυγείο, σε γυάλινο δοχείο με καπάκι, για αρκετές ημέρες. Ανακατέψτε καλά πριν το σερβίρισμα.

tarascan-bean-soup-comedera.name: Tarascan Bean Soup

ingredients.item: 600 gr de jitomates o tomates rojos grandes.
1 cucharadita cafetera de pimienta negra molida

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar bien los jitomates y los chiles anchos.
Tomaremos estos últimos, los cortaremos y retiraremos las semillas, las venas blancas y la cabeza. Entonces, los cortaremos en tiras.
En el caso de los jitomates, los cortaremos en trozos (no tienen que ser regulares, porque después vamos a cocinarlos).
Ahora, pelaremos la cebolla, retiraremos los extremos y la picaremos en cubitos pequeños. También pelaremos los dientes de ajo y los picaremos muy finamente, o los trituraremos.

Luego, calentaremos una sartén u olla grande, con un chorrito de aceite. Ahí freiremos los chiles durante unos 5 minutos, a fuego entre medio y alto, pero removiéndolos con frecuencia para que no se quemen.
Pasado el tiempo indicado, retiraremos los chiles del calor y los reservaremos.

Retomaremos la cocción en la sartén u olla, y si hace falta, agregaremos más aceite. Lo siguiente que haremos, ya con el aceite caliente, será cocinar el ajo y la cebolla, con el fuego entre medio y bajo.

Dejaremos que se cocinen unos cinco minutos. Mientras tanto, aprovecharemos para pasar los frijoles cocidos, los chiles que habíamos reservado y los jitomates –troceados - por un robot de cocina, para obtener un puré (reservaremos un poquito de los chiles fritos para la decoración).
Cuando las cebollas se empiecen a tornar transparentes, agregaremos el puré y lo freiremos.

Después de cinco minutos, verteremos el caldo de pollo y sazonaremos con la pimienta, el orégano, las dos hojas de laurel y un toque de sal al gusto. También agregaremos el epazote, bien lavado, si hemos decidido utilizarlo.
Mezclaremos un dejaremos que la sopa hierva. Cuando alcance esté punto, nos aseguraremos de que el fuego quede muy bajo, y la dejaremos cocinarse durante veinte minutos, tapada.

Mientras la sopa tarasca se cocina, aprovecharemos para preparar las tortillas. Las cortaremos en tiras y calentaremos una sartén, a fuego medio, con un poquito de aceite. Freiremos las tiras durante algunos minutos, pero sin abusar, para que no se endurezcan. El objetivo es solamente que se doren.
Al retirar las tortillas de la sartén, las dejaremos en un plato cubierto con una hoja de papel absorbente, para retirar el exceso de grasa.

Una vez pasado el tiempo de cocción de la sopa, probaremos la sazón, y si hace falta, la corregiremos con más sal, pimienta o hierbas. También podemos retirar las hierbas, o sino, simplemente estaremos atentos a que el laurel y el epazote no se pasen a los platos donde la serviremos.
Guarda algunos trocitos de tortilla para colocarlos en la superficie de la sopa, con los trocitos de chile reservados anteriormente.

tarator-bulgarian-cold-yogurt-and-cucumb.name: Tarator (bulgarian Cold Yogurt And Cucumber Soup)
tarator-bulgarian-cold-yogurt-and-cucumb.original_name: Tarator (sopa fría de yogur y pepino búlgara)

ingredients.item: 500 g de yogur natural (aproximadamente 2 vasos grandes)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 cucharada de vinagre o zumo de limón
1 cucharada de eneldo fresco picado (puede ser seco)

instructions: Pelamos el pepino, lo rallamos o picamos muy fino y lo dejamos escurrir un poco si suelta mucho líquido. Machacamos el ajo en un mortero con un poco de sal hasta que quede una pasta.

En un bol grande, mezclamos el yogur con el agua fría hasta que tenga una textura más líquida, como la de una sopa ligera. Añadimos el pepino picado, el ajo, el vinagre o limón, las nueces (si usamos), el aceite y el eneldo.
Removemos bien y ajustamos la sal. Dejamos enfriar en la nevera al menos una hora antes de servir. Si lo queremos más líquido, podemos añadir un poco más de agua fría justo antes de llevar a la mesa.

tarator-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Tarator Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 dilim bayat ekmek (ufalanmış veya rondodan geçirilmiş)
1-2 yemek kaşığı ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanoz

instructions: 1. Bayat ekmeği ufalayın veya rondoda ince hale getirin.
2. Yoğurdu derin bir kaseye alın.
3.  Üzerine ezilmiş sarımsak, mayonez ve zeytinyağını ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
4. Bayat ekmek kırıntılarını, limon suyunu, tuzu ve karabiberi ekleyin.
5.  Tüm malzemeler iyice özdeşleşene kadar karıştırın.
6. İsterseniz ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanozla sosu tatlandırabilirsiniz.
7. Hazırladığınız tarator sosunu buzdolabında en az 30 dakika dinlendirin.
8.  Soğuk servis yapın.
