instructions: Three 8”-diameter cake pans with 2” sides; a candy thermometer; a pastry bag; a large star piping tip

Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Butter and flour cake pans. Line bottom of pans with parchment-paper rounds; butter paper. Pulse 2½ cups flour and almonds in a food processor until almonds are finely ground. Transfer to a medium bowl and whisk in baking powder and salt; set aside.

Combine milk and vanilla in a measuring cup; set aside. Using an electric mixer, beat 2 cups sugar and 1 cup butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. Add egg yolks and continue to beat, occasionally scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until pale yellow and fluffy, 4–5 minutes. Add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with milk mixture in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. (Do not overmix or cake will dome and be dense.)

Using an electric mixer with clean, dry beaters, whip egg whites in a medium bowl until light and frothy. With mixer running, gradually add remaining ½ cup sugar. Beat meringue until medium peaks form, 3–4 minutes.

Fold ¼ of meringue into batter just until incorporated (this will lighten batter, making it easier to fold in remaining meringue). Gently fold in remaining meringue until fully incorporated. Divide batter evenly among prepared pans. Smooth tops.

Bake cakes, rotating from left to right and top to bottom halfway through, until golden brown and the sides of cakes begin to pull away from pans, 40–45 minutes. Transfer to wire racks. Let cakes cool in pans for 10 minutes. Invert cakes onto racks; peel off parchment and let cool completely.

If needed, use a long serrated knife to trim dome from each cake (about ⅛”) to create a flat surface. DO AHEAD: Cakes can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and store at room temperature.
Place 2 tsp. cold water in a small bowl; sprinkle gelatin over. Let stand until gelatin softens, about 10 minutes.

Whisk lemon juice, sugar, and eggs in a medium metal bowl; place over a large saucepan of simmering water and cook, whisking constantly, until mixture thickens, 5–6 minutes. (Do not allow bottom of bowl to touch the water or mixture will cook too fast and eggs may scramble.)
Remove bowl from heat and transfer mixture to a blender. With blender running, add butter 1 piece at a time until butter is completely incorporated. Add softened gelatin and blend 30 seconds longer.
Transfer lemon curd to a medium bowl and place a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface of the curd. Chill until cold and set, 3–4 hours or overnight.

Using an electric mixer, beat chilled cream in another medium bowl until soft peaks form (warm cream will not whip up). Add powdered sugar. Continue to beat until medium peaks form, 2–3 minutes. Whisk curd to loosen; gently fold in whipped cream; set aside. DO AHEAD: Lemon cream can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Bring ¾ cup sugar, salt, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Cook without stirring until candy thermometer registers 240°, 4–5 minutes.
Meanwhile, using an electric mixer, beat egg whites in a medium bowl until light and frothy (be sure to keep a close eye on the sugar syrup). Beat in remaining 2 Tbsp. sugar and cream of tartar.

With mixer running, gradually add hot syrup in a thin stream, allowing syrup to drizzle down side of bowl into egg whites. Beat until egg whites are tripled in volume and meringue is very fluffy, cool, and opaque white, about 12 minutes with a stand mixer and up to 20 minutes with a hand mixer. (Frosting made with a hand mixer may not be as firm as that made with a stand mixer.) Add vanilla and mix 1 minute longer. Use meringue immediately.
Fill a pastry bag fitted with large star tip halfway with prepared meringue.

Place 1 cake layer on a cake stand or platter. Spread ⅓ cup strawberry jam over, leaving a 1” border around edge. Spread ⅓ cup lemon cream over jam, keeping 1” border. Pipe a ring of meringue frosting over 1” border around edge. Place second cake layer atop meringue, pressing slightly to adhere. Repeat process with second cake layer, jam, lemon cream, and meringue. (Cover and chill remaining lemon cream for another use.) Place remaining layer on top. Using offset spatula, generously spread remaining meringue frosting on top layer of cake. Chill up to 4 hours.

the-tostada-that-wants-to-be-a-memela.name: The Tostada That Wants To Be A Memela

ingredients.item: Toasted chile de árbol and tomatillo salsa

instructions: Place beans, onion, garlic, epazote, and bay leaf in a large pot. Pour in water to cover by 3" and bring to a simmer; cook, uncovered, until beans are very tender, 2–2½ hours.

Drain beans, reserving cooking liquid. Pluck out epazote and bay leaf and transfer beans to a large bowl. Using a potato masher, crush beans, adding ¾ cup of the cooking liquid a few tablespoons at a time, until a coarse texture forms. There should still be some bits of beans visible. Season with salt. If using avocado leaves, grind in a mortar and pestle or spice mill; mix into beans.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add beans (be careful as oil may bubble and spit at you) and fry, undisturbed, 2 minutes. Stir and fry for another 2 minutes. Repeat process two more times, scraping up any browned bits. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Remove beans from heat.

Toast a tortilla in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until golden brown in spots but not crunchy, about 2 minutes. Turn; toast on other side, another minute or so. Spread a thin layer of fat over one side of tortilla (about 1 tsp.). Spread 2 Tbsp. bean mixture over; sprinkle with one-quarter of 3 oz. queso fresco. Cook until edges of tortilla curl up a bit and beans are warmed through, about 2 minutes. Repeat process with 7 more tortillas.
Top tortillas with rajas or chorizo and eggs and more queso fresco if desired. Serve with salsa.

Roast poblanos over an open flame, rotating occasionally, until charred and blistered all over, 10–12 minutes. (Or broil on a rimmed baking sheet 8–10 minutes). Remove stems, skins, and seeds. Slice flesh into ½” strips.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion and garlic and season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and softened, 10–12 minutes. Mix in chiles and oregano; taste and season with more salt. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until flavors meld and vegetables are very soft, 5–8 minutes. Keep warm until ready to serve.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Cook chorizo, using a spoon or heatproof spatula to break up any large pieces, until cooked through and starting to brown, 5–8 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Sprinkle some salt onto the skillet. Crack eggs onto salt and immediately break yolks. Cook until underside is starting to brown, about 1 minute. Turn eggs and cook another 30 seconds (yolk won’t be entirely runny but shouldn’t be cooked through, either).

the-troy-monson.name: The Troy Monson
instructions: Bring sugar, fennel seeds, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Reduce heat to low and simmer, swirling occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 4 minutes. Let cool, then strain into a small bowl; discard solids.

For each cocktail, combine 2 oz. vodka, 1½ oz. blood orange juice, 1 oz. lemon juice, and ½ oz. reserved fennel syrup in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a rocks glass filled with cracked ice and garnish with 1 fennel slice.

the-ultimate-gluten-free-chocolate-cake-.name: The Ultimate Gluten-free Chocolate Cake
the-ultimate-gluten-free-chocolate-cake-.original_name: Το απόλυτο κέικ σοκολάτας χωρίς γλουτένη

ingredients.item: 300 grσοκολάτα (60% περιεκτικότητα σε κακάο ή παρόμοια)
300 grσοκολάτα (60% περιεκτικότητα σε κακάο ή παρόμοια)

instructions: Ψιλοκόβουμε τη σοκολάτα και τη λιώνουμε σε μπεν μαρί. Αφήνουμε στην άκρη να κρυώσει ελαφρά.
Προθερμαίνουμε τον φούρνο στους 160°C στον αέρα. Βουτυρώνουμε μια φόρμα δαχτυλίδι με αποσπώμενη βάση 23 ή 25 εκ. και πασπαλίζουμε με κακάο ή στρώνουμε αντικολλητικό χαρτί στη βάση.
Σε πολύ καθαρό κάδο μίξερ, με καθαρά εργαλεία, ρίχνουμε τα ασπράδια και χτυπάμε με σύρμα σε μεσαία προς δυνατή ταχύτητα για 3–4 λεπτά, μέχρι να σχηματιστεί σώμα.
Προσθέτουμε σταδιακά τη μισή ζάχαρη και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα για 2 λεπτά, μέχρι η μαρέγκα να γυαλίσει και να γίνει σατινέ. Αφαιρούμε τη μαρέγκα σε μπολ και κρατάμε στην άκρη.
Στον κάδο του μίξερ χτυπάμε το μαλακό βούτυρο με το σύρμα για λίγα λεπτά, μέχρι να αφρατέψει.
Προσθέτουμε σταδιακά την υπόλοιπη ζάχαρη και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα για 4–5 λεπτά, μέχρι να λιώσει η ζάχαρη και να σχηματιστεί κρεμώδης υφή.
Προσθέτουμε τους κρόκους έναν-έναν, τη βανίλια και το αλάτι. Όταν ομογενοποιηθούν, προσθέτουμε το αλεσμένο αμύγδαλο και τη λιωμένη σοκολάτα και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Με σπάτουλα, αναδιπλώνουμε προσεκτικά τη μαρέγκα στο μείγμα σοκολάτας, προσέχοντας να μην χάσουμε τον όγκο της μαρέγκας.
Αδειάζουμε το μείγμα στη φόρμα και ψήνουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα για περίπου 45 λεπτά, μέχρι να σταθεροποιηθεί το κέντρο και να μην είναι ρευστό.
Βγάζουμε το κέικ από τον φούρνο και το αφήνουμε να σταθεί 1 ώρα να κρυώσει τελείως πριν το ξεφορμάρουμε.
Σερβίρεται σκέτο, με γκανάζ ή καραμελωμένα καρύδια.

the-vespa.name: The Vespa
instructions: Combine 1 ounce London dry gin, 1 ounce vodka, and 1/2 ounce Cocchi Americano (Italian aperitif wine) in a large glass. Fill with ice and stir until glass is very cold, about 1 minute. Strain into a chilled stemmed cocktail glass. Garnish with a grapefruit twist.

the-viral-air-fryer-broccoli-recipe-that.name: The Viral Air Fryer Broccoli Recipe That's Making Everyone Repeat
the-viral-air-fryer-broccoli-recipe-that.original_name: La receta viral de brócoli en freidora de aire que está haciendo que todo el mundo repita

ingredients.item: 2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
½ cucharadita de ajo en polvo
½ cucharadita de cebolla en polvo
Opcional: pimentón picante o chile en polvo

instructions: Lavamos el brócoli y lo cortamos en ramilletes medianos. Pelamos el tronco y lo cortamos en bastones. Secamos bien todo el brócoli con papel de cocina. Este paso es clave para que quede crujiente.

En un bol grande mezclamos el brócoli con las 2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva, 1 cucharadita de pimentón dulce, el ajo en polvo, la cebolla en polvo, el comino, la sal y la pimienta. Removemos bien con las manos hasta que todas las piezas queden bien cubiertas.
Colocamos el brócoli en la cesta de la freidora de aire, sin amontonarlo demasiado.
Cocinamos a 190 ºC durante 12–15 minutos, sacando la cesta a mitad para remover. Si lo queremos más dorado y crujiente, añadimos 2 minutos extra al final.
Servimos caliente.

the-waffle.name: The Waffle
instructions: Preheat a waffle iron to medium-high.

In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Make a well in the center and pour in the milk, buttermilk, melted butter, vanilla, and egg yolks. Whisk until the batter just comes together (there will be some lumps).

Add the egg whites to a medium bowl and beat with an electric hand mixer until foamy. With the mixer running, gradually add the sugar and continue beating until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter until just combined.

Spray the heated waffle iron with nonstick cooking spray. Ladle the batter into the waffle iron, close the lid, and cook according to manufacturer’s instructions until the waffle is golden brown and crisp, 5–6 minutes. Transfer the waffle to a plate and repeat with the remaining batter.
Serve the waffles hot, with butter and maple syrup alongside.
Enjoy!

the-warm-lentil-and-egg-salad-that-solve.name: The Warm Lentil And Egg Salad That Solves Your Meal In 20 Minutes
the-warm-lentil-and-egg-salad-that-solve.original_name: La ensalada templada de lentejas y huevo que te soluciona la comida en 20 minutos

ingredients.item: 400 g de lentejas de bote cocidas (2 vasos aprox.)
150 g de setas de cardo (o de la variedad que elijas)
1 puñado de rúcula y brotes verdes
30 g de cacahuetes tostados (3 cucharadas aprox.)
20 g de pipas de girasol (2 cucharadas)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Lavamos y escurrimos bien 400 g de lentejas cocidas bajo el grifo y las ponemos en un bol amplio.

Cortamos 150 g de setas de cardo en dados o trozos gruesos. En una sartén con 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva las salteamos durante 4-5 minutos, hasta que estén doradas. Añadimos una pizca de sal y reservamos.
Picamos fina 1 cebolleta y la añadimos a las lentejas.
Incorporamos 30 g de cacahuetes tostados y 20 g de semillas de girasol.
Para añadir algo de picante, cortamos ½ chile rojo fresco en rodajitas finas y lo añadimos a la ensalada.
Añadimos las setas salteadas y mezclamos suavemente.
Preparamos el aliño mezclando 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva, 1 cucharada de vinagre, sal y pimienta negra. Lo vertemos sobre las lentejas y removemos.

Para el huevo pochado podemos hacerlo de la forma clásica, pero yo prefiero hacerlo en microondas. Para ello llenamos un vaso o cuenco apto para microondas con 200 ml de agua, añadimos 1 huevo y pinchamos ligeramente la yema con un palillo. Cubrimos con un plato y cocinamos 40-50 segundos a 800 W. Si la clara aún está algo transparente, añadimos 10-15 segundos más.
Colocamos la ensalada de lentejas en un plato, añadimos las hojas verdes por encima y terminamos colocando el huevo pochado en el centro justo antes de servir.

the-witty-comeback.name: The Witty Comeback
instructions: Combine rye, Averna, lemon juice, and ginger simple syrup in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass or a rocks glass filled with ice and garnish with orange twist.

the-world-of-rice-salads.name: The World Of Rice Salads

ingredients.item: Or 1/2 large red or yellow bell pepper

ingredients.prep: made with extra virgin olive oil and red wine vinegar, plus more as needed

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Put the rice and all the vegetables in a large bowl. Drizzle with vinaigrette and use two big forks to combine, fluffing the rice and tossing gently to separate the grains.

Stir in the parsley, taste, and adjust the seasoning or moisten with a little more dressing. Serve at room temperature or refrigerate for up to a day, bringing the salad back to room temperature before serving.

Rice Salad, Japanese Style: Use brown or white short-grain rice. Halve the amount of celery and carrot and finely chop them or shred them on a grater. Add 1 cup cubed firm tofu (preferably baked). Instead of the vinaigrette, toss with 1/4 cup or so of Simple Miso Dipping Sauce (made by whisking together 6 tablespoons miso paste, 3/4 cup warm water or sake, 1 teaspoon sugar, 1 tablespoon mirin or honey, 1 tablespoon rice vinegar plus more to taste, and salt to taste). Instead of the parsley, crumble 2 sheets of nori over the rice salad and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons black or white sesame seeds.

Rice Salad, Mexican Style: Long-grain or medium-grain, white or brown, all work well here. When blending the vinaigrette, add 1 tablespoon chili powder and 2 tablespoons Mexican crema or mayonnaise. Instead of celery and carrot, add 1 cup chopped fresh tomato. Substitute chopped fresh cilantro for the parsley and, at the same time, add 2 chopped hard-cooked eggs and chopped jalapeño chiles if you like. Serve with lime wedges.

Rice Salad, Indian Style: Use brown or white basmati rice. When making the vinaigrette, use rice wine vinegar, replace the oil with coconut milk, and add 1 tablespoon curry powder, or more to taste. Instead of the bell pepper, celery, and carrot, add 1/2 cup each cubed cooked potato, cooked cauliflower florets, and green peas (cooked frozen are fine). Substitute cilantro for the parsley.

Citrus Rice Salad: Use any rice. Instead of red wine vinegar, make the vinaigrette with freshly squeezed citrus juice—choose from lemon, lime, orange, blood orange, tangerine, pink grapefruit, or a combination. Whatever you use, add 2 tablespoons of the grated zest and 1 tablespoon of sugar or honey to the blender. Do not include the scallion or the vegetables. (You might want to use a little less dressing.) Instead of the parsley, use mint if you like. A handful of chopped almonds or pecans make a nice addition.

Tomato Rice Salad: Use any kind of brown or white rice. When making the vinaigrette, eliminate the vinegar and add 1 medium tomato to the blender. Instead of the scallion and other vegetables, add 2 cups chopped fresh tomato (a mixture of heirloom varieties is nice).Instead of the parsley, use chopped fresh basil or mint, or 1/4 cup chopped fresh chives, chervil, dill, or about a tablespoon of fresh thyme leaves.

the-worlds-greatest-crab.name: The World's Greatest Crab
instructions: Whisk butter, olive oil, and garlic together in a bowl until well combined; generously brush onto crab.
Cook crab on the preheated grill, turning once, until the shell just begins to brown, about 5 to 6 minutes.
Serve with lemon and more melted butter if you like, enjoy!

thepla-with-vaghareli-dahi.name: Thepla With Vaghareli Dahi

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Indian green chile or serrano chile

instructions: Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Once oil is shimmering, cook cumin seeds until fragrant and oil around seeds starts to sputter, about 2 minutes. Add garlic and asafetida, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook, stirring, until garlic is golden brown, about 1 minute. Remove pan from heat and stir in red chili powder. Pour over reserved seasoned yogurt and mix well.

Using your fingers, rub together flour and 1 Tbsp. oil in the bowl of a stand mixer until well combined, about 1 minute. (This will help the thepla stay soft after cooking.) Add sesame seeds, salt, ajwain seeds, cumin seeds, turmeric, and asafetida and mix well. Then mix in chile, garlic, and ginger, followed by spinach. Add ½ cup room-temperature water and mix with your hands or a large spoon, adding more water by the tablespoon as needed, until a shaggy dough forms.

Fit bowl onto stand mixer and attach dough hook. Mix dough on medium-low, scraping down sides of bowl once or twice, 5 minutes. Transfer dough to a clean surface; gather with your hands and knead dough, adding more water a tablespoonful at a time if it feels too dry, until you have a semi-stiff dough. Knead dough another minute, then form into a ball. Coat dough with a little oil and place back into bowl and cover with a kitchen towel. Let sit 15 minutes.

Heat a large nonstick or cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Divide and roll dough into about 20 walnut-size balls (about 40 g each). Rub your work surface and rolling pin with a little oil (about 1 tsp. total). Working with 1 ball at a time and keeping the rest covered, flatten balls against work surface, then roll, rotating occasionally for an even shape, into 6"-diameter rounds, about ⅛" thick. Cook thepla in skillet 1 minute, then flip and brush with a little bit of oil. Cook 30 seconds, flip, and cook another 30 seconds. Continue cooking, turning every 30 seconds, until thepla is browned in spots on both sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a paper-towel-lined plate.
Serve spinach thepla with vaghareli dahi alongside.

theras-canadian-fried-dough.name: Thera's Canadian Fried Dough
instructions: Mix together warm water, yeast, and 1 pinch white sugar in a large bowl; let sit until creamy, about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, grease a separate large bowl and set it aside.

Stir warm milk, eggs, 1/3 cup vegetable oil, 1/3 cup white sugar, salt, and vanilla into yeast mixture until sugar is dissolved. Stir in 2 1/2 cups flour until no dry spots remain. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead in remaining flour, 1/2 cup at a time, until dough is no longer sticky. Knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
Form dough into a ball and place it into the prepared bowl. Cover with a towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.

Punch down dough and knead a few times to reshape it. Pinch off a piece of dough about the size of an egg, then roll into an oval shape, about 1/4-inch thick. Place on a dish towel, cover with another dish towel, and repeat with remaining dough.
Heat 4 inches oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Make cinnamon sugar: Combine white sugar and cinnamon in a shallow dish or pie plate; set aside.

Lower dough carefully into hot oil in batches and fry until golden brown, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Gently press fried dough into cinnamon sugar while still warm; shake off excess sugar.

thermidor-lobster-step-by-step-comedera.name: Thermidor Lobster Step By Step
instructions: Ponemos en una olla 2 litros de agua a fuego medio alto, agregamos 1 cucharada de sal. Añadimos las langostas y dejamos cocer según peso de las langostas (15 minutos por kilo).
Retiramos del agua de cocción, las partimos por la mitad, en sentido longitudinal, desechando la cabeza y la cola. Extraemos su carne, la picamos, y reservamos tanto esta como las conchas vacías.

Derretimos la mantequilla en una sartén. Rehogamos la cebolla bien picadita, y cuando se dore, incorporamos la carne de langosta. Salpimentamos y añadimos también las 2 cucharadas de coñac, y 1 cucharada de mostaza  y cocinamos a fuego suave, durante 5 minutos. Rellenamos las conchas con la langosta cocida.
En un refractario apto para horno, ponemos las langosta para darle el toque final antes de gratinarlas. En este momento ponemos a precalentar el horno a 200°C.
Vertemos la salsa bechamel sobre las langostas. Finalmente, espolvoreamos los dos tipos de queso rallado y el perejil, y gratinamos la langosta thermidor, durante unos 20 minutos.
Servimos caliente con lo que gustes acompañar.

thermomix-blackberry-jam-pequerecetas.name: Thermomix Blackberry Jam

ingredients.item: El zumo de un limón entero

instructions: Lava las moras con cuidado para eliminar cualquier suciedad o impurezas. Escúrrelas bien y retira los tallos si es necesario.
Coloca las moras en el vaso de la Thermomix junto con el zumo de limón y el agua. Programa la Thermomix a velocidad 2, temperatura 100°C, durante 20 minutos.

Pasados los 20 minutos, agrega el azúcar al vaso y programa nuevamente a velocidad 2, temperatura 100°C, durante 20-25 minutos más. La mermelada debe cocinarse hasta que adquiera una textura espesa y brillante.

Mientras se cocina la mermelada, esteriliza los frascos de cristal donde la vas a guardar. Puedes hacerlo hirviéndolos en agua durante unos minutos o colocándolos en el horno a baja temperatura durante unos 15 minutos.

Una vez que la mermelada haya alcanzado la consistencia deseada, viértela caliente en los frascos esterilizados y ciérralos bien. Deja enfriar los frascos a temperatura ambiente y luego guárdalos en el refrigerador.

thermomix-fried-milk-traditional-carniva.name: Thermomix Fried Milk (traditional Carnival Recipe)
thermomix-fried-milk-traditional-carniva.original_name: Leche frita Thermomix (receta tradicional de Carnaval)

ingredients.item: 80 g de harina fina de maíz o maicena (puedes comprar aquí)
Aceite de oliva virgen o virgen extra

instructions: Ponemos la leche en el vaso de Thermomix junto con la piel de naranja y la piel de limón. Programamos 8 minutos, 100°C, velocidad 1. Colamos y reservamos.

Ponemos en el vaso la maizena, los huevos, la canela molida y el azúcar. Programamos 10 segundos, velocidad 3. Añadimos la leche que teníamos reservada y programamos 10 segundos, velocidad 8. Volvemos a programar 4 minutos, 100°C, velocidad 4. Ponemos la mezcla en un molde rectangular enmantecado, nivelamos bien con una espátula, cubrimos con film de cocina y llevamos a la nevera por lo menos 2 horas, aunque si son más mejor.

Pasado el tiempo de reposo en el frigorífico, con un cuchillo cortamos cuadrados. Los rebozamos primero en harina y luego en huevo batido. Mientras cortamos y rebozamos vamos a poner a calentar una olla o cazuela con abundante aceite. La temperatura ideal que debe alcanzar es alrededor de 180°C, podéis controlarlo con un termómetro de cocina como este.
Cuando el aceite esté caliente, vamos friendo los cuadrados en tandas, hasta que estén dorados.
Retiramos y dejamos escurrir sobre papel absorbente para eliminar el exceso de aceite.
Mientras están todavía calientes, rebozamos en una mezcla de azúcar y canela.

thermomix-lemon-cake-recipe-without-oven.name: Thermomix Lemon Cake ( Recipe Without Oven)
thermomix-lemon-cake-recipe-without-oven.original_name: Tarta de limón Thermomix (receta fácil sin horno)

ingredients.item: 200 ml de nata para montar (crema del leche)
1 sobre (85 g) de gelatina de limón
500 g de queso para untar (tipo philadelphia)

instructions: En el vaso limpio y seco trituramos los bizcochos, 5 segundos en velocidad 7. Reservamos en un cuenco. Vertemos la mantequilla fundida en el cuenco de los bizcochos y mezclamos hasta que se impregnen bien. Forramos la base del molde desmontable con papel para hornear. Vertemos la mezcla de bizcochos y mantequilla, distribuimos bien en el molde y llevamos a la nevera.

Ponemos la mariposa en las cuchillas y vertemos la nata bien fría en el vaso limpio. Programamos a velocidad 3 y ½ sin tiempo, cuando vemos que la nata se montó la retiramos y reservamos en la nevera.

En el vaso limpio, calentamos el agua programando 4 minutos, varoma, velocidad 1. Añadimos la gelatina y mezclamos 1 minuto, sin temperatura, velocidad 2. Comprobamos que se haya disuelto bien y volcamos en un recipiente.

En el vaso limpio vertemos el queso y el azúcar. Programamos 10 segundos en velocidad 3. Añadimos el zumo de limón y la gelatina y programamos 10 segundos, velocidad 3. Mezclamos la crema que acabamos de preparar con la nata, haciendo movimientos suaves y envolventes con una espátula.
Vertemos la crema sobre la base y dejamos cuajar toda la noche. Para desmoldar pasamos un cuchillo por el borde.

thermomix-sweet-pumpkin-muffins-pequerec.name: Thermomix Sweet Pumpkin Muffins

ingredients.item: 300 g de puré de calabaza (aprox. 400 g de calabaza cruda)
500 g de harina de fuerza (4 tazas)
7 g de levadura seca de panadería (1 sobre)
½ cucharadita de canela en polvo
Un poco de leche para pintar los panecillos
Almendras o ramitas de canela para decorar el tallo

instructions: Colocamos 400 g de calabaza cocida en el vaso y trituramos 10 seg / vel 5.
Añadimos 100 ml de leche, 7 g de levadura y 1 cucharadita de azúcar. Mezclamos 2 min / 37 ºC / vel 2.
Agregamos el puré reservado, la miel, el azúcar, la mantequilla, el huevo, la vainilla, la canela y la sal. Mezclamos 15 seg / vel 4.
Añadimos los 500 g de harina y amasamos 3 min / modo espiga.
Dejamos levar la masa dentro del vaso cerrado durante 1 hora o hasta que doble su tamaño.

Sacamos la masa, la desgasificamos y formamos 10 bolitas. Para darles forma de calabaza, las atamos suavemente con hilo de cocina en 8 secciones. Las colocamos sobre papel de horno y dejamos reposar 30 minutos tapadas con un paño.
Pincelamos con leche y horneamos a 180 ºC (calor arriba y abajo) durante 18-20 minutos.
Quitamos los cordeles cortando con una tijera. Pincelamos con un poco más de leche o huevo batido y horneamos 5 minutos más, hasta que estén dorados.
Una vez frías, colocamos una almendra o un trocito de ramita de canela en el centro para simular el tallo de la calabaza. Servimos calientes o fríos.

thermomix-zucchini-cream-2-and-very-deli.name: Thermomix Zucchini Cream (2 And Very Delicious Recipes)
thermomix-zucchini-cream-2-and-very-deli.original_name: Crema de calabacín Thermomix (2 recetas fáciles y muy ricas)
instructions: Partimos los calabacines en trozos grandes, con la piel, y los ponemos en el vaso junto con la patata en cascos, la cebolla y el aceite.
Programamos 10 minutos, Varoma, velocidad 2, sin cubilete.
Añadimos el agua y programamos 20 minutos, Varoma, velocidad 2, con cubilete.
Finalmente, añadimos el queso, la sal y la pimienta y trituramos 1 minuto en velocidad 8.

these-lemon-ones-teleculinaria.name: These Lemon Ones
instructions: Numa tigela, bata bem os ovos, a gema e o açúcar. Adicione depois a farinha e a raspa de limão e bata mais um pouco. Coloque num saco de pasteleiro com boquilha redonda lisa média.
Unte um tabuleiro de forno com manteiga. Disponha-lhe porções de massa, bem separadas umas das outras e fazendo o efeito de ""esse"". Deixe repousar durante cerca de 30 minutos.
Leve depois ao forno pré-aquecido a 200ºc entre 10 e 15 minutos ou até ficarem cozidos. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

these-spicy-beef-lettuce-cups-are-a-hit-.name: These Spicy Beef Lettuce Cups Are A Hit Any Night Of The Week
instructions: Trim scallions on both ends and thinly slice crosswise. Set aside about 3 Tbsp. sliced scallions for serving.
Separate Bibb lettuce leaves. If necessary, rinse leaves to remove dirt and pat dry with paper towels. Chill leaves until ready to use.
Thinly slice cucumbers crosswise on a diagonal. Chill until ready to use.
Halve avocado and remove pit. Use a spoon to scoop flesh from skin, discard skin, and cut avocado into ¼”-thick slices.
Cut lime in half crosswise and cut one of the halves into wedges (reserve for serving). Squeeze second half of the lime over avocado; set aside.
Heat olive oil in a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Add remaining sliced scallions and cook, stirring occasionally with wooden spoon, until tender and golden, about 4 minutes.
Add beef and break up into small pieces with wooden spoon. Let cook, undisturbed, until first side is browned, about 5 minutes.

While meat is cooking, stir ½ cup mayonnaise and 3 Tbsp. Cholula Green Pepper Sauce in a small bowl and season lightly with salt; stir to combine then set aside. [NOTE: This amount of Cholula Green Pepper in the mayonnaise will give the mayonnaise a greenish tint.]

Season meat with 1 tsp. kosher salt and stir, breaking up even more with wooden spoon into small bits. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until meat is cooked all the way through, about 4 minutes longer.
Remove from heat and stir in 1 Tbsp. Cholula. Let cool slightly.

Build your lettuce cups: Dollop a bit of the spicy mayo into the center of each leaf, then place a slice of avocado and several slices of cucumber over top. Spoon several tablespoons beef mixture into each leaf.
Sprinkle lettuce cups with reserved scallions and squeeze reserved lime wedges over top. Sprinkle lightly with more salt and top with several more shakes of Cholula Green Pepper.

thessaloniki-bun-with-tahini-argiro.name: Thessaloniki Bun With Tahini

ingredients.item: 1κύβο νωπής μαγιάς 25 γραμ. ή 1 φακελάκι ξηρή μαγιά
1κύβο νωπής μαγιάς 25 γραμ. ή 1 φακελάκι ξηρή μαγιά

instructions: Πρώτα ενεργοποιούμε τη μαγιά.
Τη διαλύουμε δηλαδή σε ένα μπολ, πασπαλίζουμε με λίγη ζάχαρη και ρίχνουμε το μισό νερό.
Ανακατεύουμε με ένα κουτάλι να διαλυθεί.
Σκεπάζουμε με μεμβράνη και αφήνουμε για 10 λεπτά να ενεργοποιηθεί.
Όταν αφρίσει η επιφάνεια είναι έτοιμη και την προσθέτουμε στο αλεύρι.
Βάζουμε στον κάδο του μίξερ το αλεύρι, το αλάτι και κάνουμε λακκούβα.
Προσθέτουμε την ενεργοποιημένη μαγιά, το υπόλοιπο νερό, το ταχίνι και τη μαργαρίνη.
Ζυμώνουμε σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα 3-4 λεπτά να ενωθούν τα υλικά  και μετα 4 λεπτά σε δυνατή ταχύτητα.
Σκεπάζουμε το μπολ του μίξερ και αφήνουμε τη ζύμη να ξεκουραστεί για 20 λεπτά.
Την ξαναζυμώνουμε δυνατά  με τον γάντζο του μίξερ για 4 λεπτά.
Μετα την αφηνουμε στον πάγκο μας.
Την χωρίζουμε σε 15 κομμάτια.
Στο μεταξύ έχουμε ζεστάνει το νερό (2 φλιτζάνια) με τη ζάχαρη, να λιώσει.
Αφήνουμε το νερό να κρυώσει καλά.
Πλάθουμε ένα ένα κομμάτι σε μπαστούνι λεπτό, μήκους 30 εκ., και το κλείνουμε σε στρογγυλο σχημα.
Πατάμε την ένωση να κολλήσει καλά.
Το βουτάμε ένα ένα  στο νερό με τη ζάχαρη και το κυλάμε σε μπόλικο σουσάμι.
Τα αραδιάζουμε  σε λαδωμένα ταψιά αραιά, γιατί φουσκώνουν.
Τα σκεπάζουμε και τ’ αφήνουμε για 30 λεπτά να ξεκουραστούν.
Τα ψεκάζουμε με λίγο νερό και τα ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C στον αέρα, για 15 λεπτά, να ροδίσουν και να ξεροψηθούν.

thick-n-tangy-mayo.name: Thick 'n Tangy Mayo
instructions: Beat egg yolks, vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, mustard, and salt together in a chilled bowl with an electric mixer. Increase the mixer speed to high and slowly pour oil into egg mixture, beating until mayonnaise is thick and creamy. Transfer mayonnaise to a jar and refrigerate until flavors blend, at least 1 hour.

thick-and-rich-venison-stroganoff.name: Thick And Rich Venison Stroganoff

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place venison in a large bowl. Stir in red wine, 1 teaspoon salt, and black pepper. Marinate for 10 minutes. Remove the venison; reserve the remaining marinade.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Stir in venison; cook and stir until browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Transfer to a plate. Drain and discard any remaining grease. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in the same skillet. Add onion and 1 pinch salt; cook and stir until onion is soft, about 5 minutes. Add garlic; cook until onion is translucent, about 4 minutes. Transfer mixture to a plate with the venison.

Melt 1/4 cup butter in the same skillet over medium heat. Whisk in flour; cook and stir until lightly browned, about 4 minutes. Slowly whisk in beef stock and water. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat to medium-low. Pour in the reserved red wine marinade, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and red pepper flakes. Add the venison and onion mixture. Cover and simmer, stirring every 20 minutes, until venison is tender, 1 to 2 hours.
Stir cream of mushroom soup and cream cheese into the skillet about 5 minutes before serving. Season with salt and pepper.

thick-chocolate-shake.name: Thick Chocolate Shake
instructions: In a blender, combine the ice cream, milk, chocolate drink mix and powdered egg whites. Cover, and blend until smooth. You may need to stop and stir once or twice to get it evenly mixed. The shake will be very thick.

thief-on-greaseproof-paper-argiro.name: Thief On Greaseproof Paper
instructions: Κόβουμε σε μερίδες μικρές το ξεκοκαλισμένο κρέας.
Βάζουμε το κρέας για το κλέφτικο στη λαδόκολλα σε μεγάλη μπασίνα και προσθέτουμε τα λαχανικά καθαρισμένα και κομμένα σε καρέ μεγάλα.
Ρίχνουμε το τυρί κομμένο σε καρέ, τα σκόρδα, τη ρίγανη, τη μουστάρδα, το ελαιόλαδο, το κρασί, αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά, σκεπάζουμε την μπασίνα και τη φυλάμε στο ψυγείο το λιγότερο για 2 ώρες, μέχρι να μαριναριστεί.
Απλώνουμε δύο μεγάλες λαδόκολλες και αδειάζουμε όλο το μείγμα.
Κλείνουμε σε μεγάλο πακέτο και δένουμε σφιχτά με σπάγκο.
Βάζουμε μέσα σε ταψί, χωρίς να προσθέσουμε στο ταψί νερό ή άλλο υλικό.
Ψήνουμε για 1 ώρα και 15 λεπτά στους 180°C.

thimble-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Thimble Soup Recipe
instructions: 1. Tencereye tereyağı ve sıvı yağı alın, yağlar eriyip ısındıktan sonra domates salçasını ekleyin.
2. Salçanın kokusu çıkana kadar kısık ateşte kavurun.
3. Sıcak suyu ekleyin ve karıştırarak kaynamaya bırakın.
4. Kaynayan çorbaya dondurulmuş mantıları ekleyin.
5.  Mantıların birbirine yapışmaması için karıştırın.
6. Ardından haşlanmış nohutu ilave edin.
7. Tuz, karabiber ve kuru naneyi ekleyip mantılar yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
8. Çorba kıvam aldıktan sonra ocaktan alın ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

thin-mint-martini.name: Thin Mint Martini
instructions: Drizzle chocolate syrup around the inside edge of a martini glass; place glass in the freezer.
Fill a cocktail shaker with ice; pour peppermint schnapps, chocolate liqueur, and cream into shaker. Cover, shake, and strain martini into the prepared martini glass.

thin-crust-fathead-pizza-dough.name: Thin-crust Fathead Pizza Dough
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Dissolve yeast in warm water in a bowl. Set aside for about 5 minutes.

Place mozzarella cheese into a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave for 90 seconds, stirring every 30 seconds until cheese is completely melted. Stir in yeast mixture and egg and stir to combine; mixture will not incorporate well at this point.

Stir in almond flour, xanthan gum, and salt. If mixture is difficult to mix, reheat in the microwave for 20-30 seconds to soften the cheese. Stir again until well incorporated. Using your hands, knead the dough for 2 minutes.
Place dough on baking sheet and press with your fingers into a thin crust, approximately 11-12 inches in diameter.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is lightly browned, about 10 minutes. Remove from oven, top with your favorite pizza toppings, and return to the oven for 5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.

thin-crust-pizza-with-roasted-mushrooms-.name: Thin-crust Pizza With Roasted Mushrooms And Smoked Bacon

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a nonstick baking sheet with foil.
Place tomatoes and mushrooms on the prepared baking sheet; drizzle with 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, turning halfway through. Remove from the oven and allow to cool to room temperature, about 25 minutes. Leave oven on.

Meanwhile, heat 1 1/2 tablespoons olive oil in a large, nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions, reduce heat to medium, and caramelize until golden brown and soft, turning occasionally, 15 to 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and a light drizzle of balsamic vinegar; set aside to cool.
Cook bacon on a paper towel-lined, microwave-safe plate on high heat at 1 to 2 minutes intervals until almost crisp. Coarsely chop.

Brush sides of the pizza crust with a thin layer of olive oil and place on a pizza pan. Spread Alfredo sauce evenly in a thin layer around the crust, leaving about 1/2 inch crust showing around the edge. Sprinkle with Fontina cheese. Spoon tomato-mushroom mixture over top, then caramelized onions. Sprinkle bacon and Gorgonzola crumbles over the vegetables.
Return to the oven and bake until the top is bubbly and starting to turn golden and the edges are golden brown, 15 to 18 minutes.

this-5-ingredient-lasagna-soup-is-so-and.name: This 5-ingredient Lasagna Soup Is So And You Can Make It Anytime

ingredients.item: Ground hot or mild italian sausage

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high. Add the sausage and cook, stirring often and breaking into small pieces, until browned, crumbled, and cooked through, 6 to 9 minutes. Adjust the heat as needed to prevent overbrowning.

Stir in the tomato sauce. Pour 1/2 cup of the water into the empty sauce jar, swirl to loosen any additional sauce, and add to the Dutch oven. Add the salt and remaining 4 1/2 cups water, scraping the bottom of the pot to dissolve any browned bits, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Add the lasagna noodles, reduce the heat to medium, and cook, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are cooked to al dente, 12 to 16 minutes.
While the noodles cook, in a small bowl, stir together the Italian cheese blend and ricotta until combined. Set aside.

Remove the soup from the heat. Divide among 4 bowls and top evenly with dollops of the ricotta mixture. Garnish with fresh basil, if using. Refrigerate leftovers in an airtight container for up to 3 days. Reheat on the stovetop over medium-low heat, adding a little water to help loosen it. Love the recipe? Leave us stars and a comment below!

this-cozy-4-ingredient-dump-cake-cooks-i.name: This Cozy 4-ingredient Dump Cake Cooks In The Slow Cooker

ingredients.item: Vanilla ice cream or whipped cream

instructions: {'level': 'Spray an oval 6-quart slow cooker insert with nonstick cooking spray.', 'step': '1'}
{'level': 'Add the pumpkin pie mix to the greased slow cooker insert, using a spatula to spread it into an even layer.', 'step': '2'}
{'level': 'In a medium bowl, combine the cake mix, melted butter, and cinnamon and use a fork to mix until the mixture is crumbly.', 'step': '3'}
{'level': 'Use your hands to sprinkle the crumble evenly on top of the pumpkin layer in an even layer.', 'step': '4'}
{'level': 'Sprinkle over the chopped pecans, if using.', 'step': '5'}
{'level': 'Place enough paper towels on top of the slow cooker to cover the top fully and hang over the rim slightly on the outside.', 'step': '6'}
{'level': 'Then, place the lid on top of the paper towels, ensuring the paper towels do not touch the cake.', 'step': '7'}

this-is-how-the-famous-spiral-potatoes-a.name: This Is How The Famous Spiral Potatoes Are Made
this-is-how-the-famous-spiral-potatoes-a.original_name: Así se hacen las famosas papas en espiral

ingredients.item: ¼ taza de aceite de oliva

instructions: En un recipiente mezcla el aceite de oliva con la paprika.
Agrega la pimienta, el romero y la sal.
Mezcla muy bien con la ayuda de una cuchara o batidor pequeño de mano.
Introduce un palo a la mitad de la papa, de un extremo al otro.
Córtala en forma de espiral, separa las rebanadas. Reserva.
Coloca las papas en un recipiente para hornear y bañalas con el aceite hasta cubrir la papa completamente.
Luego, espolvorea con queso parmesano.
Hornea a 177°C durante 40 minutos o hasta que estén doradas.
Sirve y disfruta.

this-plt-will-be-your-new-fave-sandwich.name: This Plt Will Be Your New Fave Sandwich

ingredients.prep: liberally buttered on one side before toasting (bring butter to room temperature for spreading)

ingredients.item: Of heirloom tomato (enough to cover bread)
Of washed and dried butter or bibb lettuce

instructions: Crisp the pastrami in a pan or griddle to desired crispness.
Remove the pastrami and toast the bread in the same pan or griddle.
Spread a generous amount of Heinz® Mayonnaise on the buttered sides of both pieces of toast.
Place tomato slices on top of mayo and season with salt and pepper.
Layer pastrami on top of tomato, followed by lettuce.
Top with the other slice of toast and cut in half from point to point, so it makes two triangles.

this-spicy-bourbon-drink.name: This Spicy Bourbon Drink

ingredients.prep: plus Meyer lemon twist for serving

ingredients.item: A few dashes orange or angostura bitters

instructions: Combine bourbon, liqueur, Meyer lemon juice, and honey in a cocktail shaker; fill shaker with ice. Shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled coupe glass, top with bitters, and garnish with lemon twist.

thistle-with-almonds-pequerecetas.name: Thistle With Almonds
instructions: Si, como en nuestro caso, tienes cardos congelados, pon una olla de agua a hervir con un poco de sal.
Cuando esté hirviendo introduce los cardos y deja que cuezan unos 30 minutos si es en olla express, o unos 40-50 minutos en olla normal.
Una vez cocidos, reservamos 200 ml del agua de cocer los cardos, y el resto lo escurrimos y reservamos.

Si por el contrario has comprado cardo en conserva puedes saltar este paso, y si tus cardos son frescos, te explicamos más abajo el proceso porque primero tendrás que limpiarlos y pelarlos para quitarles las hebras duras.
Ponemos un poco de aceite en una sartén. Picamos muy fino un diente de ajo y ½ cebolla y pochamos en el aceite a fuego bajo.
Una vez estén dorados echamos una cucharada generosa de harina, y removemos bien dejando que se cocine durante un minuto aproximadamente para que pierda el sabor a harina cruda.

Echamos los 200 ml del agua de cocer los cardos y dejamos que se cocinen durante un par de minutos, y luego añadimos la leche. Dejamos que cueza mientras removemos durante unos 5 minutos, para que se vaya espesando y reduciendo.
En un mortero machacamos bien las almendras enteras con un poco de caldo. Podemos reservar algunas que freiremos ligeramente para añadirlas al final.
Incorporamos las almendras a la salsa y removemos bien.
Añadimos los cardos cocidos y algo de sal. Dejamos que se mezclen bien los sabores, probando hasta que la salsa se encuentre a nuestro gusto.
Salteamos en aceite algunas almendras enteras o en trozos gruesos y se lo incorporamos a la salsa. Esto le dará una textura deliciosa y mucho sabor.

thousand-island-dressing.name: Thousand Island Dressing
instructions: Combine mayonnaise, ketchup, pickle relish, Worcestershire sauce, horseradish, and paprika in a bowl; mix well. Cover with plastic wrap and chill before serving.

thousand-island-dressing-mastered.name: Thousand Island Dressing Mastered
instructions: Mix mayonnaise, chili sauce, relish, egg, onion, garlic, lemon juice, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper together in a bowl; refrigerate until chilled.

thousand-leaves-of-pastry-cream-teleculi.name: Thousand Leaves Of Pastry Cream

ingredients.item: 2 embalagens de massa folhada de compras (4 placas)

instructions: Ligue o forno a 180 graus. Estenda as placas de massa folhada em separado em cima da mesa polvilhada com farinha e corte cada uma num círculo de 20 cm de diâmetro. Coloque um círculo no tabuleiro do forno previamente passado por água fria, cubra com papel vegetal, disponha em cima uma forma para a massa não subir e leve ao forno durante 20 minutos. Reduza o forno para os 170ºC e deixe mais 10 minutos ou até ficar douradinha e bem seca. Repita a operação com as outras rodelas de massa.

Leve um tacho ao lume com o leite e deixe aquecer. Numa tigela, bata os ovos com o açúcar e o açúcar baunilhado até ficar um creme fofo, junte a farinha, mexa bem e adicione depois o leite, aos poucos e mexendo sempre. Deite para um tacho, leve ao lume mexendo continuamente até ferver, retire do lume, deite para uma tigela, cubra com película aderente e deixe arrefecer.

Bata ligeiramente a clara, junte o açúcar em pó e as gotas de limão e mexa bem. Parta o chocolate em pedaços, deite-os para uma tigela, leve a derreter em banho-maria ou no microondas, retire e mexa bem até ficar morno. Barre um círculo com a glace e deixe secar um pouco. Deite o chocolate derretido dentro de um cone de papel, faça uma espiral em cima e passe um palito para fazer o efeito que vê na foto.

Deite o creme para um saco de pasteleiro com boquilha. Ponha outro círculo de massa num prato, cubra-o com 1/3 do creme, coloque outro círculo por cima, volte a cobrir com mais 1/3 do creme, disponha outro círculo e espalhe o resto do creme. Cubra então com o círculo que decorou e sirva.

thracian-cheese-pie-argiro.name: Thracian Cheese Pie

ingredients.item: 2κύβους νωπή μαγιά ή 2 φακελάκια ξερή μαγιά
2κύβους νωπή μαγιά ή 2 φακελάκια ξερή μαγιά

instructions: Αρχικά ενεργοποιούμε τη μαγιά που θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε. Εάν χρησιμοποιήσετε ξερή μαγιά, μπορείτε να τη βάλετε κατευθείαν στα υλικά.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε το αλεύρι, την μαγιά την ζάχαρη και ανακατεύουμε.
Ρίχνουμε νερό και ζυμώνουμε μέχρι η ζύμη να είναι απαλή, εύπλαστη και να μην κολλάει στα χέρια.

Την βάζουμε σε λαδωμένο μπολ την σκεπάζουμε και την αφήνουμε σε ζεστό σημείο να διπλασιαστεί για περίπου 1 ώρα (ανάλογα με την θερμοκρασία του χώρου). Αν τη βάλουμε κοντά στο καλοριφέρ θα φουσκώσει γρήγορα αν την αφήσουμε απλά στον πάγκο θα πάρει περισσότερο χρόνο.
Την βγάζουμε στον πάγκο και την χωρίζουμε σε 4 κομμάτια.
Λαδώνουμε ταψί 32 ή 34 εκ.
Βουτάμε τα χέρια στο ελαιόλαδο  με τα δάχτυλα ανοίγουμε τη ζύμη σε χοντρό φύλλο μέσα στο λαδωμένο ταψί, γυρνώντας γύρω γύρω και τεντώνοντας την ταυτόχρονα.
Η διάμετρος του φύλλου να είναι όσο και η διάμετρος του ταψιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε σε όλη την επιφάνεια τρίμμα τυριού η φέτας και ρίγανη.
Ανοίγουμε και το δεύτερο φύλλο στον πάγκο.
Το βάζουμε από πάνω.
Δηλαδή σαν να κάνουμε 4 κομμάτια το ένα πάνω στην άλλο κι ενδιάμεσα την γέμιση.
Η γέμιση μπορεί να είναι οτιδήποτε μας αρέσει ή να είναι και διαφορετική κάθε στρώση, άλλη με φέτα και ρίγανη, άλλη με σαλάμι, άλλη με ελιά και λιαστή ντομάτα.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε το ίδιο και με τα 4 φύλλα.
Αφού τα στρώσουμε όλα  και την γέμιση αρεσκείας μας σε σειρά το ένα πάνω στο άλλο πιάνουμε τις άκρες και τις γυρίζουμε στο κέντρο σαν να τα κλείνουμε σε μπάλα.
Αναποδογυρίζουμε την μπάλα  με τις ενώσεις να ακουμπάνε στο ταψί.
Πατάμε με τα δάχτυλα την επιφάνεια να απλώσει το σχήμα και να πάρει το σχήμα του ταψιού.
Αλείφουμε όλη την επιφάνεια με λάδι και πασπαλίζουμε σουσάμι.
Σκεπάζουμε κι αφήνουμε να σταθεί για 40′ σε ζεστό σημείο να φουσκώσει.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200ºC ή 180ºC αέρα για 40′ περίπου να ροδίσει και να φουσκώσει.
Ζεστή είναι συγκλονιστική.

thracian-style-lamb-tandoori-lezzet.name: Thracian Style Lamb Tandoori
instructions: 1. Kuzu etini, zeytinyağı, tane karabiber, defne yaprağı ve tuz ile marine edin.
2.  Fırında 140 derecede 3 saat pişirin.
3.  İç pilav için, dolmalık fıstıkları kavurun.
4.  Yemeklik doğradığınız soğanları ilave edip kavurmaya devam edin.
5.  Pirinci ekleyip biraz daha kavurduktan sonra baharatları ekleyin.
6.  Suyunu ilave edip pişmeye bırakın.
7.  Pişmeye yakın kuş üzümü ilave edip 20 dakika demlenmeye bırakın.
8.  Eti iri parçalara ayırıp tereyağında sotelenmiş patlıcan ve iç pilav ile servis yapın.
9. Hafifliği ile bilinen ve ana yemekleri süsleyen klasik kuzu tandır tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

three-apricot-pavlova-lezzet.name: Three Apricot Pavlova

ingredients.item: 1 paket veya 1 çay kaşığı vanilya esansı

instructions: 1. Yumurta beyazlarını çırpmak için derin bir kaba alın.
2.  Çırpma işlemine devam ederken her seferde 200 g olmak üzere şekeri 3 kerede yumurta beyazına ilave edin.
3.  Serte yakın bir köpük elde edene kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
4. Limon suyu, vanilya ve nişastayı ekledikten sonra çok kısa süreli çırparak karıştırın.
5. Elde ettiğiniz karışımı yağlı kağıt ile kaplanmış bir fırın tepsisine mesafeli olacak şekilde 3 büyük top şeklinde koyun.
6.  Bezenin yayvan değil, yüksekçe olmasına özen gösterin.
7.   Önceden 120 derecede ısıtılmış fırında 90 dakika pişirin ve piştikten sonra 30-40 dakika fırında bırakın.
8. Soğuk krema ve sodayı, vanilya ile şekeri buzdolabında soğutulmuş bir kaba alarak 4-5 dakika süreyle bir mikser yardımıyla çırpın ve kullanıma kadar tekrar buzdolabında bekletin.
9.  Fırında beklettiğiniz bezelerin üstünü kaşık ucu ile hafifçe vurarak kırın ve içlerini çok dikkatli bir şekilde bezeyi kırmamaya özen göstererek doğranmış kayısı ve üzüm ile doldurun.
10. Doldurduğunuz bezelerin üzerine buzdolabında beklettiğiniz krem şantiyi kaşıkla doldurun.
11. Son olarak pavlovaların üzerini kalan kayısı, ufak üzümler, taze nane, badem ve ayıkladığınız kayısı iç çekirdekleri ile süsleyerek çok bekletmeden servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
13. Kayısılı Pavlova Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarifte kullanacağınız yumurta beyazları mutlaka oda sıcaklığında olmalıdır.
14. Kıvamını anlamak için parmağınızı karışıma değdirin ve şeker kalmadığından emin olun.
15. Yumurta beyaz ve sarısını dikkatli bir şekilde ayırın.
16. Pavlovayı pişirdikten sonra, fırının kapağını aralayarak soğuması için bekletin.

three-bean-salad.name: Three-bean Salad

ingredients.prep: trimmed, cut into 1-inch pieces (2 1/2 cups cut)

ingredients.item: Grated lemon zest plus 2 tablespoons fresh juice

ingredients.prep: plus more for cooking water; for table salt, use half as much by volume
finely chopped (about 1/2 cup)2 small celery stalks (2 ounces; 57 g), thinly sliced on an angle (about 1/2 cup)
thinly sliced on an angle (about 1/2 cup)

instructions: Fill a large bowl with ice water; set aside. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add green beans to boiling water and cook until bright green and crisp-tender, 1 to 2 minutes. Use a slotted spoon or spider skimmer to transfer vegetables to prepared ice-bath. Let sit until cooled, about 5 minutes. Drain beans well; pat dry with paper towels.

In a large bowl, whisk together vinegar, lemon zest and juice, garlic, mustard, honey, salt, and pepper until well combined. Slowly drizzle in oil, while whisking, until emulsified. Stir in black eyed peas, green beans, kidney beans, onion, celery, and parsley until well combined. Cover and chill until flavors meld, about 30 minutes. Serve.

three-bean-tacos.name: Three Bean Tacos

ingredients.item: Joan of arc® light red kidney beans

ingredients.prep: lettuce, and red onion for topping

instructions: Add beans, Green Giant® SteamCrisp® Mexicorn®, 3/4 cup water, and Ortega® Taco Seasoning to large nonstick skillet and bring to a boil over high heat. Simmer 10 minutes or until thickened.
Serve in warm tortillas with your favorite taco toppings.

three-cheese-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Three Cheese Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 paket instant maya (veya 1/2 paket yaş maya)
Yarım su bardağı rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri
Tam buğday unu veya yulaf unu kullanarak daha besleyici ve lif açısından zengin poğaçalar hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Glutensiz un karışımları (örneğin badem unu + mısır nişastası) ile glutensiz versiyon yapabilirsiniz.
Tereyağı (eritilmiş) veya zeytinyağı kullanabilirsiniz. tereyağı hamura ekstra yumuşaklık ve aroma katar.
Vegan bir alternatif için 1 yemek kaşığı keten tohumu + 3 yemek kaşığı su karışımını (yumurta yerine) kullanabilirsiniz.
İnce kıyılmış taze otlar (maydanoz, dereotu, nane) ile tat ve aroma zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Biraz baharat (karabiber, pul biber, kekik) ekleyerek farklı lezzetler yaratabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Ilık süt, maya ve şekeri bir kapta karıştırın.
2.  5 dakika bekletin.
3.  Üzerine yumurta beyazı, sıvı yağ, tuz ve kontrollü şekilde unu ekleyerek yumuşak ama ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamurun üzerini örtüp 40–45 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Peynirleri ve isteğe göre maydanozu karıştırın.
6. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, içini doldur ve kapatın.
7.  Yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye diz.
8. Tepside 15 dakika daha mayalandırın.
9. Üzerine yumurta sarısı sürün, çörek otu veya susam serpin.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 20–25 dakika pişirin.
11. Fırından çıkan üç peynirli poğaçalar servise hazır.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

three-cheese-pizza-lezzet.name: Three Cheese Pizza
instructions: 1. Klasik pizza hamurunu hazırlayın.
2.  Üzeri için; soğan ve sarımsakları soyup kıyın.
3.  Çarliston biberi temizleyip halka halka dilimleyin.
4.  2 domatesi ince ince dilimleyin.
5.  Kalan domatesleri soyup rendeleyin.
6.  Zeytinyağını tavada ısıtıp soğan ve sarımsağı pembeleştirin.
7.  Rendelenmiş domates ve salçayı ekleyip 5 dakika karıştırarak kavurun.
8.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
9.  Tulum ve beyazpeyniri bir kaba ufalayın.
10.  Kaşarpeynirini ilave edip harmanlayın.
11.  Pizza hamurlarını yağlanmış fırın tesisine aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
12.  Üzerlerine domates sosunu fırçayla sürüp peynirli karışımın yarısından fazlasını ilave edin.
13.  Zeytin, biber ve domates dilimlerini dizip kalan peynirli karışımı serpiştirin.
14.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
15.  Servis tabağına alıp dilimleyin.
16.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.
17.  Afiyet olsun.
18. Dilerseniz, kahvaltılık ekmek üstü pizza tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

three-cheese-salami-frittata.name: Three Cheese Salami Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Whisk eggs and milk together in a large bowl.

Heat olive oil in a large oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat. Pour 1/2 the egg mixture into the hot oil; arrange salami over egg mixture and sprinkle with parsley. Add 2/3 the Parmesan cheese, 2/3 Romano cheese, and 2/3 the mozzarella cheese over the salami-parsley layer; season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

Cook egg-cheese mixture until edges of frittata are browned and middle is set, 10 to 15 minutes. Pour the remaining egg mixture over frittata; sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese, Romano cheese, and mozzarella cheese; season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.

Bake in the preheated oven until frittata has risen to about 3 inches and middle is set, 20 to 25 minutes. Carefully turn frittata onto a cutting board; cut into 2-inch squares using a sharp knife. Arrange squares in a bowl and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.

three-cheese-tortellini-with-walnut-sauc.name: Three Cheese Tortellini With Walnut Sauce
instructions: 1. Unu geniş bir kaba eleyin.
2.  Yumurtalar, zeytinyağı ve tuzu ilave edip hamur toparlanmaya başlayıncaya kadar yoğurun.
3.  Hamurun üzerini streç filmle kapatıp 1 saat dinlendirin.
4.  İç harcı için peynirleri geniş bir kasede karıştırın.
5.  Yumurta akını ilave edip tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırın.
6.  Dinlenen hamuru unlanmış tezgah üzerine alın.
7.  Bir merdane yardımıyla ince açın ve 4 cm çapında daireler kesin.
8.  Ortalarına hazırladığınız iç harcından bir tatlı kaşığı kadar koyun.
9.  Hamuru yarım daire olacak şekilde döndürerek uçlarını arkaya doğru birleştirin.
10.  Tortellinileri tuzlu kaynar suda haşlayın.
11.  Sosu için kremayı bir sos tenceresine alın.
12.  Ceviz, tuz ve baharatları ilave edip ısıtın.
13.  Suyunu süzdüğünüz makarnayı sos tenceresine ilave edip karıştırın.
14.  Ceviz ile süsleyerek sıcak servis yapın.

three-cheese-zucchini-boat-lezzet.name: Three Cheese Zucchini Boat
instructions: 1. peynir çeşitleri ile besin değeri yüksek lezzetli tarifler hazırlayabilirsiniz.
2.  İki kabağı bol suyla yıkayıp kurulayın.
3.  Ortadan ikiye kesip üzerlerine hafifçe yağ sürün.
4.  Fırın ızgarasında 10 dakika pişirip kaşıkla içlerini çıkarın.
5.  Klasik beyaz peynir ve kaşar peynirini rendeleyin.
6.  Rendelenmiş sarımsağı ekleyip harmanlayın.
7.  Hazırladığınız malzemeyi kabakların içine paylaştırın.
8.  Sıcak fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Üzerine kırmızı pul biber serpip, dereotu ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

three-chile-dry-roasted-tomatillo-salsa.name: Three Chile Dry Roasted Tomatillo Salsa
instructions: Place the tomatillos, chiles, garlic cloves, and onion in a dry, cast iron pan. Toast, turning occasionally over medium-high heat until the husks of the tomatillos have blackened and their skins turn translucent. The goal is to soften the tomatillos by blackening the skin without allowing them to split. Remove from pan, and allow to cool slightly.

Remove the husks from the tomatillos and the stems from the peppers. Place into the bowl of a food processor with the cilantro and salt to taste; process to desired consistency. Pour the salsa into a saucepan, and cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes to mellow the flavors and remove the raw taste.

three-cities-of-spain-cheesecake.name: Three Cities Of Spain Cheesecake

ingredients.item: Crumb-crust recipe made with finely ground graham crackers

instructions: Make crumb crust as directed. Preheat oven to 177°C.

Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until fluffy and add eggs, 1 at a time, then vanilla and sugar, beating on low speed until each ingredient is incorporated and scraping down bowl between additions.

Put springform pan with crust in a shallow baking pan. Pour filling into crust and bake in baking pan (to catch drips) in middle of oven 45 minutes, or until cake is set 3 inches from edge but center is still slightly wobbly when pan is gently shaken. Let stand in baking pan on a rack 5 minutes. Leave oven on.
Stir together sour cream, sugar, and vanilla. Drop spoonfuls of topping around edge of cake and spread gently over center, smoothing evenly. Bake cake with topping 10 minutes.

Run a knife around top edge of cake to loosen and cool completely in springform pan on rack. (Cake will continue to set as it cools.) Chill cake, loosely covered, at least 6 hours. Remove side from pan and transfer cake to a plate. Bring to room temperature before serving.

three-dots-and-a-dash-cocktail.name: Three Dots And A Dash Cocktail

ingredients.prep: such as Duqesne Eleve Sous Bois or J.M. Gold

instructions: Heat the honey in a saucepan over medium heat until runny and not viscous—nearly to a boil but not quite. Add the water to the hot honey and whisk together. Immediately remove from the heat. Let cool. Store in a lidded bottle or other sealable container in the refrigerator. The syrup will keep, refrigerated, for several weeks.
Add all the ingredients to a drink mixer tin. Fill with 12 ounces of crushed ice, flash blend, and pour contents into a footed pilsner glass. Add garnish.

three-flavors-bowl-teleculinaria.name: Three Flavors Bowl
instructions: Parta o chocolate em pedaços pequenos, coloque num recipiente para micro-ondas e junte a manteiga. Leve ao micro-ondas a derreter, por 30 segundos de cada vez, mexendo até ficar derretido. Junte depois os 200 g de açúcar e as gemas e bata muito bem.
À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as na mistura de chocolate, de modo a obter uma mousse.
Bata as natas em chantili bem firme com as 3 colheres (sopa) de açúcar. Triture as bolachas num processador, até ficarem em pó.

Numa taça de vidro funda, disponha uma camada de mousse de chocolate, uma camada de bolacha, outra de chantili e mais uma de bolacha. Repita até esgotar os ingredientes, sendo que a última camada deve ser de mousse. Leve ao frio até ficar bem firme. Decore com frutos silvestres e sirva.

three-green-bean-and-bulgur-salad.name: Three Green Bean And Bulgur Salad
instructions: Add 1 cup coarse bulgur and 2 cups water to a medium saucepan with a tight-fitting lid. Bring to a boil, then lower to a simmer and cover. Cook until water is absorbed and bulgur is tender, 18–22 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool.
Preheat oven to 350°. Toast 4 oz. raw hazelnuts (heaping ¾ cup) on a sheet pan until fragrant and deeply golden, 10–12 minutes. Let cool on pan.

Meanwhile, fill a medium pot with water and bring to a boil. Prepare an ice water bath with a strainer that fits in the bowl. Cook 4 oz. shelled fava beans, fresh or frozen (¾ cup), until crisp-tender and peels start to separate from beans, 1 to 2 minutes if fresh or 2 to 3 minutes if frozen (or per package instructions). Drain and immediately transfer to strainer in ice water bath. Let cool, then remove from ice bath and pat dry.

Repeat blanching, draining and chilling process, cooking 5 oz. green beans (1 cup) for 3 to 4 minutes and 5 oz. snow peas (1 cup) for 1 to 2 minutes. Gently peel off rubbery skins from fava beans, slice green beans and snow peas on the bias into thirds, and add all to bowl of bulgur.
Roughly chop hazelnuts and add to bowl with bulgur and vegetables.

Add 1 lemon, zested and juiced, to a medium bowl. Whisk in 1 shallot, finely chopped, 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 4 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 2 tsp. runny honey, 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal kosher salt, and 1 tsp. Dijon mustard until well combined.
Add dressing and ¼ cup mint leaves, torn, to salad and toss to combine. Top with freshly ground black pepper and remaining ¼ cup mint leaves, torn, before serving.

three-ingredient-raspberry-dessert.name: Three Ingredient Raspberry Dessert
instructions: Distribute frozen raspberries amongst 8 small glasses. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons of Greek yogurt to each glass and sprinkle a thick layer of brown sugar over each. Refrigerate uncovered for 24 hours so sugar crystallizes.

three-mushroom-risotto-lezzet.name: Three Mushroom Risotto
instructions: 1. Soğan ve mantarları zeytinyağında soteleyin.
2.  Rengi pembeleşince pirinci ilave edip kavurmaya devam edin.
3.  Sebze suyunu ilave edip sürekli karıştırarak 20 dakika pişirin.
4.  Ocaktan alıp rendelenmiş parmesan peyniri, tereyağı ve ince kıyılmış maydanozu ilave edip hızlı bir şekilde karıştırın.
5.  Servis yapın.
6.  Hafif, düşük kalorili ve yüksek proteinli mantarlı risotto tarifine buradan ulaşabilir, sofralarınızı renklendirebilirsiniz.

three-onion-dip.name: Three Onion Dip

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-low heat. Add onions, anchovies, mushroom powder, if using, and 1 Tbsp. garlic. Cook, stirring often, until onions are golden brown and softened, 40–45 minutes. If onions start to burn or stick, reduce heat and add water a splash at a time, scraping up browned bits. Let cool, then finely chop.

Meanwhile, heat a dry medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high heat. Toss scallion whites with remaining 1 tsp. oil; season with salt and pepper. Cook, turning occasionally, until charred, about 5 minutes. Let cool; finely chop. Thinly slice greens.
Mix onion mixture, scallion whites and greens, mayonnaise, yogurt, sour cream, chives, Worcestershire, and remaining garlic in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Serve with chips.

three-peas-with-barley-chile-green-garli.name: Three Peas With Barley, Chile & Green Garlic

ingredients.item: Sambal oelek or other pure chile paste

ingredients.prep: 1/4 cup (3/4 oz/20 g) thinly sliced, or 4 cloves garlic, minced

instructions: Bring a large saucepan half full of salted water to a boil over high heat.
Add the snap peas and English peas and cook until tender-crisp, about 1 minute.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the vegetables to a colander and rinse under cold water. Set aside.
Return the saucepan to a boil, add the barley and cook until tender, about 45 minutes.
Drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar, soy sauce, 2 tbsp water, brown sugar, and sambal oelek until blended.
In a large, heavy frying pan over high heat, warm the sesame oil.
Add the green garlic, green onions, and lime leaves and stir-fry until the green onions are tender, about 30 seconds.
Add the reserved snap peas, English peas, and barley along with the pea shoots, and stir to coat.
Pour in the soy sauce mixture and stir and toss until the peas and pea shoots are tender and the liquid is absorbed, about 4 minutes.
Transfer to a warmed serving dish and serve.

three-pepper-corn-muffins-lezzet.name: Three Pepper Corn Muffins
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları yoğurt ile çırpın.
2.  Tereyağını eritip ekleyin.
3.  Sirke, toz şeker ve tuzu ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Biberleri ufak doğrayın ve çok az tereyağında soteleyin.
5.  Az miktarda tuz ve karabiber ekleyin.
6.  Mısırları ve biberleri karışıma ekleyip mikserle çırpın.
7.  Un ve kabartma tozunu ilave edip karıştırın.
8.  Muffin kalıplarını yağlayıp hamuru paylaştırın.
9.  170 dereceye ayarlı fırında 40 dakika pişirin.
10.  Ilınınca kalıplardan çıkarıp servis yapın.

three-pepper-steak-lezzet.name: Three Pepper Steak
instructions: 1. Bayram sofralarınıza uygun yemek tarifleri arasında üst sıralarda bulunan yemeğimize başlayalım.
2.  Biberleri yıkayıp, sap kısımlarını ve tohumlarını ayıklayın.
3.  Şeritler halinde doğrayın.
4.  2 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağını tavada ısıtın.
5.  Piyazlık doğradığınız soğanları, iri kıyılmış sarmısak ve biberleri ilave edip hepsini birlikte kavurun.
6.  Biberler yumuşayınca tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
7.  Diğer tavada kalan zeytinyağını ısıtıp biftekleri kızartın.
8.  Biberleri ilave edip 2 dakika daha pişirin.
9.  Servis tabağına alıp sıcak servis yapın.

three-wise-men-cookies-decorated-with-fo.name: Three Wise Men Cookies Decorated With Fondant
three-wise-men-cookies-decorated-with-fo.original_name: Galletas de los Reyes Magos decoradas con fondant

ingredients.item: 225 g mantequilla sin sal (a temperatura ambiente)
Colorantes en gel: rojo, amarillo, negro, marrón, azul (y opcional: color carne)
Maicena o azúcar glas (para espolvorear muy poco)
Un poquito de agua (o pegamento alimentario)
Opcional: rotulador alimentario negro y un punzón/palillo
Rodillo (ideal: con aros guía o dos palitos para grosor)
Cuchillo pequeño o bisturí de cocina / cortador de pizza mini
Esteca o herramienta de modelado (una punta redonda va genial)
Cortador redondo del tamaño de la galleta (o un plato/vaso como guía)

instructions: Batimos 225 g de mantequilla con 180 g de azúcar 2–3 minutos, hasta que quede cremoso.
Añadimos 1 huevo y 10 ml de vainilla y mezclamos hasta integrar.
Incorporamos 400 g de harina, 5 g de levadura y 3 g de sal. Mezclamos lo justo: cuando no veamos harina, paramos.
Hacemos una bola, la aplastamos un poco, la envolvemos y la dejamos 1 hora en la nevera (así luego estira mejor y no se deforman).
Estiramos a 5–6 mm y cortamos círculos (o la forma que queramos).
Enfriamos las galletas ya cortadas 10 minutos (esto ayuda a que mantengan forma).
Horneamos a 175 ºC 10–12 min, hasta que el borde empiece a dorarse muy ligeramente.
Colocamos pocas galletas (3–5) sobre papel de horno recortado. Cocinamos a 160 ºC 7–10 min (vigilando desde el minuto 7). Enfriamos del todo sobre rejilla antes de decorar

Trabajamos con el fondant en porciones. Lo que no usemos, lo tapamos en film, porque se seca en nada. Si está duro, amasamos 30–40 segundos. Si sigue tieso, añadimos una puntita de grasa vegetal o unas gotas mínimas de agua (poquísimo).
Para estirar, espolvoreamos muy poco azúcar glas o maicena. Si nos pasamos, el fondant queda “empolvado” y no pega bien.
Grosor ideal para piezas grandes (cara, pelo, barba): 2–3 mm. Para detalles (cejas, bigote): 1–2 mm
Lo más simple: agua. Mojamos un pincel, lo escurrimos y pasamos una película finísima.
Si el ambiente está húmedo o queremos más seguridad: pegamento alimentario. Importante: si ponemos demasiada agua, el fondant resbala o se reblandece
Nos funciona siempre este orden:  Base de cara Pelo/turbante/capa superior Barba/bigote/cejas Corona Ojos + nariz Detalles finales (perlas, textura, líneas)

Estiramos fondant color piel a 2–3 mm y cortamos un círculo del tamaño de la galleta (o ligeramente más pequeño para que se vea borde). Pegamos con una película de agua. Estiramos fondant marrón a 2–3 mm y cortamos un “casco” de pelo: imagina medio círculo que cubre la parte superior de la cara. Lo colocamos dejando frente visible. Para la barba: con fondant marrón, cortamos una pieza grande que cubra desde debajo de la nariz hasta casi el borde inferior, con forma redondeada. La pegamos. Ahora viene el detalle bonito: con una esteca o la punta de un cuchillo sin apretar, marcamos líneas cortas en la barba para simular pelo (de arriba a abajo, sin atravesar). Hacemos el bigote con dos “gotas” marrones pequeñas, una a cada lado de donde irá la nariz. Pegamos. Corona: estiramos fondant amarillo a 2 mm, cortamos una corona sencilla (tres puntas) y la pegamos sobre el pelo. Ojos: cortamos 2 círculos blancos (tamaño “lenteja grande”) y encima 2 círculos negros más pequeños. Pegamos primero blanco y luego negro centrado. Nariz: una bolita pequeñita color piel, la aplastamos un poco y la ponemos entre los ojos, un pelín más abajo. Detalles finales: añadimos 3 perlas (doradas o plateadas) en las puntas de la corona. Si queremos cejas, hacemos dos tiras finas marrones encima de los ojos

Pegamos la base de cara con fondant color piel a 2–3 mm. Hacemos el “pelo” blanco: cortamos una pieza superior como un medio círculo, pero más ancha, y la colocamos cubriendo parte de la frente. Barba blanca: cortamos una pieza grande que cubra la zona inferior de la cara y que se note “volumen”. Truco: antes de pegar, marcamos ondas suaves con una esteca redondeada, como líneas curvas, para que parezca barba esponjosa. Bigote: dos tiras blancas pequeñas, finitas, justo debajo de donde irá la nariz. Corona amarilla: igual que en Melchor, centrada arriba, pegada sobre el pelo blanco. Si quieres que quede más “real”, marcamos puntitos con un palillo (sin atravesar) para simular textura. Ojos: 2 círculos blancos + 2 círculos negros. Nariz: bolita color piel, ligeramente aplastada. Detalles finales: cejas blancas (dos tiritas muy finas). Y perlas en la corona (plateadas quedan genial con el pelo blanco)

Estiramos fondant negro a 2–3 mm, cortamos el círculo base y lo pegamos sobre la galleta. Alisamos con la mano muy limpia para que no se marque polvo. Turbante rojo: estiramos fondant rojo a 2–3 mm y cortamos una “media luna” grande para cubrir la parte superior de la cara (como si fuera una banda). Pegamos. Para que parezca turbante de verdad, hacemos 2–3 tiras rojas finas (1–2 mm) y las colocamos encima en forma de pliegues (curvas suaves). Pegamos con una gotita mínima de agua. Estrella: estiramos amarillo a 2 mm, cortamos una estrella pequeña y la pegamos centrada arriba del turbante. Ojos: aquí se ven mucho. Ponemos 2 círculos blancos grandes y encima 2 negros pequeños. Boca: hacemos un círculo rojo pequeñito, lo pegamos abajo y con un palillo marcamos un agujerito (o pegamos un mini aro si queremos efecto “boca abierta”). Detalles finales: si queremos rematar, hacemos una nariz pequeñita negra (o la omitimos, también queda genial sin ella). Y alisamos bordes con el dedo para que se integren

three-berry-crumble-slab-pie.name: Three-berry Crumble Slab Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Lightly dust an 11x15-inch half-sheet pan with flour. Carefully place the 2 pie crusts into the bottom of the sheet pan, gently stretching and trimming the crusts to fit the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
Combine berries, sugar, arrowroot powder, and salt in a large bowl; stir well.

Combine oats, flour, brown sugar, apple pie spice, and salt in a medium bowl. Use a pastry knife to cut butter into the oat mixture until butter is evenly distributed throughout and the crumble topping mixture resembles small, uneven pieces.
Pour berry mixture evenly onto the crust and add crumble mixture on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until brown and bubbly, 45 to 55 minutes. Remove and allow to cool for 30 to 45 minutes

three-cheese-and-basil-grilled-cheese-sa.name: Three-cheese And Basil Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Heat a cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium heat.

Spread 1/2 teaspoon mayonnaise on each bread slice; place mayonnaise-side down into the skillet. Place jalapeño Jack cheese on 1 bread slice; top with tomato slices. Place mozzarella cheese on other bread slice; top with basil, then Cheddar cheese. Cook until bread turns golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Carefully invert bread slice with tomato onto slice with basil.

three-cheese-broccoli-manicotti.name: Three-cheese Broccoli Manicotti
instructions: Bring a pot of generously salted water to a boil.
Meanwhile, separate broccoli stems and florets. Cut florets in half and cut each stem into several pieces lengthwise.
Place stems in the boiling water and cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Then add florets and cook until just barely tender, about 3 more minutes.

Use a slotted spoon to transfer broccoli to a bowl of cold water, leaving the water boiling on the stove. Let broccoli sit until cool, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a colander and let sit until very well drained. Leave the bowl of cold water for the pasta.

Meanwhile, add manicotti to the boiling water and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender but slightly undercooked, 6 to 7 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to gently transfer manicotti into the bowl of cold water.
Chop cooled, drained broccoli into small pieces. Transfer 3 cups chopped broccoli to a mixing bowl and reserve any extra for another use.
Add garlic, ricotta, provolone, 1 ¼ cups Parmigiano-Reggiano, eggs, salt, cayenne, pepper, and nutmeg to the broccoli. Mix with a spoon until thoroughly combined. Cover and refrigerate until needed.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bring tomato sauce and water to a simmer over medium-high heat.
Ladle ½ inch hot sauce into a 9x13-inch baking dish or lasagna pan. Sprinkle in cooked Italian sausage.

Transfer broccoli filling into a pastry bag. Cut off the tip slightly smaller than the opening of the manicotti. Gently pipe stuffing into 12 manicotti, being careful not to overstuff. Place stuffed manicotti in the sauce in the baking dish, angling as necessary to fit.
Ladle in just enough sauce to barely cover the manicotti. Sprinkle ¼ cup Parmigiano-Reggiano over top.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until hot and bubbly, 25 to 30 minutes.
Garnish with parsley and let sit for 10 minutes.
Serve two manicotti per bowl, garnished with more Parmigiano-Reggiano.

three-cheese-chicken-roll-ups.name: Three-cheese Chicken Roll-ups
instructions: Sauté the garlic and spinach in oil until the spinach wilts. Add the ricotta, parmesan, salt, and pepper, and stir until heated.
Preheat oven to 232°C (230°C).
Salt and pepper the chicken breasts, add the cheese mixture, and roll ‘em up.
Dip each chicken breast roll-up in the egg, then the breadcrumbs, and place in a 8×8 (20 x 20 cm) or 9×9 (22 x 22 cm) baking dish seam side down.
Bake for 25 minutes.
Remove from oven and top with marinara sauce and mozzarella. Bake an additional 5 minutes. Remove from oven and top with basil.
Enjoy!

three-chile-harissa.name: Three-chile Harissa

ingredients.item: Dried guajillo chiles (about 7 large or 15 small)
Aleppo pepper or  0.25 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes
Nigella seeds can be found at indian markets
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Place guajillo and chipotle chiles in a large heatproof bowl and pour in boiling water to cover. Let chiles soak until softened, 40–45 minutes; drain.

Grind nigella seeds and coriander seeds in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle. Transfer to a food processor and add garlic, cumin, salt, and Aleppo pepper and pulse until garlic is very finely chopped. Add chiles and pulse until they are chopped. Add oil and vinegar and pulse just until incorporated (mixture should have the texture of a coarse paste).
Do Ahead: Harissa can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

three-cup-chicken-with-noodles.name: Three-cup Chicken With Noodles

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1" pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: such as bird chiles or chiles de árbol

instructions:
Mix 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup plus 1 Tbsp. water in a large bowl with your hands until a shaggy dough comes together. Knead in bowl, incorporating any loose bits, until dough forms into a smooth ball and no longer sticks to bowl, about 2 minutes. If dough is not coming together, mix in more water ½ tsp. at a time; if dough is too sticky, mix in more flour 1 tsp. at a time. Cover bowl with a damp paper towel or plastic wrap and let dough rest at room temperature at least 15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; wrap tightly and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.
While the dough is resting, whisk ¼ cup soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. sugar, and 2 tsp. sesame oil in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved. Set sauce aside.

Toss 1 lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1" pieces, with 2 tsp. cornstarch and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until coated; season with freshly ground pepper.

Heat a large skillet over medium; drizzle in vegetable oil and swirl to coat bottom of pan. Crack 2 dried red chiles open and add to pan along with 5 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped. Cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Remove 1 chile from oil; discard.

Increase heat to medium-high and add chicken to skillet in an even layer. Cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about 3 minutes. Turn chicken over and cook 1 minute. Pour in 1¼ cups Shaoxing wine and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring and scraping up any browned bits with a wooden spoon, 2 minutes. Whisk reserved sauce (in case any sugar has settled) and add to skillet. Cook, stirring, until sauce is slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.

Stir remaining 1 tsp. cornstarch and ¼ cup water in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved, then add slurry to skillet.
