3.  Gerekirse kaşık kaşık su ilavesi yapın.
4.  Hamuru streç filme sararak en az 20 dakika buzdolabında soğutun.
5.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
6.  Hamuru unlanmış zeminde 35 cm çapında açın ve dikkatlice yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye yerleştirin.
7.  Çırpılmış yumurta sarısının 2/3’ünü hamurun üzerine sürün.
8.  Galeta unu serpiştirin.
9.  Kenarlarda boşluk bırakarak domates dilimlerini dizin.
10.  Tuz, karabiber serpiştirin.
11.  Peyniri ufalayarak ekleyin.
12.  Hamurun kenarlarını üzerine doğru kapatın.
13.  Kalan yumurta sarısını üzerine fırça ile sürüp fırında kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 30 dakika pişirin.
14.  Fırından alarak peynirin üzerine zeytinyağını gezdirin.
15.  Tuz, karabiber, fesleğen serpiştirip servis yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-and-garlic-pie.name: Tomato And Garlic Pie

ingredients.item: Stoned wheat thins or other whole grain crackers

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 475°. Arrange tomatoes on a rimmed baking sheet, covering entire surface (it’s okay if they overlap). Drizzle with oil; season with salt and pepper. Roast until tomatoes begin to look dry on top, 25–30 minutes. Let cool.

Meanwhile, cook garlic and butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, swirling often, until butter foams and milk solids turn golden, 5–8 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof measuring cup; transfer garlic and toasty bits to a cutting board. Finely chop and set aside.

Reduce oven temperature to 375°. Pulse crackers and ¼ tsp. salt in a food processor until fine crumbs form (you should have about 2 cups). Add eggs and 6 Tbsp. garlic butter and pulse until mixture is the consistency of wet sand.Transfer to springform pan. Using a flat-sided measuring cup, press crumbs firmly onto bottom and 1½" up sides of pan. Bake crust until fragrant and edge is just starting to take on color, 8–10 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let crust cool.

Mix Taleggio, Parmesan, mayonnaise, chopped thyme, remaining ½ tsp. salt, remaining ¼ tsp. pepper, and reserved chopped garlic in a medium bowl. Gently dollop half of cheese mixture over bottom of crust, then spread into an even layer with an offset spatula (don’t press too hard or you will break the crust). Layer half of tomato slices over and press down to even out layers. Repeat with remaining cheese mixture and tomatoes. Brush remaining garlic butter over tomatoes. Top with shallot, then scatter thyme leaves over.
Bake pie until filling bubbles vigorously and crust is browned, 60–75 minutes. Let cool 1 hour before serving.
Do Ahead: Pie can be made 1 day ahead. Cover loosely and chill (it’s really good cold).

tomato-and-ham-breads-lezzet.name: Tomato And Ham Breads
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  Sarımsağı rendeleyip tereyağı ile karıştırın.
3.  Ekmekleri üçgen şeklinde kesin ve ekmeklerin iki yüzüne tereyağı sürün ve fırın kabına dizin.
4.  Jambonları ince kesin ve ekmeklerin aralarına serpiştirin.
5.  Kiraz domatesleri ortadan ikiye kesin ve ekmeklerin kenarlarına yerleştirin.
6.  Yumurtalar ile sütü çırpın.
7.  Tuz, karabiber ile tatlandırın ve ekmeklerin üzerine dökün.
8.  En üste rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri serpiştirip fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
9.  Servis yapın.

tomato-and-leek-tart-lezzet.name: Tomato And Leek Tart

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri

instructions: 1. İnce doğranmış pırasayı 1 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağı ile soteleyin.
2.  Geniş bir yoğurma kabında un ve tuzu harmanlayın.
3.  Küp doğranmış tereyağını ekleyip yoğurun.
4.  Ayrı bir kapta yumurta ile suyu çırpın ve un karışımına ekleyerek hamur toparlanıncaya kadar yoğurun.
5.  Üzerini nemli bir bez ile örterek bekletin.
6.  Fırını 200 dereceye ayarlayın.
7. Beyaz peyniri bir kaseye ufalayın.
8.  Tuz, karabiber, taze kekik yaprakları ve zeytinyağı ekleyin.
9.  Çatalla ezerek karıştırın.
10.  Hamuru yağlı kağıt arasında hafif unlayarak dikdörtgen şeklinde açın.
11.  Peynir karışımını üzerine yayın.
12.  Sotelenmiş pırasaları serpiştirin.
13.  Rendelenmiş kaşar peynirinin yarısını ekleyin.
14.  İnce doğranmış domatesleri kenarlarda 2.
15. 5 cm boşluk bırakarak dizin.
16.  Hamurun kenarlarını üzerine doğru kapatın.
17.  Kalan kaşar peyniri ve kekik yapraklarını serpiştirip fırında 20-25 dakika pişirip fırın ısısını 170 dereceye düşürün ve kızarıncaya kadar pişirmeye devam edin.
18.  Fırından çıkarıp 5 dakika soğuttuktan sonra dilimleyip servis yapın.

tomato-and-manchego-cheese-tartlets-tele.name: Tomato And Manchego Cheese Tartlets
tomato-and-manchego-cheese-tartlets-tele.original_name: Tarteletes de tomate e queijo manchego
instructions: Pré-aqueça o forno a 180ºc. Desenrole as massas, pique com um garfo e corte em círculos. Forre formas para tarteletes, previamente untadas com manteiga.
Corte os tomates em rodelas. Coloque no fundo de cada forma um pouco de mostarda e depois uma ou duas rodelas de tomate. Polvilhe com o queijo, regue com um fio de azeite e tempere com sal e pimenta.
Disponha as formas num tabuleiro e leve ao forno durante cerca de 25 a 30 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer, desenforme e sirva polvilhadas com cebolinho picado.

tomato-and-mango-salad.name: Tomato And Mango Salad
instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Combine tomatillos and chiles on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with a bit of oil, season with salt, and toss to coat. Grill, turning occasionally, until lightly browned all over, 8–10 minutes for tomatillos and about 4 minutes for chiles. Return to baking sheet; let cool.
Purée tomatillos and 2 chile halves in a blender until smooth. Add lime juice; taste and season with salt. Set remaining chiles aside for serving.
Do Ahead: Aguachile can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature and stir in a splash of water to loosen before using.
Arrange mangoes, onion, tomatoes, and hearts of palm on a platter. Drizzle aguachile over and top with cilantro and reserved chiles.

tomato-and-oat-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Tomato And Oat Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: Yulaf yerine ince çekilmiş yulaf unu veya tam buğday unu kullanılabilir.
Yoğurt yerine süt, kefir veya süzme yoğurt tercih edilebilir.
Beyaz peynir yerine lor peyniri, kaşar peyniri veya labne kullanılabilir.
Domates yerine kuru domates veya rendelenmiş kabak eklenebilir.
Maydanoz yerine dereotu, taze nane veya roka kullanılabilir.
Kabartma tozu yerine karbonat ve birkaç damla limon suyu kullanılabilir.
Pul biber ve karabiber yerine kekik, fesleğen veya farklı baharatlar eklenebilir.
Daha proteinli bir tarif için içine haşlanmış tavuk veya lor miktarı artırılabilir.
Vegan versiyon için yumurta yerine yoğurt miktarı artırılabilir veya bitkisel alternatifler kullanılabilir.
üzeri için çörek otu yerine susam, haşhaş veya ay çekirdeği içi tercih edilebilir.

instructions: 1. Geniş bir karıştırma kabına yumurta ve yoğurdu alarak çırpın.
2.  Üzerine ezilmiş beyaz peynir, doğranmış domates ve ince kıyılmış maydanozu ekleyin.
3. Ardından tuz ve baharatları ilave edin.
4.  Yulafı ve kabartma tozunu da ekleyerek tüm malzemeleri spatula yardımıyla karıştırın.
5.  Hafif yapışkan ama şekil alabilen bir hamur elde edin.
6.  Kıvam çok yumuşak olursa biraz daha yulaf ekleyebilirsiniz.
7. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde yuvarlayarak şekil verin.
8.  Hazırladığınız poğaçaları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı şekilde dizin.
9. Üzerlerine çörek otu serpiştirin ve önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında yaklaşık 18–22 dakika, üzerleri hafif kızarana kadar pişirin ve servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-and-parmesan-risotto.name: Tomato And Parmesan Risotto
instructions: Bring broth to a simmer in a medium saucepan; keep warm over medium-low heat until ready to use.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large saucepan over medium. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until golden and very soft, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until softened, about 1 minute. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring often, until it darkens slightly and begins to stick to pan, about 2 minutes. Add tomatoes and nutmeg, if using, and cook, stirring occasionally, until some of the tomatoes begin to burst, about 2 minutes.

Stir in rice; season with salt, and reduce heat to medium-low. Cook, stirring, until some grains are translucent, about 3 minutes. Ladle in 2 cups broth and simmer, stirring frequently, until completely absorbed, 8–10 minutes. Ladle in another 2 cups broth and continue to cook, stirring frequently, until rice is cooked through and most of the broth is absorbed, 12–15 minutes.

Add butter, 2 oz. Parmesan, and remaining 1 cup broth and cook, stirring constantly, until risotto is very creamy looking, about 4 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Divide risotto among bowls. Top with shaved Parmesan and lots of pepper and drizzle with more oil.

tomato-and-peanut-sauce-brazilian-cuisin.name: Tomato And Peanut Sauce (brazilian Cuisine)
instructions: 1. Yemek tarifleri arasında ızgarada pişirilmiş patlıcan, kabak, havuç, soğan gibi sebzelere çok yakışan bir sostur.
2. 1 kahve fincanı yerfıstığının kabuklarını soyup yağsız olarak teflon tavada kavurun ve ocaktan alın.
3.  3 orta boy domatesi yıkayıp rendeleyin ve süzgeçten geçirin.
4.  10 gr tereyağını sos tenceresinde eritip süzgeçten geçirilmiş domateslere ilave edin.
5.  Domatesler hafif suyunu çekinceye kadar pişirin.
6.  1 kahve fincanı krema ve kavrulmuş yerfıstığını ilave edin.
7.  Tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırıp 1-2 dakika daha pişirin.
8.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
9.  Hazırladığınız sos soğuyunca cam kavanoza aktarın.
10.  Buzdolabında 1 gün muhafaza edebilirsiniz.

tomato-and-pepper-gazpacho-with-sherry.name: Tomato And Pepper Gazpacho With Sherry
instructions: Working in batches, puree tomatoes, cucumber, peppers, oil, Sherry, vinegar, and garlic in blender until smooth. Transfer to large bowl; season with fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper. Cover; chill until cold, at least 3 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 6 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 232°C. Cut bread slices into 1-inch cubes; place in large bowl. Drizzle with 3 tablespoons oil, tossing to coat. Scatter bread on rimmed baking sheet. Bake until golden and crusty, stirring occasionally, 8 to 10 minutes. Cool on sheet.

Using vegetable peeler, shave cucumber in 5- to 6-inch-long ribbons directly into medium bowl. Cut tomatoes in half; place in small bowl. DO AHEAD Croutons, cucumber, and tomatoes can be made 4 hours ahead. Let croutons stand at room temperature. Cover vegetables; chill.
Place some of each garnish in 8 shallow soup bowls. Ladle gazpacho over. Sprinkle with remaining oil and chives.

tomato-and-pistachio-cream-teleculinaria.name: Tomato And Pistachio Cream

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena  tomate pelado em cubos ((390 g))

instructions: Corte os tomates frescos em pedaços grandes. Descasque e pique grosseiramente as cebolas e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite.
Junte o tomate fresco e o manjericão e deixe alourar. Adicione o tomate pelado e, de seguida, a água. Tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar.
No final, depois de tudo cozido, triture a sopa com a varinha mágica até obter um creme. Sirva o creme com os pistácios picados.

tomato-and-potato-quiche-lezzet.name: Tomato And Potato Quiche

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı rendelenmiş eski kaşar peyniri

instructions: 1. Tereyağını küçük küp şeklinde kesip un ile karıştırarak ekmek kırıntısı gibi oluncaya kadar yoğurun.
2.  Pul biber, rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri, tuz ve karabiberi ilave edin.
3.  Yumurtayı soğuk su ile çırpıp unlu karışıma ilave edin.
4.  Yumuşak bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
5.  Streç filme sarıp 30 dakika buzdolabında bekletin.
6.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
7.  Hamuru tart kalıbına yayıp çatalla üzerine birkaç delik açın.
8.  15 dakika pişirin.
9.  Domates sosu için, yapışmaz yüzeyli tavada domates, ince kıyılmış sarımsak, kekik, zeytinyağı, tuz ve karabiberi ara ara sallayarak 45 dakika pişirin.
10.  Patatesleri haşlayıp kabuğunu soyun.
11.  Püre şeklinde ezin.
12.  Kıyılmış sarımsak, zeytinyağı, kekik, yumurta, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
13.  Tulum peynirini ilave edip iyice karıştırın.
14.  Karışımı hamurun üzerine yayıp 30 dakika fırında pişirin.
15.  Fırından alıp üzerine domates sosunu ilave edin.
16.  Ilınınca servis yapın.
17. Nefis sebzeli kiş tarifi de notlarınız arasında kalsın.

tomato-and-ricotta-salata-bruschetta.name: Tomato And Ricotta Salata Bruschetta
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Place bread slices on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until toasted, about 5 minutes. Rub 1 side of the bread with the cut garlic.
Toss tomatoes, ricotta salata, olive oil, vinegar, onion, basil, salt, and pepper together in a bowl. Divide evenly over bread.

tomato-and-stracciatella-pizzas.name: Tomato And Stracciatella Pizzas

ingredients.item: (1000 grams) all-purpose flour plus more for shaping dough
Fine sea salt plus more for seasoning

ingredients.prep: undrained, puréed or crushed by hand

instructions: Whisk flour, salt, and yeast in a medium bowl. While stirring with a wooden spoon, gradually add 3 cups water; stir until well incorporated. Mix dough gently with your hands to bring it together and form into a rough ball. Transfer to a large clean bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let dough rise at room temperature (about 72°) in a draft-free area until surface is covered with tiny bubbles and dough has more than doubled in size, about 18 hours (time will vary depending on the temperature in the room).

Transfer dough to a floured work surface. Gently shape into a rough rectangle. Divide into 6 equal portions. Working with 1 portion at a time, gather 4 corners to center to create 4 folds. Turn seam side down and mold gently into a ball. Dust dough with flour; set aside on work surface or a floured baking sheet. Repeat with remaining portions.

Let dough rest, covered with plastic wrap or a damp kitchen towel, until soft and pliable, about 1 hour. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Wrap each dough ball separately in plastic wrap and chill. Unwrap and let rest at room temperature on a lightly floured work surface, covered with plastic wrap, for 2–3 hours before shaping.

During the last hour of dough's resting, prepare oven: If using a pizza stone, arrange a rack in upper third of oven and place stone on rack; preheat oven to its hottest setting, 500°–550°, for 1 hour. If using a baking sheet, arrange a rack in middle of oven and preheat to its hottest setting, 500°–550°. (You do not need to preheat the baking sheet.)
Working with 1 dough ball at a time, dust dough generously with flour and place on a floured work surface. Gently shape dough into a 10"–12" disk.

If using a pizza stone: When ready to bake, increase oven heat to broil. Sprinkle a pizza peel or rimless (or inverted rimmed) baking sheet lightly with flour. Place dough disk on prepared peel and spread about 3 Tbsp. crushed tomatoes over dough. Tear or crumble some mozzarella over top. Using small, quick back-and-forth movements, slide pizza from peel onto hot pizza stone. Broil pizza, rotating halfway, until bottom of crust is crisp and top is blistered, 5–7 minutes. Using peel, transfer to a work surface. Spoon a few dollops of stracciatella over pizza. Garnish with crushed red pepper flakes, oregano, and olive oil. Season to taste with salt. Slice pizza. Repeat, allowing pizza stone to reheat under broiler for 5 minutes between pizzas.

If using a baking sheet: Arrange dough disk on baking sheet; top with tomatoes and mozzarella. Bake pizza until bottom of crust is crisp and top is blistered, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a work surface. Garnish pizza and slice. Repeat with remaining pizzas.

tomato-and-sweet-onion-salad.name: Tomato And Sweet Onion Salad

ingredients.item: Sweet onion (such as vidalia or maui)

instructions: Combine tomatoes, onion, basil, chives, oil, vinegar, and sugar in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to combine.
DO AHEAD: Salad can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

tomato-and-tomatillo-salad.name: Tomato And Tomatillo Salad

ingredients.prep: husks removed and rinsed, or green tomatoes, halved and cut into 1/4-inch half moons (see notes)
divided; for table salt use half as much by volume
room temperature, torn into large chunks

instructions: Place chopped tomatoes and tomatillos in a colander set over a large bowl and season with 3/4 teaspoon kosher salt. Toss to coat. Set aside at room temperature to drain, tossing occasionally until tomatoes release their juices, a minimum of 15 minutes and up to 1 hour.
Discard juice from bowl and transfer tomatoes to now-empty large bowl.

In a separate bowl, combine shallots and vinegar, and let sit for 5 minutes, stirring halfway through. Pour shallots through a fine-mesh strainer set over a medium bowl (don't discard vinegar). Transfer shallots to large bowl with tomatoes and set aside.
Add agave or honey, oregano, mustard, garlic, pepper, and remaining 3/4 teaspoon salt to bowl with vinegar; whisk until combined. Slowly whisk in olive oil until smooth and emulsified.
Add 1/4 cup of vinaigrette to bowl with tomatoes and shallots; toss to combine. Transfer to serving bowl or platter.
Top with burrata, almonds, and basil. Drizzle remaining vinaigrette evenly over salad. Finish with freshly ground pepper and flaky sea salt, if desired. Serve immediately.

tomato-and-white-bean-salad-with-capers.name: Tomato And White Bean Salad With Capers
instructions: Whisk together anchovy, garlic, oil, vinegar, and capers in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add tomatoes, beans, red onion, and parsley; season with salt and pepper and toss to coat.

tomato-basil-bruschetta.name: Tomato Basil Bruschetta
instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (230°C).
Slice the baguette into ½-inch (1 cm) rounds and place on a baking sheet.
Brush both sides of the baguette slices with olive oil.
Bake for for 6 minutes until slightly crispy.
In a medium bowl, combine the tomatoes, minced garlic, balsamic vinegar, basil, salt, and pepper.
Rub the garlic into one side of the baguette slices, then spoon the tomato mixture evenly across the slices.
Enjoy!

tomato-basil-mozzarella-melt.name: Tomato Basil Mozzarella Melt
instructions: Place 6 Sister Schuberts Mini Baguettes on a baking sheet and bake rolls according to directions on package. Cool baguettes.
Decrease oven temperature to 191°C.

Carefully slice each Sister Schuberts Mini Baguette in half horizontally. Spread one side of each baguette with pesto. Continue to layer with tomatoes, fresh mozzarella and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Wrap each sandwich in a large piece of aluminum foil, place packages on baking sheet and bake 7 to 10 minutes or until sandwiches are warm and the cheese has melted. Unwrap sandwiches, open and add fresh basil leaves. Serve.

tomato-basil-panzanella.name: Tomato Basil Panzanella
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat oven to 175 degrees C (177°C). Spread bread cubes over a baking sheet.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Bake bread cubes in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Whisk olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, parsley, and salt in a large bowl. Fold in toasted bread, tomatoes, onion, olives, basil, and Parmesan cheese until vinegar dressing is evenly distributed.'}

tomato-basil-salad.name: Tomato Basil Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place tomato slices around edge of a plate, overlapping slightly. Tuck halved onion slices and basil leaves between tomato slices; place mozzarella cheese in center of the plate.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and black pepper together in a small bowl until well combined; drizzle over tomato salad.

tomato-basil-sausage-spaghetti.name: Tomato Basil Sausage Spaghetti
instructions: Heat a pot over medium-high heat. Add the sausage
Cook the sausage in the pot. Add the sausage and break up with a spoon into crumbles. Add the onion, salt, and pepper and cook until the onions are translucent and the sausage is starting to brown.
Add the marinara, milk, and basil and cook until sauce has thickened slightly.
Add the spaghetti and toss until evenly coated and sauce sticks to the noodles.
Enjoy!

tomato-basil-soup.name: Tomato Basil Soup
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the onion, celery, and garlic and sauté for 3 minutes, until the onion is translucent.
Add the salt, pepper, tomato paste, basil, crushed tomatoes, veggie broth, baking soda, and thyme. Bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Uncover and remove thyme.
Use an immersion or countertop blender to blend the soup until smooth. Let cool for 2 minutes.
Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with more basil.
Enjoy!

tomato-bisque.name: Tomato Bisque

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion, celery, carrot, and garlic; cook and stir until vegetables are tender and beginning to brown, about 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in flour and cook 1 minute more, stirring constantly.
Stir in chicken broth, tomatoes, sugar, tomato paste, and nutmeg. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and simmer until vegetables are very tender, about 10 minutes.
Puree soup in a blender or food processor until silky smooth or to your preferred consistency. Alternatively, you can use a stick blender and puree soup in the saucepan.
Stir cream into blended soup. Cook and stir over medium heat until bisque is hot. Season to taste with salt and pepper before serving.

tomato-bisque-on-steroids.name: Tomato Bisque On Steroids

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large, tall pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add onion and celery and season with salt and pepper. Cook until vegetables are slightly opaque, 5 to 8 minutes. Add garlic; cook and stir for 2 minutes, being careful not to brown garlic.

Pour in 2 cans of crushed tomatoes and chicken broth; bring to a boil. Stir in paprika, cayenne pepper, and chipotle pepper. Add rice and reduce heat to medium-low or low to maintain a simmer. Cook, stirring every few minutes, until rice is tender and celery has softened, about 45 minutes. Puree soup with an immersion blender until smooth. Stir in heavy cream and sugar, and season with salt and pepper as needed.

Stir in diced tomatoes and remaining can of crushed tomatoes. Cook over medium heat until warmed through, 5 to 7 minutes. Ladle soup into warm bowls. Spoon remaining cream in spirals on each bowl and top with basil.

tomato-bowl-teleculinaria.name: Tomato Bowl

ingredients.item: Orégãos secos ou frescos para decorar
Fatias de pão caseiro para acompanhar

instructions: Tempere as petingas com um pouco de sal. Limpe os tomates de pele e sementes e corte-os em cubos. Descasque e pique as cebolas e os alhos.

Leve ao lume um tacho com o louro, o azeite, os alhos e as cebolas. Acrescente o tomate e a massa de pimentão e deixe apurar. Cerca de 25 minutos depois, disponha as petingas por cima, tape e deixe cozinhar por mais 7 minutos, em lume baixo.
Retire o tacho do lume, transfira a petinga de tomatada para um prato e decore com orégãos secos ou frescos. Sirva de seguida com fatias de pão caseiro.

tomato-bread.name: Tomato Bread
instructions: Heat tomato juice and water in a saucepan over low heat until warm to the touch; pour into a large warmed bowl. Add yeast and honey; stir to dissolve yeast. Allow to rest until yeast is creamy, about 10 minutes.
Mix in oil, parsley, onion, garlic, carrot, and salt. Add 1 cup of the flour, and stir until smooth. Add more flour, until a firm dough is formed. Knead five minutes on a lightly floured surface.
Place dough in a greased bowl, and turn to coat the surface completely. Allow to rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour. Grease two 9x5-inch loaf pans.

Punch down dough and turn out onto a lightly floured surface; divide dough in half. Form two loaves and place in prepared loaf pans. Allow to rise until loaves have doubled in size, another 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (220 degrees C). Bakes loaves in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Remove loaves from pans and transfer to a wire rack to cool.

tomato-bread-with-basil-argiro.name: Tomato Bread With Basil

ingredients.item: 3πομοντόρια (μακρόστενες ντομάτες ξεφλουδισμένες χωρίς σπόρους και ψιλοκομμένες)
1κύβο μαγιά νωπή ή 1 φακελάκι μαγιά στιγμής
3πομοντόρια (μακρόστενες ντομάτες ξεφλουδισμένες χωρίς σπόρους και ψιλοκομμένες)
1κύβο μαγιά νωπή ή 1 φακελάκι μαγιά στιγμής

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε πρώτα το ελαιόλαδο σε μέτρια φωτιά και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι για 3΄- 4΄, να ροδίσει ελαφρά.
Προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες και σοτάρουμε για 2΄- 3΄ να μαραθούν ελαφρά.
Τα βάζουμε σε σουρωτήρι και πιέζουμε καλά με την ανάποδη της κουτάλας να αποβάλουν τα υγρά τους. Πρέπει να κρυώσουν καλά.
Βάζουμε τα υγρά των λαχανικών σε μπολ και προσθέτουμε 1/4 φλ. νερό.
Προσθέτουμε το αλάτι, το πιπέρι και τη ζάχαρη και ανακατεύουμε να διαλυθούν.

tomato-bredie.name: Tomato Bredie
instructions: Heat oil in a large, heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium-high heat.
Dredge lamb in flour; shake off excess.
Cook lamb in hot oil until browned all over. Transfer lamb to a plate, reserving drippings in the pan.

Cook and stir onion in drippings until soft, about 5 minutes. Mix in tomatoes. Return lamb chops to the saucepan; season with bay leaves, bouillon, salt, brown sugar, white peppercorns, black pepper, and Worcestershire sauce. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 1 hour and 15 minutes. Stir occasionally, making sure nothing sticks to the bottom of the pan.
Stir in potatoes; continue cooking until potatoes are cooked and meat is tender, about 45 minutes more.

tomato-bruschetta.name: Tomato Bruschetta

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: cut on a diagonal into  0.333"-thick slices

instructions: Combine 2 lb. ripe tomatoes (about 3 medium tomatoes), cored, halved, seeds removed, chopped and 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, in a large bowl. Season generously with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Add 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil and 1 Tbsp. red wine vinegar; toss to mix well. Cover and let tomatoes marinate at room temperature, stirring occasionally, for 2–3 hours to allow flavors to develop.

If toasting bread: Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil large cast-iron skillet over medium. Working in batches and using more oil as needed, toast 1 loaf ciabatta or baguette, cut on a diagonal into ⅓"-thick slices until slices are golden brown, flipping halfway, about 3 minutes per side.
If grilling bread: Prepare a grill for medium heat. Drizzle 2 Tbsp. olive oil (or more) over 1 loaf ciabatta or baguette, cut on a diagonal into ⅓"-thick slices. Grill ciabatta or baguette slices until char marks form, then flip and continue cooking, 2–3 minutes per side.

Transfer bread to a plate and rub one side with cut sides of remaining garlic clove; if using ciabatta, cut in half crosswise. Add ¼ cup fresh basil leaves, coarsely chopped, to chopped tomato mixture in mixing bowl and toss well. Season to taste with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Arrange bread on a platter. Spoon some bruschetta topping over each slice of bread.
Editor’s note: This bruschetta recipe was first printed in our August 2012 issue as ‘Tomato Crostini.’ Head this way for more of our best recipes for toasts and toppings →

tomato-butter.name: Tomato Butter
instructions: Preheat broiler.
Broil tomatoes until skins blister and juices are released; let cool.
Transfer to a food processor; season with salt.
Purée until coarsely chopped, then stir into butter.

tomato-caesar.name: Tomato Caesar
instructions: Purée anchovies, garlic, oil, lemon juice, mayonnaise, mustard, and 2 Tbsp. Parmesan in a blender until smooth. Season dressing with salt and pepper. (Or, finely chop anchovies and garlic and whisk together dressing in a medium bowl.)
Arrange tomatoes on a large plate; drizzle dressing over. Top with basil and shaved Parmesan; season generously with pepper.

tomato-chicken-curry.name: Tomato Chicken Curry

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts (about 1 0.5  pounds total), cut into 1-inch-thick pieces

instructions: Heat ghee in a large wide saucepan over medium-high. Add onion and cook, turning occasionally, until undersides are golden brown, about 2 minutes. Add ginger and garlic and cook, stirring, until softened, about 2 minutes; season with salt. Add garam masala, bay leaf, and red pepper and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in honey and cook until slightly caramelized, about 1 minute.

Add tomatoes along with juices and bring to a boil, smashing down on tomatoes with a wooden spoon until pieces are no bigger than 1". Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring often and scraping up browned bits from bottom of pot, until sauce thickens, 8–10 minutes. Add coconut milk and cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens, 20–25 minutes; taste and season with salt, if needed. Add chicken strips and reduce heat to low. Cook, partially covered, until chicken is cooked through, 8–10 minutes. Season with salt.
Stir yogurt, a big pinch of salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl.
Drizzle yogurt sauce over stew. Top with cilantro before serving.
Do Ahead: Curry (without yogurt sauce) can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

tomato-chicken-with-herbs-comedera.name: Tomato Chicken With Herbs

ingredients.item: Varias ramitas de cilantro y perejil frescos

instructions: Sofríe en una olla profunda la cebolla hasta que se comience a transparentar. Resérvala aparte.
En la misma olla, con un poquito más de aceite agrega las piezas de pollo y deja que se cocinen hasta sellarse bien por todos lados (voltéalas).
Incorpora las cebollas sofritas, la guindilla y los 3 tomates previamente pelados y cortados rústicamente, es decir, no importa si son julianas, cuadritos medianos o lo que quieras.
Luego de 5 minutos de cocción, agrega las hierbas picadas bien pequeñito.
Deja cocinar un rato. De ser necesario, agrega media taza de agua. Revisa la sal y pimienta por si le hace falta más.
Baja el fuego y tapa. Revuelve de vez en cuando.
En unos 30 minutos estará listo tu pollo entomatado.
Sirve con arroz blanco o con patatas horneadas.

tomato-choka.name: Tomato Choka

ingredients.prep: Cubanelle peppers, ají dulce peppers, or Anaheim chiles, coarsely chopped

instructions: Heat a broiler. Broil tomatoes in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet until skins are charred and flesh is beginning to collapse (cores should still be fresh and raw), about 3 minutes for smaller cherry or Sun Gold tomatoes and up to 15 minutes for larger heirloom or beefsteak tomatoes. Transfer to a shallow bowl or dish and gently crush with a fork or potato masher, removing any stems and tough bits; discard.
Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium-high. Remove from heat; add onion, garlic, peppers, chile, and thyme. Stir to combine and drizzle over tomatoes; season with salt and black pepper.
Just before serving, top with scallions, cilantro, and chives.
Do ahead: Choka can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.
Use the silky shreds of roti to scoop up all the various curries, chows and chokas that make up this roti lime feast.

tomato-chutney-step-by-step-comedera.name: Tomato Chutney, Step By Step
tomato-chutney-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Chutney de tomate, paso a paso
instructions: Pela los tomates y trocéalos groseramente. Pela el jengibre y rállalo. Pon los dos ingredientes en una olla o cazuela y añade el vinagre, el azúcar y la sal.
Abre las vainas de cardamomo e incorpóralas a la olla, añade también el cilantro, la pimienta, la mostaza y el chile al gusto.

Pon la olla al fuego y mezcla todos los ingredientes, lleva a ebullición y después baja el fuego, y cocina durante una hora aproximadamente, hasta que el jugo haya reducido y tengas una especie de mermelada con trocitos de tomate que se rompen fácilmente con la cuchara de madera.
Deja enfriar, espesará algo más, pela y pica la cebolla morada, pica también el cilantro fresco e incorpóralos al chutney.
Viértelo en un envase de vidrio con tapa hermética y refrigera.

tomato-chutney-bush-mini-puff-pastry-lez.name: Tomato Chutney-bush Mini Puff Pastry
instructions: 1. Tüm malzemeleri küçük doğrayıp reçel gibi pişirin.
2.  Milföyleri önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında iki tepsi arasında pişirin.
3.  Soğumuş domates chutney-büş mini milföylerin üzerine önce büş peynirini, sonra domates reçelini yerleştirip servis yapın.
4. Alternatif bir öneri arıyorsanız, peynirli mini milföy tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

tomato-cod-teleculinaria.name: Tomato Cod
instructions: Corte as cebolas em tiras finas e lamine os alhos.

Numa frigideira, junte 1/5 dl de azeite, as cebolas, os alhos, o colorau e a folha de louro. Cozinhe durante 2 minutos. Adicione os tomates cortados em pedaços, sem pele e sem sementes, o vinho e a polpa de tomate.
Num tacho à parte, coza as batatas em água e sal durante 8 minutos. Escorra e reserve.
Coloque o bacalhau demolhado num tabuleiro de loiça, regue-o com o azeite e leve ao forno pré-aquecido a 200ºc cerca de 10 minutos.
Retire o bacalhau do forno e sirva-o i com a batata cozida. Regue tudo com a cebolada de tomate que preparou.

tomato-crumbs-with-fried-fish-teleculina.name: Tomato Crumbs With Fried Fish
tomato-crumbs-with-fried-fish-teleculina.original_name: Migas de tomate com peixe frito
instructions: Corte o pão em pedaços pequenos, deite numa tigela, adicione água fria e deixe demolhar. Escorra muito bem a água e reserve o pão.

Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os numa frigideira com o azeite. Adicione o tomate e deixe refogar. Junte depois o pão, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva muito bem, até obter um preparado com a consistência de migas.

Corte o peixe em pedaços regulares, tempere com sal e pimenta e o sumo de limão. Passe por farinha, ovo batido e pão ralado e frite em óleo abundante e bem quente. Escorra sobre papel absorvente e sirva com as migas de tomate.

tomato-dipping-sauce-and-crackers-lezzet.name: Tomato Dipping Sauce And Crackers

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı zeytinyağlı kurutulmuş domates

instructions: 1. Sos için malzemelerin tümünü mutfak robotunda karıştırın.
2.  Kaseye alarak üzerine zeytinyağı gezdirin.
3.  Küp doğranmış kuru domates ve fesleğen ile süsleyin.
4.  Kraker için, malzemeleri karıştırıp yoğurun.
5.  Kıvam için gerekirse azar azar su ekleyin.
6.  30 dakika dinlendirin.
7.  İki yağlı kağıt arasında hamuru ince açın ve tepsiye yerleştirin.
8.  Pizza bıçağı ile kare dilimleyin ve 175 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Soğuduktan sonra sos ile birlikte servis yapın.

tomato-eggs-in-purgatory.name: Tomato Eggs In Purgatory
instructions: Chop tomatoes into small pieces and transfer to a small bowl along with all the juices. Mix in ½ tsp. salt.

Heat ¼ cup oil in a large skillet with a lid over medium-high. Add coriander seeds and cook, stirring, until fragrant and starting to pop, about 1 minute. Add harissa and cook, stirring, until fragrant and darkened in color, about 30 seconds. Add chickpeas and tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Cook, mashing up about half of the chickpeas with a wooden spoon, until sauce is reduced and you’re able to make a divot in the mixture, 8–10 minutes. Season with salt, then use a spoon to make little pockets for the eggs near the sides of the skillet.
Reduce heat to low and gently break eggs into pockets. Cover skillet and cook, rotating pan a few times for even heating, until eggs are set, 7–9 minutes.
Meanwhile, drizzle toasts with oil and rub with garlic halves.
Remove eggs from heat and shower with chives and almonds. Serve with garlic toast.

tomato-elbows-pequerecetas.name: Tomato Elbows

ingredients.item: 300 g de coditos de pasta (o macarrones)
500 ml de tomate triturado natural (2 tazas)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 cucharadita de azúcar (opcional, para corregir la acidez)
Queso parmesano o rallado al gusto (unas 4 cucharadas)

instructions: Cocemos los coditos en agua con sal siguiendo el tiempo del paquete (normalmente 8-10 minutos). Los escurrimos y reservamos.
Mientras se cuece la pasta, pelamos y picamos la cebolla y el ajo muy finitos
En una sartén grande, calentamos el aceite de oliva y sofreímos la cebolla y el ajo a fuego medio hasta que estén doraditos.
Añadimos el tomate triturado y una pizca de sal. Si está ácido, echamos también el azúcar. Dejamos cocinar la salsa unos 10-12 minutos, removiendo de vez en cuando
Cuando la salsa esté lista, añadimos la pasta escurrida y mezclamos bien durante un par de minutos para que se integre todo.
Servimos caliente, con queso por encima y, si nos gusta, unas hojas de albahaca

tomato-farrotto-with-sardines.name: Tomato Farrotto With Sardines

ingredients.prep: finely chopped, plus 2 Tbsp. fennel fronds
drained, bones removed, or 2 4-oz. cans good-quality tuna

ingredients.item: Chopped canned whole tomatoes with juices

instructions: Ingredient Info: Aleppo pepper, a slightly sweet Syrian pepper with a moderate heat level, is available at some specialty foods stores and wholespice.com. Semi-pearled farro is sold at Italian markets and natural foods and specialty foods stores.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add fennel, onion, garlic, fennel seed, and Aleppo pepper; season with salt and black pepper. Cook, stirring, until vegetables are tender and translucent, 8–10 minutes; remove from heat. Place the sardines in a single layer on a plate (if using tuna, break it up into small chunks and set out on plate) and spoon 2 tablespoons of the cooked fennel mixture atop the fish. Drizzle with lemon juice and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Set aside.

Return skillet to medium-high heat and stir in soaked farro. Cook, stirring often, 1 minute, then add 2 cups boiling water; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until farro is al dente, 35–40 minutes. Stir in chopped tomatoes and their juices and increase heat to high. Cook until the liquid is absorbed, 5–7 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Reserve ¾ cup tomato farroto for Farroto with Fried Egg.
Serve tomato farroto topped with sardines, vegetables, fennel fronds, and parsley.

tomato-fried-rice.name: Tomato Fried Rice

ingredients.item: . cherry and/or grape tomatoes of any and all colors
Chilled cooked long-grain white or brown rice

instructions: Trim dark green tops from scallions and thinly slice; set aside. Thinly slice white and pale green parts; set aside separately. Quarter any larger tomatoes and halve any small ones. Place about one-quarter of tomatoes in a small bowl; season generously with salt and toss to combine. Set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add reserved white and pale green parts of scallions and remaining three-quarters of tomatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and any liquid from tomatoes has evaporated, about 4 minutes. Mix in garlic and ginger; cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add rice and stir to separate grains. Cook just to heat rice through, about 3 minutes.

Scoot vegetables and rice to 1 side of skillet, then pour half of remaining sesame oil into pan. Add eggs and cook, stirring often, until just set, about 1 minute. Mix into vegetables and rice, then drizzle in soy sauce and cook, stirring, just until well combined.

Transfer fried rice to a large bowl or platter. Drain salted tomatoes, drizzle with olive oil, and spoon over rice. Sprinkle with reserved scallion tops and red pepper flakes (if using) and drizzle with remaining sesame oil. Finely grate zest from lemon over.

tomato-frittata.name: Tomato Frittata

ingredients.prep: whites and greens separated, finely chopped

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven and preheat broiler. Beat egg whites and yolks in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large ovenproof cast-iron or nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add spinach and scallion whites and cook until spinach is wilted, about 2 minutes. Pour eggs over spinach mixture, shaking pan to evenly distribute, and cook until edges and bottom are just set, about 30 seconds. Top with scallion greens and dill, then tomatoes and feta. Season lightly with salt and pepper and transfer skillet to oven. Broil until frittata is golden brown and center is set, about 4 minutes.

tomato-galette.name: Tomato Galette

ingredients.prep: cheddar, or gouda), finely grated (about 1 0.5 cups)

instructions: Pulse 2 cups flour and 1¼ tsp. kosher salt in a food processor to combine. Add butter and pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal with a few pea-size pieces of butter remaining.

Transfer mixture to a large bowl; drizzle with vinegar and ¼ cup ice water. Mix with a fork, adding more ice water by the tablespoonful as needed, just until a shaggy dough comes together. Turn out onto a work surface and lightly knead until no dry spots remain (be careful not to overwork). Pat into a disk and wrap in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 400°. Gently toss tomatoes, garlic, and remaining 1 tsp. kosher salt in a large bowl. Let sit 5 minutes (tomatoes will start releasing some liquid). Drain tomato mixture and transfer to paper towels.

Unwrap dough and roll out on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper to a 14" round about ⅛" thick. Transfer on parchment to a baking sheet. Scatter cheese over dough, leaving a 1½" border. Arrange tomatoes and garlic over cheese. Bring edges of dough up and over filling, overlapping as needed to create about a 1½" border; brush dough with egg. Sprinkle tomatoes with sea salt and pepper. Chill in freezer 10 minutes.
Bake galette, rotating once, until crust is golden brown and cooked through, 55–65 minutes. Let cool slightly on baking sheet. Finely grate zest from lemon over galette; sprinkle with chives.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

tomato-gravy.name: Tomato Gravy

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Melt ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add 2 medium onions, finely chopped, and 2 sprigs thyme; cook, stirring often, until onions are soft and translucent, about 10 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour; stir constantly for 3 minutes.

Add 1 (28-oz.) can crushed tomatoes with juices; cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until thickened and flavors meld, about 30 minutes. Discard thyme. Stir in ⅓ cup thinly sliced scallions, 3 Tbsp. heavy cream, and ⅛ tsp. cayenne pepper. Season to taste with kosher salt, freshly ground black pepper, and more cayenne, if desired. 

Editor’s note: This Southern tomato gravy recipe was first printed in our November 2011 issue. Head this way for more of our best recipes for canned tomatoes →

tomato-green-tart-lezzet.name: Tomato Green Tart
instructions: 1. Maydanoz ve dereotunu temizleyip robotta kıyın.
2.  1 çorba kaşığı tereyağını ayırıp kalanı oda ısısında yumuşatın ve küçük küçük doğrayın.
3.  Unu eleyip hamur yoğurma kabına alın.
4.  Doğranmış tereyağı, maydanoz, dereotu ve tuz ilave edip düzgün bir hamur yoğurun.
5.  Top şekli verip streç folyoya sarın.
6.  Buzdolabında 30 dakika bekletin.
7. Hamuru buzdolabından çıkarıp merdane ile 3 mm kalınlığında açın.
8.  Her biri 15 cm çapında 4 hamur kesin.
9.  Artan hamurlardan ince şeritler hazırlayıp daire şeklindeki hamurların üzerini süsleyin.
10.  Hamurları yağlanmış fırın tepsisine yerleştirip önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında pişirin.
11. Taze soğanları temizleyip ince ince doğrayın.
12.  Ayırdığınız tereyağını tavada eritip soğanı kavurun.
13.  Tuzla tatlandırıp ocaktan alın.
14.  Ilınınca pişen hamurların üzerine paylaştırın.
15. Labne peynirle lor peynirini bir kapta iyice karıştırın.
16.  Peynirli karışımı soğanın üzerini örtecek şekilde yayın.
17.  Domatesleri dilimleyip taze soğan sapıyla birlikte tartların üzerini süsleyin.
18.  Sıcak fırında peynir hafif eriyinceye kadar 2-3 dakika pişirin.
19.  Üzerlerine çöreotu ve kırmızı pul biber serpiştirin.
20.  Sıcak veya ılık olarak servis yapın.

tomato-grilled-cheese-soup.name: Tomato Grilled-cheese Soup

ingredients.prep: plus  0.5 cup (1 stick) at room temperature

instructions: Heat 4 Tbsp. butter in a Dutch oven or medium stockpot over medium heat. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until softened and lightly browned around the edges, 8–10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring to coat onion, until tomato paste is slightly darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Add canned tomatoes, vegetable broth, thyme, bay leaf, and sugar and bring to a simmer. Season with salt and pepper and cook until flavors are melded, 35–40 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in cream. Remove thyme stems and bay leaf and let cool slightly. Working in batches, purée in a blender until smooth.

Heat a dry skillet, preferably cast-iron, over medium heat. Dividing evenly, spread room-temperature butter over bread slices. Top unbuttered side of 8 slices with cheddar, dividing evenly. Top with remaining bread, buttered side up, and cook, turning once, until bread is golden brown and cheese is melted, about 3 minutes per side. Cut sandwiches into soldiers and serve alongside hot soup for dipping.

tomato-kebab-lezzet.name: Tomato Kebab
instructions: 1. Lezzet yemek tarifleri özel günlerinizde yanınızda.
2.  Kıymayı geniş bir kaseye alın.
3.  Soğanı rendeleyip ekleyin.
4.  Tuz, karabiber, pul biber, ince kıyılmış maydanoz ilave edip yoğurun.
5. Kıymadan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar kopartıp oval şekil verin.
6.  Çöp şişlere domates ve köfteleri dizin.
7.  Fırın ızgarasında önlü arkalı kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
8. Soğanı piyazlık doğrayıp sumakla karıştırın.
9.  Çarliston biberleri fırın ızgarasında pişirin.
10.  Kebapları servis tabağına alın.
11.  Soğan, maydanoz ve biberlerle sıcak servis yapın.

tomato-martini.name: Tomato Martini
instructions: Combine 2–3 large basil leaves, ½ cup Sun Gold or cherry tomatoes (about 5), halved, a pinch of kosher salt, and a pinch of sugar in a cocktail shaker or large glass. Smash with a muddler until tomatoes are broken up and pulpy, about 30 seconds. Add 2 oz. gin, 1 oz. dry vermouth, and 1 cup ice and stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain cocktail through a fine-mesh sieve into a chilled martini glass (this will remove any tomato bits and seeds). Thread remaining 1 whole cherry tomato onto a cocktail pick and garnish cocktail.

tomato-meatballs-argiro.name: Tomato Meatballs

ingredients.item: 1 φλ.κεφαλοτύρι πικάντικο τριμμένο (ή σκληρή φέτα σε τρίμματα)
1 φλ.κεφαλοτύρι πικάντικο τριμμένο (ή σκληρή φέτα σε τρίμματα)

instructions: Πλένουμε τις ντομάτες, τις ψιλοκόβουμε με το μαχαίρι και τις βάζουμε σε μπολ.
Προσθέτουμε τα κρεμμύδια, ξερά και φρέσκα, και τ’ ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλι για να μαραθούν απ’ την ντομάτα.
Ρίχνουμε τα μυρωδικά, τη ρίγανη, το θυμάρι, το δυόσμο, και μετά το τυρί, το αυγό, το μπούκοβο και αλατοπιπερώνουμε.
Λίγο-λίγο ανακατεύοντας προσθέτουμε και το αλεύρι μέχρι να έχουμε έναν αραιό χυλό.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και ρίχνουμε κουταλιά-κουταλιά το μείγμα.
Τηγανίζουμε μέχρι να ροδίσουν, περίπου 2-3΄ από κάθε πλευρά.
Αφήνουμε τους ντοματοκεφτέδες σε απορροφητικό χαρτί να στραγγίσουν και τους σερβίρουμε.

tomato-mozzarella-garlic-bread-dippers.name: Tomato Mozzarella Garlic Bread Dippers
instructions: Soften the butter and mix it with the minced garlic.
Cut the loaf of bread in half lengthwise. Spread the garlic butter on the bread.
Top with mozzarella, and bake at 204°C (205°C) for 15 minutes.  Top with tomatoes and basil, sprinkle on salt and pepper.
For the dipping sauce, mix equal parts of balsamic vinegar and olive oil, and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
Slice into strips.
Enjoy!

tomato-mozzarella-salad.name: Tomato Mozzarella Salad
instructions: Place tomato slices, alternating with mozzarella slices, on a large serving platter.
Combine oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper in a jar with a tight-fitting lid; shake well.
Drizzle over tomatoes and mozzarella; sprinkle with basil.
Enjoy!

tomato-omelet-lezzet.name: Tomato Omelet
instructions: 1. Domatesleri soyup rendeleyin ve tel süzgeçten geçirin.
2.  Yumurtaları bir kaba kırın.
3.  Rendelenmiş domates, un, salça, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip düzgün bir karışım elde edene kadar hafif çırpın.
4. Tereyağını tavada eritip yumurtalı karışımı ilave edin.
5.  Tavayı ileri geri sallayarak omletin eşit yayılmasını sağlayın.
6.  Bir tarafı pişince diğer tarafını çevirin.
7. Maydanoz ve dereotunu temizleyip doğrayın.
8.  Lor peyniri, labne peyniri, maydanoz ve dereotunu çukur bir kapta karıştırın.
9. Omleti ocaktan alın ve üzerine peynirli karışımı döküp yayın.
10.  Tahta spatula ile omleti ikiye katlayın.
11. Servis tabağına alıp enine ortadan ikiye kesin.
12.  Servis yapın.

tomato-omelette-pequerecetas.name: Tomato Omelette

ingredients.item: 1 cebolla roja (o cualquier otra que no pique)
Varias cucharadas de harina (cantidad variable, según el líquido que suelten los tomates)

instructions: Cortamos en daditos los tomates y la cebolla, y picamos el perejil. Ponemos en un bol y salpimentamos. Añadimos los huevos batidos y varias cucharadas de harina (según el líquido que hayan soltado los tomates) las suficientes para que el líquido de la mezcla no sea demasiado ligero, sino ligeramente pegajoso, que mantenga unidos los ingredientes.
En una sartén grande o en la plancha, ponemos un hilito de aceite y vamos echando cucharadas de masa para hacer las tortillitas. Cuando estén hechas por un lado, les damos la vuelta.
Servimos con salsa de yogur.

tomato-omelette-recipe-comedera.name: Tomato Omelette Recipe

ingredients.item: Unas hojas de albahaca (perejil o cilantro frescos, picadas)

instructions: Empieza la receta rompiendo los huevos en un bol y batiéndolos con entusiasmo hasta que queden bien mezclados. Añade una pizca de sal y pimienta para darles vida.
Toma un tomate bien maduro y córtalo en cubos pequeños. Si eres fan de la suavidad, puedes pelar el tomate, pero no es obligatorio.
Pon a calentar una sartén antiadherente a fuego medio y añade el aceite de oliva. Una vez caliente, echa los cubos de tomate y saltea por unos minutos hasta que se vean tiernos y jugosos.
Vierte los huevos batidos sobre los tomates en la sartén y deja que se cocinen tranquilamente. No los muevas mucho, deja que los bordes se cuajen mientras el centro permanece ligeramente líquido.

Esparce un poco de queso fresco sobre una mitad del omelette si te gusta el toque cremoso. Con una espátula, dobla cuidadosamente la otra mitad del omelette sobre el relleno y cocina un minuto más para que todo quede bien derretido y delicioso.
Ahora sólo queda poner la omelette en un plato, espolvorea con las hierbas frescas y disfruta de un desayuno que te hará sentir como un chef profesional.

tomato-pancakes-lezzet.name: Tomato Pancakes
instructions: 1. Sofralarınızı süsleyecek hem hafif hem de lezzetli domates mücveri tarifiDomateslerin çekirdeklerini ayıklayın.
2.  İnce küp doğrayın.
3.  Kızartmak için yağ hariç tüm malzemeleri ekleyip karıştırın ve bulamaç haline getirin.
4.  Yağı iyice kızdırın ve birer kaşık karışımdan atıp kızartın.
5.  Havlu kağıt ile yağını çektirin.
6.  Ilık servis edin.

tomato-panzanella-with-creamy-any-pickle.name: Tomato Panzanella With Creamy Any-pickle Dressing

ingredients.prep: such as ciabatta or baguette; 6–10 oz.

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Toss 6 cups 1" pieces torn crusty bread (such as ciabatta or baguette; 6–10 oz.), ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt on a rimmed baking sheet to coat bread evenly. Bake until edges of bread are golden, 8–10 minutes. Let croutons cool on baking sheet.

Meanwhile, cut cores out of 1½ lb. mixed medium or large tomatoes, preferably heirloom (3–4) and cut into 1½" pieces and/or wedges. Transfer to a large bowl, add 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and gently toss to combine. Let sit at room temperature 20 minutes.
Add 2 tsp. red wine vinegar and remaining 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil to seasoned tomatoes and gently toss to coat. Add croutons and gently toss again. Let panzanella sit 5 minutes.
Add 1 cup (loosely packed) torn basil leaves and ¼ cup (loosely packed) torn dill fronds to panzanella and gently toss to distribute evenly. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Spread 1 cup Creamy Any-Pickle Dressing on a platter and pile panzanella on top. Season with freshly ground pepper and top with more torn basil leaves and torn dill fronds.

tomato-pasta-recipe-lezzet.name: Tomato Pasta Recipe
instructions: 1. Öncelikle makarnayı bol tuzlu suda, diri kalacak şekilde haşlayın.
2.  Haşlandıktan sonra süzüp kenara alın.
3.  Domateslerin kabuklarını isteğe bağlı olarak soyun ve küçük parçalar halinde doğrayın.
4.  Sarımsakları ince ince kıyın.
5. Geniş bir tavada sıvı yağı ısıtın, sarımsakları ekleyip hafifçe kokusu çıkana kadar çevirin.
6.  Ardından doğranmış domatesleri ilave edin ve domatesler suyunu salıp yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
7.  Domatesler çok lifliyse, sosu daha pürüzsüz hale getirmek için blenderdan geçirebilirsiniz.
8. Sos kıvam aldıktan sonra kremayı ekleyin, karıştırarak birkaç dakika daha pişirin.
9.  Tuz, karabiber, kırmızı biber ve fesleğeni ilave edip lezzetleri birleştirin.
10.  Son olarak haşlanmış makarnayı tavaya ekleyin ve sosla iyice harmanlayın.
11. Ocaktan almadan önce rendelenmiş kaşar peynirini ekleyip karıştırın ve servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-paste-argiro.name: Tomato Paste
instructions: Ο χειροποίητος παραδοσιακός, για να γίνει τέλειος διαλέγουμε ώριμες, σφιχτές ντομάτες, χωρίς σημάδια και χτυπήματα.
Αφού πλύνουμε καλά τις ντομάτες, τις χαράζουμε ελαφρώς (τη φλούδα μόνο) σταυρωτά στο πίσω μέρος.
Τις ζεματάμε, βουτώντας τες για 30” σε μπόλικο νερό που βράζει. Δεν τις βάζουμε όλες μαζί. Λίγες λίγες για να μην πέσει η θερμοκρασία του νερού και μουλιάσουν.

Με μία τρυπητή κουτάλα τις αφαιρούμε τις ζεματισμένες ντομάτες και τις βάζουμε αμέσως σε μία λεκάνη με κρύο νερό και παγάκια, για να κοπεί ο βρασμός τους και να μη μαλακώσουν πολύ. Τις αφήνουμε στο κρύο νερό για λίγα λεπτά, ίσα να πέσει η θερμοκρασία τους.
Εκεί που χαράξαμε την κάθε ντομάτα, τραβάμε απαλά τη φλούδα και τις ξεφλουδίζουμε.
Αραδιάζουμε σε ένα βαθύ ταψί όλες τις ξεφλουδισμένες ντομάτες. Τις κόβουμε στη μέση και αφαιρούμε τους σπόρους τους με ένα κουτάλι.

Τοποθετούμε τα φιλέτα ντομάτας στον κάδο του μούλτι. Τους σπόρους τους αφήνουμε στο ταψί με τα υπόλοιπα υγρά. Στη συνέχεια, στραγγίζουμε καλά όλα τα υγρά του ταψιού με πολύ λεπτό σουρωτήρι και τα προσθέτουμε στο μούλτι με τις ντομάτες.
Αλέθουμε τις ντομάτες καλά σε πουρέ, τον οποίο βάζουμε σε μία βαθιά κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση. Η κατσαρόλα πρέπει να είναι μεγάλη, γιατί φουσκώνει και χύνεται.

Σε δυνατή φωτιά αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση ο πελτές για 30 λεπτά. Μόλις αρχίσει να πυκνώνει χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά για να μην κολλήσει. Ανακατεύουμε ανά διαστήματα με ξύλινη κουτάλα. Αφήνουμε να σιγοβράσει σε χαμηλή φωτιά για 30 λεπτά επιπλέον.

Ο πελτές ντομάτας είναι έτοιμος όταν πυκνώσει καλά και τραβώντας την κουτάλα, στη βάση της κατσαρόλας δε γεμίζει με υγρά της ντομάτας, δηλαδή αφήνει κενό εκεί που τρίψαμε με την κουτάλα-ακριβώς όπως κάνουμε και με τις μαρμελάδες.

tomato-paste-for-breakfast-lezzet.name: Tomato Paste For Breakfast
instructions: 1. Kırmızı biberleri yıkayın ve fırın ızgarasında közleyin.
2.  Kabuklarını soyup çekirdeklerini çıkararak mutfak robotunda ezin.
3. Biber salçası, bayat ekmek içi, dövülmüş ceviz, ince kıyılmış sarımsak, karabiber, tuz ve zeytinyağı ilave ederek tekrar mutfak robotunda karıştırın.
4. Kavanoza aktarıp üzerine zeytinyağı gezdirerek buzdolabında muhafaza edin.
5.  Ekmek dilimlerinin üzerine sürüp servis yapın.

tomato-paste-meatballs-lezzet.name: Tomato Paste Meatballs
instructions: 1. Brüksel lahanaları temizleyin.
2. Tencereye alıp üzerini geçecek kadar su ve 1 tatlı kaşığı kadar sirke ekleyin.
3. Lahanaları bu suda 5 dakika kadar haşlayıp süzün.
4. Soğanları soyup rendeleyin.
5.  Maydanozu temizleyip kıyın.
6.  Ekmek içlerini su ile ıslattıktan sonra avucunuzun içinde sıkıp ufalayın.
7. Kıymayı yoğurma kabına alın.
8.  Rendelenmiş soğan,kıyılmış maydanoz,ufalanmış ekmek içi,1 yumurta,tuz ve baharatı ekleyip yoğurun.
9. Kıymalı harçtan küçük yumurta büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avucunuzun içinde yuvarlak yassı köfteler elde edin.
10. Teflon bir tavada mısırözü yağını ısıtıp köfteleri çevirerek kızartın.
11. Salçalı sos için, domatesi soyup küp şeklinde doğrayın.
12. Biberleri temizleyip halka halka doğrayın.
13.  Sarımsakları soyup kıyın.
14.  Margarini sos tenceresinde ısıtın.
15.  Salçalar, domates suyu, küp şeklinde kesilmiş domates,biberler, sıcak su ve kıyılmış sarımsakları ekleyip sos kıvamına gelinceYe kadar pişirin.
16.  Ocaktan alıp haşlanmış mısırı ilave edin.
17. Kızarmış köfteleri ve haşlanmış brüksel lahanalarını yuvarlak fırın tepsisine yayın.
18.  Üzerine salçalı sosu döküp folyo ile kapatın.
19.  Servis yapmadan önce 5 dakika kadar fırında ısıtıp sıcak servis yapın.
20. Daha fazlası için pratik köfte tariflerine göz atın.

tomato-paste-rice-recipe-lezzet.name: Tomato Paste Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: Sadece domates salçası yerine yarı yarıya domates ve biber salçası kullanabilirsiniz.
Sıvı yağın bir kısmını tereyağı ile değiştirerek daha zengin bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
İçine küçük küpler halinde doğranmış havuç ekleyerek renkli bir pilav hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Bezelye ilavesiyle sebzeli salçalı pilav yapabilirsiniz.
Suyun bir kısmını tavuk suyu ile değiştirerek daha lezzetli bir sonuç alabilirsiniz.
Baharat olarak karabiber veya çok az pul biber ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Pirinci bol suyla yıkayın ve nişastası gidene kadar birkaç kez sudan geçirin.
2.  Ardından 15–20 dakika ılık suda bekletip süzün.
3. Tencereye sıvı yağı alın.
4.  Tel şehriyeyi ekleyip orta ateşte rengi hafif koyulaşana kadar kavurun.
5. Domates salçasını ilave edin ve kokusu çıkana kadar birkaç dakika çevirin.
6. Süzülmüş pirinci tencereye ekleyin.
7.  2–3 dakika karıştırarak kavurun.
8. Tuzunu ekleyin ve sıcak suyu ilave edin.
9. Kaynamaya başladıktan sonra ocağın altını kısın ve kapağı kapalı şekilde suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
10. Ocaktan aldıktan sonra üzerine temiz bir bez veya kağıt havlu koyup kapağını kapatın ve 10–15 dakika demlenmeye bırakın.
11. Demlenen pilavı nazikçe karıştırarak servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-pesto-parchment-baked-chicken.name: Tomato Pesto Parchment-baked Chicken

ingredients.prep: or aluminium foil, 12x18 inches (30.5 x 46 cm)

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
Fold the parchment paper in half, then open up.
Trim the ends of the asparagus and lay them on one half of the parchment paper.
Drizzle on oil and sprinkle on salt and pepper.
Lay the chicken on the asparagus, season with salt and pepper, and spread on the pesto. Top with tomato slices.
Fold the parchment paper over the chicken, and cinch the paper together by folding it over itself along the edges.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until internal temperature of chicken reaches 165˚F (75˚C).
Enjoy!

tomato-pesto-salmon.name: Tomato Pesto Salmon
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Add the zucchini to the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Lay the salmon on top the zucchini, then spread the pesto on top of the salmon. Top with the tomatoes.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, until the vegetables are tender and the salmon flakes easily when nudged with a fork.
Enjoy!

tomato-pie.name: Tomato Pie

ingredients.prep: or more to taste, cut into wedges

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Press pie crust into a 9-inch round pan or glass pie plate; fold excess dough under and press to form a thick edge. Cover edges with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until light brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Sprinkle ½ cup mozzarella cheese over bottom. Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Drain tomato wedges in a colander or on paper towels; arrange over mozzarella cheese. Sprinkle with chopped basil and garlic.
Combine remaining 1 cup mozzarella cheese, mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, and white pepper in a bowl; spread over tomatoes but do not spread onto crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and bubbly, 35 to 40 minutes. Garnish with whole basil leaves and serve warm.

tomato-pie-with-cheesy-herb-leaf-argiro.name: Tomato Pie With Cheesy Herb Leaf

ingredients.item: 50 grτριμμένη παρμεζάνα ή άλλο σκληρό τυρί
Λίγες ελιές χωρίς κουκούτσια κομμένες σε φέτες
50 grτριμμένη παρμεζάνα ή άλλο σκληρό τυρί
Λίγες ελιές χωρίς κουκούτσια κομμένες σε φέτες

instructions: Φτιάχνουμε πρώτα την τυρένια ζύμη για την ντοματόπιτα.
Βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά σε μπολ και τα ζυμώνουμε λίγο να μαζευτούν σε μπάλα.
Απλώνουμε τη ζύμη σε λεπτή στρώση πιέζοντας με τα δάχτυλα σε μεγάλο λαδωμένο ταψί. (Το ταψί της κουζίνας είναι ιδανικό).
Πασπαλίζουμε με τη φρυγανιά όλη την ζύμη.

Κόβουμε τις ντομάτες σε λεπτές φέτες, αφαιρούμε τους σπόρους, τις αλατίζουμε και τις αφήνουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί για 10′ να στραγγίσουν. Τις στρώνουμε πάνω στο φύλλο και πασπαλίζουμε με τη φέτα, τον ανθό αλατιού και το πιπέρι. Βάζουμε τις ελιές και ραντίζουμε με το ελαιόλαδο.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στον αέρα στους 170ºC για περίπου 35′-40′ μέχρι να ροδίσει η ζύμη. Στο τελευταίο δεκάλεπτο προσθέτουμε τα μυρωδικά.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί 10′ για να σταθεροποιηθεί και σερβίρουμε την πίτα ζεστή η κρύα.

tomato-rasam.name: Tomato Rasam
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the mustard seeds. As they start to sputter, add the curry leaves and tomato then season with cumin, pepper, red pepper flakes, turmeric and garlic. Pour in the water and bring to a boil. Stir in tamarind paste, adjusting to taste if you want, and season with salt. Simmer for about 2 minutes.
Ladle into bowls and garnish with cilantro to serve. Drink it like soup or eat it with rice.

tomato-rice.name: Tomato Rice

ingredients.prep: halved crosswise, seeds removed, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Long-grain white rice (such as basmati or jasmine)

instructions: Heat oil in a medium pot over medium. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add garlic, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until garlic is softened and onion is lightly charred around the edges, about 5 minutes.

Stir tomato paste into onion mixture and cook, stirring often, until slightly darkened in color and beginning to stick to bottom of pot, about 3 minutes. Add tomatoes and cook, still stirring, until tomatoes burst and mixture starts to thicken, about 5 minutes. Add rice, cinnamon, and turmeric and cook, stirring, until spices are fragrant, about 30 seconds.

Pour 2¼ cups water into pot, give the mixture a stir, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cover pot. Let steam until water is absorbed and rice is cooked through, 20–25 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit (still covered) 10 minutes. Uncover, add butter, and fluff with a fork.
Serve topped with herbs and dollops of yogurt.

tomato-rice-pilaf-recipe-lezzet.name: Tomato Rice Pilaf Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 su bardağı baldo pirinç, yıkanmış ve süzülmüş
2 adet orta boy domates, rendelenmiş veya 1 su bardağı domates püresi
2 yemek kaşığı sıvı yağ veya tereyağı
3 su bardağı sıcak su veya tavuk suyu
Domatesin yanında havuç, kırmızı biber, bezelye veya kabak ekleyerek pilavı daha renkli ve besleyici hale getirebilirsiniz.
Sebzeleri pirinçle birlikte değil, ayrı soteleyip son aşamada eklemek renk ve dokuyu korur.
Tuz ve karabiber dışında pul biber, kekik, kimyon veya kuru fesleğen ekleyerek pilavın aromasını zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Hafif acılık isteyenler için pul biber miktarını artırabilirsiniz.
Pilavın üzerine kavrulmuş badem, fıstık veya ceviz ekleyerek ekstra kıtır ve aroma kazandırabilirsiniz.
Kuruyemişleri pilav piştikten sonra eklemek en iyi sonucu verir.
Pilava haşlanmış nohut veya kırmızı mercimek ekleyerek protein ve lif değerini artırabilirsiniz.
Hem besleyici hem de doyurucu bir öğün elde edersiniz.
Beyaz pirinç yerine esmer pirinç, bulgur veya karabuğday kullanabilirsiniz.
Lif oranı yüksek ve daha tok tutan bir pilav elde edersiniz.
Pilav piştikten sonra birkaç damla taze limon suyu veya biraz domates sosu ekleyerek hafif ekşi ve aromatik bir tat katabilirsiniz.
Yağı tamamen zeytinyağı ile değiştirebilir veya tereyağını artırarak daha yoğun aroma elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencerede sıvı yağı veya tereyağını ısıtın.
2. Rendelenmiş domates veya domates püresini tencereye ekleyin.
3. 2–3 dakika kavurarak domatesin çiğ kokusunu giderin.
4. Yıkanmış ve süzülmüş pirinci ekleyin, 1–2 dakika kavurun.
5. Pirinç domates ve yağ ile iyice karışsın.
6. Sıcak suyu veya tavuk suyunu, tuz, karabiber ve isteğe bağlı pul biberi ekleyin.
7. Kaynamaya başladıktan sonra tencerenin kapağını kapatın, kısık ateşte 15–20 dakika pişirin.
8. Ocaktan aldıktan sonra tencerenin kapağını 5 dakika kapalı tutun, pirinçler aromayı iyice çeksin.
9. Pilavı hafifçe karıştırın, üzerine kıyılmış maydanoz serpiştirerek sıcak servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-ricotta-tartine.name: Tomato Ricotta Tartine
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine tomatoes, basil, McCormick Paprika, salt, and pepper.
Spread ricotta on bread.
Top with tomato salad.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Enjoy!

tomato-risotto.name: Tomato Risotto

ingredients.item: . grated parmesan plus more for serving
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring 6 cups water to a boil over medium heat; remove from heat, cover and keep warm.

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat; add onion and cook, stirring often, until soft, about 5 minutes. Add rice and cook, stirring constantly, 2 minutes. Add wine and cook, stirring constantly, until evaporated, about 1 minute. Add ½ cup water and cook, stirring often, until water is absorbed. Continue adding water by ½-cupfuls, stirring often, until rice is tender but still firm to the bite, 20–25 minutes. (You may not need all the water).
Mix in Tomato Water, butter, and 2 Tbsp. Parmesan; season with salt and pepper. Simmer, stirring often, until liquid is mostly absorbed, about 2 minutes. Mix in Oil-Poached Tomatoes.
Serve risotto topped with more Parmesan.

tomato-salad-lezzet.name: Tomato Salad
instructions: 1. Domatesleri iri, soğanları halka doğrayıp bir servis kasesine alın.
2.  Sosu için soya sosu ve zeytinyağını bir kasede karıştırın.
3.  Salatanın üzerine gezdirip servis yapın.

tomato-salad-on-puff-pastry-lezzet.name: Tomato Salad On Puff Pastry
instructions: 1. Milföy hamurlarını çatalla birkaç yerinden delin.
2.  Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizip önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
3.  Domatesleri ve yeşillikleri bol suyla yıkayıp suyunu süzün.
4.  Domatesleri ikiye kesip yeşillikleri yaprak yaprak ayırın.
5.  Domatesleri bir kaseye alıp üzerine zeytinyağı, limon suyu ve tuz ekleyip harmanlayın.
6.  Kızarmış milföylerin üzerine domates salatasını paylaştırın.
7.  Reyhan ve fesleğen yapraklarına, ufalanmış lor peyniri ile rendelenmiş eski kaşar peyniri ilave edip karabiber serpin.
8.  Servis yapın.

tomato-salad-recipe-comedera.name: Tomato Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cucharadas de orégano (albahaca ú otra hierba de tu preferencia)
Una pizca de pimienta negra recién molida

instructions: Para empezar, lavar bien los tomates. Yo me aseguro de eliminar cualquier residuo, remojándolos con agua y un chorro de vinagre (blanco) después de lavarlos.
Picar los tomates en rueda delgadas y acomodarlos en un bol o plato grande. Hay quienes prefieren pelarlos antes de picar, pero para mi gusto la piel les deja más sabor, nutrientes y fibra.
Pelar el ajo, y luego triturarlo o picarlo en cubo muy pequeños.
Esparcir el ajo sobre las ruedas de tomate. Hay que cuidar que los trozos sean realmente pequeños para que el gusto quede uniforme y nadie termine con un bocado sorpresa de ajo tamaño irregular.
Espolvorear la ensalada con sal y pimienta al gusto.

Cubrir con un hilo de aceite de oliva, más o menos grueso según el gusto personal, y si se ha decidido utilizar vinagre balsámico, otro de hilo de este último. En caso de añadir más ingredientes a la receta básica de ensalada de tomates, se recomienda moderar la adición de vinagre, para evitar la competencia de sabores.

tomato-salad-with-basil-dressing.name: Tomato Salad With Basil Dressing

ingredients.prep: some sliced, some cut into wedges

instructions: Cook oil, shallot, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until shallots and garlic begin to turn golden, 7–9 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in anchovies, if using (they’ll dissolve in the oil quickly), and basil.
Toss tomatoes with vinegar and a pinch of kosher salt in a medium bowl. Transfer to a platter and pour warm dressing over. Finely grate lemon zest on top and sprinkle with sea salt.

tomato-salad-with-basil-vinaigrette.name: Tomato Salad With Basil Vinaigrette
instructions: Place 2 lb. mixed heirloom tomatoes, cut into wedges, in a fine-mesh sieve set over a medium bowl (to catch tomato water); season liberally with kosher salt and toss to distribute. Let sit 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook 1 cup (packed) basil leaves in a small saucepan of boiling salted water, stirring, 30 seconds. Drain and gently press to remove excess water.

Transfer basil to a small food processor or blender, add 3 Tbsp. grapeseed or vegetable oil, and process until smooth. Pour basil oil through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl and press on solids to extract as much basil as possible; discard solids. Whisk in 1 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar and 2 Tbsp. tomato water to combine.

Transfer tomatoes to a medium bowl and drizzle half of dressing over; toss to combine. Transfer to a platter or shallow bowls, top with one 8-oz. ball burrata or fresh mozzarella, torn into large pieces, and drizzle with remaining dressing. Scatter more basil over; season with freshly ground black pepper.

tomato-salad-with-blue-cheese-and-crispy.name: Tomato Salad With Blue Cheese And Crispy Shallots

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Whisk oil, vinegar, mustard, and honey in a small bowl until smooth. Season vinaigrette with salt and pepper.

Arrange lettuce and tomatoes in shallow bowls or on plates and drizzle vinaigrette over; season with salt. Top with blue cheese and fried shallots.
Do ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature and whisk before using.

tomato-salad-with-cardamom.name: Tomato Salad With Cardamom
instructions: Combine tomatoes and pickled chiles in a large bowl. Whisk garlic, lemon juice, oil, and cardamom in a small bowl and pour over tomato mixture; toss to coat. Season with salt and a generous amount of pepper; top with cilantro.

tomato-salad-with-creme-fraiche-and-oliv.name: Tomato Salad With Crème Fraîche And Olive Granola
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss ½ cup salt-cured black olives, pitted, coarsely chopped, ¼ cup raw sunflower seeds, 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, 1½ tsp. fennel seeds, and pinch of crushed red pepper flakes with 1 Tbsp. pure maple syrup, ½ tsp. soy sauce, and 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Arrange in an even layer and bake until golden brown, 14–16 minutes. Let granola cool.
Arrange 2 lb. heirloom tomatoes, sliced into ½"-thick rounds, on a large plate or baking sheet; drizzle with oil and season with kosher salt. Gently turn to coat well.

Stir one 8-oz. container crème fraîche and 2 tsp. fresh lemon juice in a small bowl to combine; season with kosher salt. Spread crème fraîche mixture across a platter, then top with seasoned tomatoes, leaving any juices on plate behind. Scatter granola and dill sprigs over and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.

tomato-salad-with-feta.name: Tomato Salad With Feta
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then chop.

Arrange tomatoes on a plate; season lightly with salt and pepper. Mix vinaigrette, ¼ cup parsley, and two-thirds of pistachios in a small bowl. Drizzle over tomatoes. Top with feta, parsley leaves, and remaining pistachios.

tomato-salad-with-feta-cheese-lezzet.name: Tomato Salad With Feta Cheese
instructions: 1. Domatesleri yıkayıp irice doğrayın.
2.  Beyaz peyniri küp şeklinde kesin.
3.  Kırmızı soğanın kabuğunu soyduktan sonra piyazlık doğrayın.
4.  Salatalığı yıkayın.
5.  Kabuğunu soymadan halka şeklinde ince dilimleyin.
6. Hepsini geniş bir kaseye alın.
7.  Maydanoz ilave edin.
8.  Limonun suyunu sıkarak zeytinyağı ile karıştırıp salataya dökün.
9.  Tuz ekleyin.
10. Salatayı servis tabağına alın ve üzerine iri çekilmiş karabiber serpiştirerek servis yapın.

tomato-salad-with-jalapeno-ranch.name: Tomato Salad With Jalapeño Ranch

ingredients.prep: halved, cut into wedges if large

instructions: Blend mayonnaise, yogurt, jalapeño, lime zest, garlic powder, MSG (if using), and ½ cup chives in a blender until smooth. Taste and season dressing with kosher salt; spoon onto a large plate.
Gently toss tomatoes, oil, and garlic in a large bowl to coat, then arrange on top of dressing. Scatter more chives over and season salad with a large pinch of sea salt.

tomato-salad-with-pine-nuts-and-pomegran.name: Tomato Salad With Pine Nuts And Pomegranate Molasses

ingredients.prep: cherry, and/or grape), some halved, some left whole
a thick pomegranate syrup, can be found at Middle Eastern markets, some supermarkets, and online.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Combine raisins and vinegar in a large bowl; let sit until raisins soften, 15–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast pine nuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Let cool.
Add pine nuts, tomatoes, red onion, and oil to bowl with raisins; season with salt and gently toss to combine. Add basil and toss once more.
Transfer salad to a platter and drizzle pomegranate molasses over.

tomato-salad-with-shallot-vinaigrette-ca.name: Tomato Salad With Shallot Vinaigrette, Capers, And Basil
instructions: Combine shallots, vinegar, 1/2 tsp. salt, and sugar in a small bowl. Gradually whisk in oil to blend. Set vinaigrette aside.
Arrange tomatoes on a large platter. Sprinkle capers over; season with salt and pepper. Scatter basil on top. Whisk vinaigrette again; drizzle over salad.

tomato-salad-with-warm-basil-dressing.name: Tomato Salad With Warm Basil Dressing

ingredients.prep: some sliced, some cut into wedges

instructions: Cook oil, shallot, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until shallots and garlic begin to turn golden, 7–9 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in anchovies, if using (they’ll dissolve in the oil quickly), and basil.
Toss tomatoes with vinegar and a pinch of kosher salt in a medium bowl. Transfer to a platter and pour warm dressing over. Finely grate lemon zest on top and sprinkle with sea salt.

tomato-sauce-lezzet.name: Tomato Sauce
instructions: 1. Öncelikle 6 adet domatesi soyun ve doğrayın.
2.  Ardından 2 adet sivri biberi temizleyip kıyın.
3. Sos için üç adet soğanı da doğrayın.
4.  3 diş sarımsağı soyun ve ince ince dilimleyin.
5. Daha sonra zeytinyağını tavada ısıtıp soğanı ve sarımsağı soteleyin.
6. Soğan ve sarımsak pembeleşmeye başladığında domates, sivri biber, kekik, şeker, tuz, karabiber ve sirkeyi ilave edip kısık ateşte koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
7. Son olarak 2 dal maydanozu kıyıp üzerine serpin.
8.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

tomato-sis-kebab-argiro.name: Tomato Sis Kebab
instructions: Φτιάχνουμε τη μαρινάδα και ρίχνουμε μέσα το ψιλοκομμένο αρνί.
Σκεπάζουμε και αφήνουμε στο ψυγείο για μια νύχτα να μαριναριστεί το σις κεμπάπ.
Περνάμε σε ξύλινα σουβλάκια το αρνί με τη μαρινάδα και τα ακουμπάμε στα χείλη του ταψιού. Να μην ακουμπάει στην βάση του ταψιού.
Σκεπάζω με αλουμινόχαρτο και ψήνω για 30’ στους 200 βαθμούς.
Σε κατσαρόλα βάζουμε τις ψιλοκομμένες ντομάτες, τον πελτέ, αλάτι και πιπέρι και βράζουμε για 5-6’ να πυκνώσει.
Ψήνουμε τις πίτες και τις κόβουμε κομμάτια.
Μπορείτε να φτιάξετε εύκολα σπιτικές πίτες για σουβλάκι .
Βάζουμε την σάλτσα στις πίτες, το ντόνερ και το γιαούρτι.
Πασπαλίζουμε με πάπρικα.

tomato-soup.name: Tomato Soup
instructions: In a large pot, mix the tomato sauce, water, vegetable bouillon, bay leaf, onion, garlic, Italian seasoning, parsley, sugar, salt, pepper, and hot red pepper sauce. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer at least 30 minutes.
Stir in the celery, carrots, zucchini, and corn. Cover, and continue to simmer 30 minutes.
Stir ditalini pasta into the pot, and continue cooking 10 minutes, or until pasta is al dente.

tomato-soup-recipe-ready-in-15-minutes-p.name: Tomato Soup (recipe Ready In 15 Minutes)
tomato-soup-recipe-ready-in-15-minutes-p.original_name: Sopa de tomate casera fácil (receta lista en 15 minutos)

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de salsa de tomate casera
Queso parmesano (o cualquier otro que os guste)

instructions: En una olla ponemos las dos cucharadas de aceite y, cuando esté caliente, sofreímos ligeramente los dientes de ajo muy picaditos.
A continuación, añadimos el calabacín rallado y sofreímos durante un par de minutos.
Agregamos la salsa de tomate frito y el agua,  salpimentamos y dejamos cocer tres o cuatro minutos.
Servimos con queso parmesano rallado por encima y albahaca fresca picada.

tomato-soup-recipe-with-basil-comedera.name: Tomato Soup Recipe With Basil
tomato-soup-recipe-with-basil-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de jitomate con albahaca
instructions: Lava muy bien los tomates y ponlos en una olla con agua. Hierve por unos 10 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
Retira de la olla y deja reposar.

Pela la cebolla y corta en julianas o cuadritos. Calienta una olla con una cucharada de mantequilla. Una vez que esté derretida, saltea la cebolla por 2 minutos, añade la albahaca y cocina por un minuto más.
Incorpora los tomates y saltea por 2 minutos.
Agrega todos los ingredientes salteados a una licuadora y procesa hasta que se forme una salsa cremosa.
Calienta la misma olla con la otra cucharada de mantequilla y una vez se derrita, vierte la sopa de tomate.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla muy bien y cocina por 5 minutos.
Apaga, sirve y estará lista para degustar.

tomato-soup-with-arugula-croutons-and-pe.name: Tomato Soup With Arugula, Croutons, And Pecorino
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss bread with 2 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Bake, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and crunchy, 8–10 minutes; set croutons aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion, garlic, and thyme; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until onion is soft, 5–7 minutes. Add tomatoes and cook, stirring often, until they just start to release their juices, about 1 minute. Add 1 cup water and bring to a boil. Transfer tomato mixture to a blender and blend until smooth; taste and add hot sauce to your liking. Season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle soup with more oil and top with arugula, Pecorino, and croutons.
