Ρίχνουμε τον τραχανά και ανακατεύουμε για 1 λεπτό σε δυνατή φωτιά.
Συμπληρώνουμε το ζωμό και βράζουμε σε μέτρια ένταση για 15 λεπτά.
Κρατάμε λίγα σοταρισμένα μανιτάρια για το σερβίρισμα και ρίχνουμε τα υπόλοιπα στην κατσαρόλα μαζί με το μοσχοκάρυδο.
Αφήνουμε το φαγητό στη φωτιά για 5 λεπτά ακόμα.
Ανακατεύουμε σε ένα μπολ το γιαούρτι και προσθέτουμε σταδιακά 2 κουτάλες ζεστή σούπα ανακατεύοντας να αραιώσει.
Ρίχνουμε το μείγμα στην κατσαρόλα και ανακατεύουμε να πάει παντού.
Ελέγχουμε και διορθώνουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι.
Σερβίρουμε τη σούπα σε βαθιά πιάτα και γαρνίρουμε το καθένα με τρίμματα τυριού και λίγα σοταρισμένα μανιτάρια.

trahanatoto-with-sour-trachana-argiro.name: Trahanatoto With Sour Trachana
instructions: Για το εύκολο τραχανότο επιλέγω ξινό τραχανά που έχει πλούσια γεύση και πολλά αρώματα. Ο ξινός τραχανάς έχει μοναδική γεύση και τον χρησιμοποιώ σε σούπα τραχανά, πίτες κλπ.
Αν προτιμάς γλυκό τραχανά είναι στην επιλογή σου.
Καθαρίζουμε το χωριάτικο λουκάνικο από το περίβλημα και το ψιλοκόβουμε σε κιμά με ένα μαχαίρι. Το αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Καθαρίζουμε και ψιλοκόβουμε τα λαχανικά κρεμμύδι, πράσο, κολοκυθάκι και καρότο.

trail-blazer-barbecue-sauce.name: Trail Blazer Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Mix together the onions, coffee, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, cider vinegar, hot chilies, chili powder, garlic, and salt in a saucepan until the brown sugar has dissolved. Place over medium heat, bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.

Pour the sauce into a blender, filling the pitcher no more than halfway full. Hold down the lid of the blender with a folded kitchen towel, and carefully start the blender, using a few quick pulses to get the sauce moving before leaving it on to puree. Puree in batches until smooth. Store in glass container in refrigerator.

trail-mix-cookies.name: Trail Mix Cookies

ingredients.item: Chopped bittersweet chocolate bars or chips or disks

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Toast nuts and seeds and oats on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl; let cool.
Meanwhile, mix egg, butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, vanilla, salt, and baking soda in a large bowl; let sit until nuts are cool (this will make for a chewier cookie).

Add dried fruit and chocolate to nut mixture; toss to combine. Give egg mixture a good stir, then stir in flour. Mix in nut mixture, smashing it against the sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula, until combined and mix-ins are evenly coated in dough. (It will look like too many mix-ins, but dough will come together as it chills.) Cover and chill at least 2 hours and up to 3 days.

Reheat oven to 350°. Using a ⅓-cup measure or #16 cookie scoop, portion out dough, packing firmly, to make 12 cookies. Divide between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets as you go. Using measuring cup or your hand, press cookies into 2½"-diameter disks about ¾" thick; sprinkle with sea salt.
Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back once, until golden brown and no longer wet-looking, 11–13 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be made 1 week ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

trail-mix-freezer-cookies.name: Trail Mix Freezer Cookies
instructions: Line 3 baking sheets with parchment paper. Mix first 6 ingredients in bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter and both sugars in large bowl until fluffy. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until mixture is fluffy, 1 to 2 minutes. Reduce speed to low; beat in flour mixture until just combined. Fold in oats and coconut. Stir in trail mix.

Using 2-inch-diameter ice cream scoop, drop dough onto sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart. DO AHEAD For ready-to-bake dough, freeze dough on sheets until firm. Transfer frozen dough to resealable plastic bags; keep frozen until ready to bake.

Preheat oven to 177°C. For freshly made cookie dough, bake until cookies are golden brown, about 13 minutes. (For frozen dough, arrange frozen cookies 2 inches apart on parchment lined baking sheets; bake until golden brown, about 16 minutes.) Transfer to racks to cool.

trailmix-oatmeal-cookies.name: Trailmix Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 3 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Beat butter and brown sugar together using an electric mixer in a mixing bowl until creamy. Add eggs and mix well. Mix in applesauce and vanilla extract until combined.

Mix oats, whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon together in a separate bowl. Stir butter mixture into flour mixture until well combined. Fold in raisins, coconut, sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, and ground flax seed.
Drop dough by rounded tablespoon onto the prepared baking pans, flattening slightly using a fork dipped in a glass of cold water.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and set, 11 to 13 minutes.

tramezzini-argiro.name: Tramezzini

ingredients.item: 6 μεγάλες φετες ψωμί για τοστ χωρίς κόρα
100 γραµ. γαλοπούλα σε λεπτές φέτες (ή σαλάμι αέρος)
6 μεγάλες φετες ψωμί για τοστ χωρίς κόρα
100 γραµ. γαλοπούλα σε λεπτές φέτες (ή σαλάμι αέρος)

instructions: Για τα tramezzini απλώνουμε τις φέτες ψωμί στον πάγκο.
Με τον πλάστη ανοίγουμε τις φέτες ψωμί ρολάροντας ώστε να γίνουν λεπτές και να μεγαλώσει η επιφάνειά τους.
Αλείφουμε με φρέσκο τυρί κρέμα, πασπαλίζουμε με σχοινόπρασο και βάζουμε το σαλάμι αέρος.
Κλείνουμε σε σφιχτό ρολό το ψωμί. Το τυλίγουμε με μεμβράνη σφιχτά και το βάζουμε ψυγείο για 30΄.
Χτυπάμε τα αυγά σε ένα μπολ. Ξετυλίγουμε τα ρολά tramezzini από την μεμβράνη.
Τα βουτάμε στο χτυπημένο αυγό. Τα πανάρουμε στη φρυγανιά. Ακουμπάμε όλα τα ρολά σε αντικολλητικό χαρτί.
Ζεσταίνουμε το λάδι σε μεγάλο τηγάνι και ροδίζουμε τα tramezzini από όλες τις πλευρές για λίγα λεπτά.
Τα βγάζουμε σε απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Τα σερβίρουμε με σαλάτα εποχής , ζεστά και λαχταριστά.
Τα tramezzini είναι σαντουιτσάκια με ό,τι γέμιση σας αρέσει. Συνήθως κόβονται σε τρίγωνα ή τα τυλίγεις σε ρόλο και αφού τα παγώσεις για να σταθεροποιηθεί το ρόλο το κόβεις σε λεπτές φέτες.
Τα tramezzini με τραγανή κρούστα όπως αυτά που σας δείχνω είναι ένα λαχταριστό σνακ για όλες τις ώρες. Απολαύστε τα ζεστά και τραγανά μόλις τηγανιστούν.

trampoline-frappe.name: Trampoline Frappé
instructions: Blend 2 cups strawberries, leaves removed, halved, and 1 cup water in a blender on medium speed until smooth, about 1 minute. Pour into a small saucepan and cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally and reducing heat to low if mixture bubbles, about 7 minutes. (Rinse out and reserve blender.)
Add 10 basil leaves to saucepan and continue to cook, stirring, about 4 minutes more. Remove from heat and let sit 15 minutes.

Strain strawberry mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a liquid measuring cup, pressing on solids with a spoon—you should get 1½–2 cups. Return to blender along with an equal measure 1½–2 cups sugar. Blend until sugar is dissolved, about 1 minute—mixture should not taste gritty. Transfer to a resealable container and chill until ready to use.
Do ahead: Syrup can be made 3 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.

Fill a large frappé or pilsner glass with crushed, cracked, or pebble ice. Combine 3 oz. fresh pineapple juice, 1 oz. fresh lime juice, 1¼  oz. Strawberry-Basil syrup, and 2 dashes Peychaud’s bitters (if using) in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake until just mixed, about 5 seconds.

Strain into prepared glass and add 2 oz. chilled seltzer. Top off with crushed, cracked, or pebble ice. Gently stir to combine. Garnish with a strawberry half and basil leaf (if using). You can dash bitters on these too!

transmontana-rabbit-teleculinaria.name: Transmontana Rabbit
instructions: Corte os coelhos em pedaços. Descasque e pique finamente as cebolas e a salsa. Reserve um pouco de salsa para o final.
Coloque num tacho os pedaços de coelho, a cebola e a salsa, em camadas alternadas. Tempere com sal e pimenta, regue com azeite, adicione a banha e cubra com o vinho branco.

Tape o tacho, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, agitando o tacho de vez em quando. Quando o coelho estiver tenro, retifique os temperos e transfira para uma travessa. Polvilhe com mais salsa e sirva com batatas cozidas.

transmontana-roast-goat-teleculinaria.name: Transmontana Roast Goat
instructions: Ligue o forno a 180ºc. Descasque os alhos e a cebola, esmague os alhos, pique a cebola e deite para uma tigela. Tempere com sal e pimenta, junte o louro, o pimentão-doce, a salsa, o sumo de limão, a banha e o vinho e misture bem.
Coloque o cabrito num tabuleiro, regue com a mistura anterior e esfregue-o bem. Por fim, regue-o com o azeite.

Descasque as batatas, mantendo-as inteiras, junte-as ao tabuleiro e envolva-as bem no molho. Leve ao forno, virando de vez em quando o cabrito e mexendo as batatas, até ficar tudo bem douradinho, mas sem deixar secar a carne. Retire e sirva bem quente, polvilhado com salsa.

tray-breadsticks-lezzet.name: Tray Breadsticks
instructions: 1. Unu karıştırma kabına eleyerek aktarın.
2.  İnstant hamur mayası ve diğer malzemeleri ilave edin.
3.  Pürüzsüz ve orta sertlikte bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
4. Hamuru ikiye ayırın, üzerini örtün ve mayalanması için oda sıcaklığında 30 dakika bekletin.
5. Mayalanan hamurları ayrı ayrı 1-2 dakika daha yoğurduktan sonra, un serpilmiş tezgahın üzerinde merdane yardımı ile 1 cm kalınlığında açın.
6. Hamurun üzerine yumurta sarısı sürün, bir tepsiye dizin ve oda ısısında ikinci kez mayalanması için 15 dakika daha bekletin.
7. Mayalanan hamurların her birini un serpilmiş tezgahın üzerinde 1 cm kalınlığında açın.
8.  Hamuru yağlı kağıdın üzerine aktarın.
9.  Hamurun üzerine yumurta sarısı sürün, kıyılmış taze biberiyeyi, susamı ve çörek otunu serpin.
10.  Kalan hamuru da aynı şekilde hazırlayın.
11. Dinlendirdiğiniz hamurları önceden ısıtılmış 220 dereceye ayarlı fırında, 20 dakika pişirin.

tray-lahmacun-lezzet.name: Tray Lahmacun
instructions: 1. Harcı için soğan, sarımsak domates ve biberleri rondodan geçirip bir yoğurma kabına alın.
2.  Bu karışıma kıyma ve salçaları ekleyip baharatlarla tatlandırın.
3.  Suyu ilave ederek tüm malzemeler özdeşleşene kadar yoğurun.
4.  Milföy hamurlarını yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
5.  Kabarmaması için çatal yardımıyla üzerinde delikler açın.
6.  Kıymalı harcı milföy hamurlarının üzerine paylaştırın.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
8.  Üzerini iri kıyılmış maydanoz ile süsleyerek sıcak servis yapın.

tray-meatballs-with-asparagus-lezzet.name: Tray Meatballs With Asparagus
instructions: 1. Tavuk göğüs etlerini mutfak robotundan geçirip kıyma haline getirin ve geniş bir kaseye alın.
2.  İnce kıydığınız taze soğan, maydanoz ve kırmızı biberi ilave edip karıştırın.
3.  Zeytinyağını ilave edip tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırıp yoğurun.
4.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serin.
5.  Kıymalı harcı tepsiye yayın.
6.  Üzerine sıra sıra kuşkonmazları dizin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kıymalı harç pişene kadar, yaklaşık 20-25 dakika pişirin.
8.  Fırından alınca dilimleyerek sıcak servis yapın.
9. Farklı lezzet arayışında olanlar için sunulan püreli tepsi köftesi tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

tray-of-pork-and-pineapple-gratin-telecu.name: Tray Of Pork And Pineapple Gratin
tray-of-pork-and-pineapple-gratin-telecu.original_name: Tabuleiro de porco e ananás gratinado

ingredients.item: 800 g  carne de porco em cubos pequenos
1 colher (sopa) bem cheias  massa de pimentão

instructions: Descasque as batatas e corte-as em cubos; corte também o ananás e o pimento em cubos e reserve. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte os dentes de alho picados e deixe refogar.

Deite também a carne no tacho e deixe saltear, até ganhar cor. Adicione o vinho, as batatas e o pimento e tempere com sal, piripíri e a massa de pimentão. Acrescente a água, tape e deixe cozinhar em lume brando, mexendo de vez em quando, durante 15 minutos.
Após o tempo indicado, junte o ananás e os coentros picados. Mexa e deixe cozinhar durante mais 5 minutos. Retifique os temperos.

Coloque a carne numa travessa de forno. Misture as natas com o queijo ralado e deite sobre a carne. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºC, até ficar bem gratinado e douradinho. Sirva com uma salada mista.

tray-of-tuna-paste-au-gratin-teleculinar.name: Tray Of Tuna Paste Au Gratin
tray-of-tuna-paste-au-gratin-teleculinar.original_name: Tabuleiro de pasta de atum gratinada
instructions: Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte as cebolas em lâminas e pique um dente de alho. Corte o pimento e a courgette em tiras. Corte também o bacon em tiras e os tomates ao meio.
Leve ao lume um tacho com água, tempere com sal, pimenta, um fio de azeite e o restante dente de alho esmagado. Assim que ferver, junte o macarrão e deixe cozer durante 8 minutos. Retire e escorra.
Noutro tacho à parte, coloque um fio de azeite, leve ao lume e refogue a cebola e o alho picados, juntamente com o bacon. Quando ganhar cor, junte o pimento e a courgette e regue com o vinho branco.
Adicione, de seguida, o atum escorrido e envolva muito bem. Junte as natas e o queijo, mexa para ligar tudo e polvilhe com orégãos.
Misture o preparado anterior com o macarrão, coloque num tabuleiro, espalhe por cima o tomate e leve a gratinar no forno, a 180ºc, durante 15 minutos.

tray-pastry-recipe-from-ready-made-yufka.name: Tray Pastry Recipe From Ready-made Yufka

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı yoğurt + 1/2 su bardağı sıvı yağ + 1/2 su bardağı su(daha pofuduk ve yumuşak doku sağlar)
1/2 su bardağı su + 1/2 su bardağı süt(tam aynı kabarmayı vermez ama güzel sonuç olur)
2 yemek kaşığı yoğurt + 1 tatlı kaşığı yağ (daha açık renk kızarır)
Az miktarda kapya biber (özellikle patatesli içte)

instructions: 1. Fırını 180°C alt-üst ısıtın.
2.  Tepsiyi hafifçe yağlayın.
3. Peynirli iç harç için beyaz peyniri ezin, isterseniz maydanoz ekleyin.
4. İlk yufkayı tepsiye serin, kenarları dışarı taşabilir.
5.  Üzerine yağ + su karışımından gezdirin.
6. Yufkayı serin, tekrar sos gezdirin.
7. Yufkayı da aynı şekilde serip soslayın.
8. İç harcın tamamını yayın.
9. Kalan yufkaları da aralara sos gezdirerek üst üste yerleştirin.
10. Kenarda kalan yufkaları içe doğru kapatın.
11. Böreği dilimleyin.
12.  Üzerine maden suyu, yağ ve su karışımını her yerine gelecek şekilde dökün.
13. En üste yumurta sarısı sürün son olarak susam ve çörek otu serpiştirin.
14. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 35–40 dakika, üzeri kızarana kadar pişirin.
15. Fırından çıkan hazır yufkadan tepsi böreğini dinlendirdikten sonra servis edin.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

tray-ravioli-lezzet.name: Tray Ravioli
instructions: 1. Tepsi mantısının hamuru için öncelikle unu geniş bir kaba eleyin ve ortasına yumurtayı kırın.
2.  Tuz ekleyin.
3.  Yavaş yavaş suyu ekleyerek yoğurmaya başlayın.
4. Hamur pürüzsüz ve yumuşak olmalı gerekirse su ekleyebilirsiniz.
5.  Hamuru 10-15 dakika dinlendirin.
6. İç harcı için soğanı sıvı yağda kavurun ve rengi pembeleşince kıymayı ekleyin.
7.  Kıyma tamamen pişene kadar kavurun.
8. Tuz, karabiber ve pul biberi ekleyin.
9.  Karıştırarak birkaç dakika daha pişirin.
10.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
11. Hamuru unlu bir zeminde ince açın.
12.  Yaklaşık 2-3 mm kalınlığında olmalıdır.
13. Hamuru kareler halinde kesin.
14.  Karelerin ortasına bir tatlı kaşığı kıymalı harç koyun.
15.  Kenarlarını üst üste kapatarak üçgen şeklinde veya yuvarlak olarak kapatın.
16.  Kapatırken kenarlarını iyice bastırın ki açılmasın.
17. Tepsiyi yağlayın veya pişirme kağıdı serin.
18.  Hazırladığınız mantıları tepsiye yerleştirin.
19.  Üzerine biraz sıvı yağ gezdirin.
20. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 25-30 dakika, üzerleri kızarana kadar pişirin.
21. Üzeri için yoğurdu bir kasede ezilmiş sarımsak ile karıştırın.
22. Tereyağını bir tavada eritip pul biberle kızdırın.
23.  Fırından çıkan mantıların üzerine yoğurt sosunu dökün ve üzerine tereyağını gezdirin.
24. Tepsi mantısı servise hazır.
25.  Sıcak olarak servis edebilirsiniz.
26.  Afiyet olsun.

tray-stew-on-bread-teleculinaria.name: Tray Stew On Bread

ingredients.item: 250 g de carne de vaca para cozer
250 g de perna de porco sem osso
500 g de farinha 65 de trigo sem fermento

instructions: Prepare a massa de pão: numa tigela grande, coloque a farinha e o sal, faça um buraco no meio e deite nele o fermento, previamente dissolvido em 300 ml de água tépida. Junte o azeite, amasse bem, tape a tigela com película aderente e deixe levedar, em lugar morno, até duplicar de tamanho.
Leve um tacho grande e alto ao lume, com água, sal, louro e os alhos com a casca lavados. Quando a água começar a ferver, adicione todas as carnes e os enchidos, previamente picados com um garfo.

Arranje a couve, lave e corte-a em pedaços pequenos. Descasque a cenoura, o nabo, a batata e corte-os também em pedaços. Acrescente todos os legumes ao tacho da carne, deixe cozer, depois retire do lume, escorra tudo e elimine os alhos e o louro. Unte um tabuleiro de forno (cerca de 21 cm x 27 cm) com manteiga e polvilhe-o com farinha.

Numa superfície plana, levemente polvilhada com farinha, estique a massa com um rolo, de forma a fazer um retângulo grande que tape o fundo e o cimo do tabuleiro. Cubra o tabuleiro com a massa e espalhe a couve, os legumes, as carnes (sem ossos e peles) e os enchidos às rodelas.

Tape com a massa de pão e feche a abertura, colocando-a por dentro do tabuleiro e pressionando um pouco com os dedos. Faça três golpes diagonais no cimo, com uma faca, e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, até corar bem. Retire do calor, deixe arrefecer um pouco e desenforme. Sirva o cozido em pão morno ou frio, cortado às fatias.

treated-pitas-lezzet.name: Treated Pitas
instructions: 1. İç harcı için yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı ve kıymayı zeytinyağında, kıymanın rengi dönünceye kadar soteleyin.
2.  Küp doğradığınız biberleri ilave edip, tuz ve baharatlarla tatlandırın.
3.  Biberler yumuşayınca ocaktan alın.
4.  Hamuru için eritilmiş tereyağı, ayçiçek yağı, tuz, yumurta, yumurta akı ve yoğurdu geniş bir kapta karıştırın.
5.  Kabartma tozu ve unu ilave edip, kulak memesi kıvamında bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
6.  Hamurun üzerini streç filme sarıp 15-20 dakika dinlendirin.
7.  Dinlenen hamurdan küçük bezeler kopartıp bir merdane yardımıyla hafif açın.
8.  Kıymalı harcı hamurların ortasına uzunlamasına paylaştırın.
9.  Kenarlardan katlayarak pide şekli verin.
10.  Kenarlarına 1 yemek kaşığı ayçiçek yağı eklenmiş yumurta sarısını sürüp, susam serpiştirin.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında, üzerleri kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
12.  Sıcak servis yapın.
13. Alternatif olarak kıymalı pide tarifine de göz atın.

trembling-pastry-with-bechamel-argiro.name: Trembling Pastry With Béchamel

ingredients.item: 800 grκιμάς μοσχαρίσιος μία φορά περασμένος στη μηχανή αλέσεως
400 grντοματάκια κονκασέ ή φρέσκια τριμμένη ντομάτα
800 grκιμάς μοσχαρίσιος μία φορά περασμένος στη μηχανή αλέσεως
400 grντοματάκια κονκασέ ή φρέσκια τριμμένη ντομάτα

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε μία πλασοτέ, ρηχή και φαρδιά, κατσαρόλα σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο να κάψει και ρίχνουμε τον κιμά.
Σοτάρουμε τον κιμά , απλώνοντάς τον με κουτάλα να καλύψει όλη την επιφάνεια της κατσαρόλας και δεν ανακατεύουμε συνέχεια.
Αφήνουμε να ψήνεται ο κιμάς, για να μη χάνει τα υγρά του με το συνεχές ανακάτεμα.
Μετά από 3-4′ αναποδογυρίζουμε τον κιμά να ροδίσει κι από την άλλη πλευρά.
Αφού πάρει ρόδινο χρώμα παντού τότε με την κουτάλα σπάμε τον κιμά σε κομμάτια.
Αυτή διαδικασία του κιμά διαρκεί περίπου 8 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι στον κιμά καθώς και το σκόρδο και σοτάρουμε επιπλέον για 2-3 λεπτά, μέχρι να γίνει διάφανο το κρεμμύδι.
Ρίχνουμε το ψιλοτριμμένο καρότο και σοτάρουμε για 1 με 2′.
Σβήνουμε με το κονιάκ και αφήνουμε για 1-2′ λεπτά να εξατμιστεί το αλκοόλ.
Προσθέτουμε τη ντομάτα , τη ζάχαρη, το δαφνόφυλλο και το ξύλο κανέλας.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε κατά βούληση και ανακατεύουμε την σάλτσα κιμά.
Αφήνουμε την κανέλα ν’ αρωματίσει για 5 λεπτά τον κιμά και την αφαιρούμε.

Σκεπάζουμε την σάλτσα κιμά για το παστίτσιο, χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε για 20 λεπτά (χωρίς προσθήκη υγρών) μέχρι να πιει τα υγρά του τελείως και να συμπυκνωθούν οι γεύσεις. Η χαμηλή φωτιά στο μαγείρεμα του κιμά είναι απαραίτητη
Μέχρι να γίνει ο κιμάς βράζουμε τα ζυμαρικά σε αλατισμένο νερό.

trempo-mallorquin-the-traditional-salad-.name: Trempó Mallorquín, The Traditional Salad Of The Balearic Island
trempo-mallorquin-the-traditional-salad-.original_name: Trempó Mallorquín, la ensalada tradicional de la isla balear
instructions: Comienza lavando bien los tomates y el pimiento verde. Corta los tomates en cubos de tamaño medio. El pimiento debe ser despepitado y cortado también en cubos. Pela la cebolla y córtala en cubitos pequeños.
En un bol grande, mezcla los tomates, el pimiento y la cebolla. Es importante que todos los ingredientes estén bien distribuidos para que cada bocado sea uniformemente sabroso.

Añade sal al gusto y un generoso chorro de aceite de oliva virgen extra. Deja reposar el trampó o trempó en el frigorífico durante al menos una hora antes de servir. Esto permite que los sabores se mezclen y la ensalada se enfríe, potenciando su frescura.
Sirve el trempó en una fuente o plato grande. Acompaña con una buena rebanada de pan rústico.

trenton-tomato-pie-pizza.name: Trenton Tomato Pie Pizza

ingredients.item: Food processor pizza dough or prepared pizza dough
A pizza stone or 2 stackable rimmed baking sheets

instructions: Place a rack in lowest position of oven. Set pizza stone or 2 stacked, inverted baking sheets on rack; preheat oven to 260°C at least 1 hour.
Drain tomatoes in a colander. Crush into small pieces with your hands, drain again, and transfer to a medium bowl. Stir in salt; set aside.
Roll out dough to a 14" circle on lightly floured parchment paper, making sure dough is evenly thin from center to edge; if dough pulls back when rolling, cover with plastic wrap and wait 5 minutes.
Transfer parchment with dough to a pizza peel, large cutting board, or inverted baking sheet. Sprinkle with 1 1/4 cups cheese. Top with tomatoes. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup cheese.
Carefully slide parchment with pizza onto hot baking stone. Bake pizza until crust is deep golden brown, 10–12 minutes.
Transfer pizza to a cutting board and let cool 2 minutes. Drizzle with oil and cut into wedges. Serve with red pepper flakes, if using.

tres-leches-cake.name: Tres Leches Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter and flour bottom and sides of a glass 13x9" baking dish. Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon in a medium bowl to combine.

Beat the whites from 3 large eggs (reserve the yolks) plus 3 large egg whites in a large bowl with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form, 7–8 minutes. Gradually beat in 1½ cups (300 g) sugar. Add 3 large egg yolks one at a time, beating to blend between additions. Beat in 2 tsp. vanilla extract. Add one-third of the flour mixture, followed by ¼ cup whole milk. Repeat with ½ the remaining dry ingredients and the remaining ¼ cup whole milk. Add the rest of the flour mixture and beat just to combine. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth the top with an offset spatula.
Bake 25 minutes, then reduce heat to 325° and continue baking until cake is golden brown and middle springs back when pressed, 20–25 minutes more. Let cake cool in pan for 15 minutes.

Whisk 1 cup heavy cream, 1 cup evaporated skim milk, 1 cup sweetened condensed milk, 1 Tbsp. dark rum, and ½ tsp. vanilla extract in a medium bowl. Poke holes all over top of cake with a skewer or toothpick. Slowly drizzle half of the milk mixture over cake, letting liquid soak in before adding more. Let cake sit for 10 minutes.

Invert a platter on top of cake. Lift rack and gently invert cake onto platter. Drizzle remaining sauce over. Spoon any liquid collected on sheet over cake.
Do ahead: Tres leches cake can be made 2 days ahead; refrigerate, covered, in baking pan.

Editor’s note: This tres leches cake recipe was first printed in our July 2012 issue. Head this way for more of our favorite cake recipes →

tres-leches-cake-with-dulce-de-leche.name: Tres Leches Cake With Dulce De Leche
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and dust with flour.
Beat egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl until foamy. Add 1/4 cup sugar gradually, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form and sugar is completely dissolved.
Beat egg yolks in a separate bowl until creamy. Add remaining 1/4 cup sugar and continue beating until pale yellow and creamy. Fold into egg whites until incorporated.
Mix together flour and baking powder in a small bowl until well combined. Fold into egg mixture until incorporated; mix in lime zest. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly golden, about 30 minutes. Turn off the oven and keep cake in the oven for 15 minutes more.
Mix together condensed milk, evaporated milk, and heavy cream in a medium bowl until well combined.
Poke cake several times across the top with a fork. Pour milk mixture over cake. Refrigerate for 1 hour to allow milk mixture to soak in. Spread dulce de leche on top.

tres-leches-cake-traditional-recipe-come.name: Tres Leches Cake, Traditional Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 ¼ taza de harina de trigo todo uso
1/2 taza de mantequilla sin sal, fundida y enfriada ((1 barra))
1 ¼ taza de crema para batir

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 °C (177°C). Engrasa un molde rectangular con mantequilla y espolvorea ligeramente con harina. Reserva.
En un bol hondo, mezcla la leche condensada, leche evaporada y la media crema hasta obtener una mezcla uniforme. Reserva en el refrigerador.
En otro recipiente, mezcla la harina, el polvo de hornear y la sal. Revuelve con varilla manual para airear.

En un bol grande, bate los huevos uno a uno durante un minuto con batidora eléctrica. Agrega el azúcar lentamente hasta que la mezcla esté espesa y de color amarillo claro. Luego añade la vainilla y la mantequilla fundida en forma de hilo, sin dejar de batir.
Incorpora los ingredientes secos a la mezcla de huevos, en partes, con movimientos envolventes utilizando una espátula. No sobre mezcles para mantener la textura aireada.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde y hornea durante 30-35 minutos.
También puedes insertar un palillo en el centro del bizcocho hasta que salga limpio. Ahí la retiras del horno.

Una vez fuera del horno, deja enfriar el pastel 10 minutos. Pínchalo con un tenedor por toda la superficie y vierte lentamente la mezcla de tres leches. Refrigera mínimo 4 horas (idealmente toda la noche) para que absorba bien el líquido.
Bate la crema para batir con el azúcar y la vainilla hasta obtener picos firmes. Cubre el pastel antes de servir.

tres-leches-dessert-with-fruits-deliciou.name: Tres Leches Dessert With Fruits: Delicious And To Prepare
tres-leches-dessert-with-fruits-deliciou.original_name: Postre tres leches con frutas: rico y fácil de preparar
instructions: Remoja las láminas de grenetina en un recipiente con agua a temperatura ambiente durante 5 minutos.
Cuando estén suaves y flexibles, escurre el agua y funde las láminas en el microondas durante 15 segundos hasta que se disuelvan completamente.
En una licuadora, combina la leche condensada, la leche, la crema de leche y la grenetina fundida.
Licúa a velocidad media hasta que todos los ingredientes estén bien integrados, obteniendo una mezcla cremosa y suave.

En el fondo de cada vaso, coloca una capa de frutas frescas como arándanos, frambuesas y trozos de durazno en almíbar. Vierte una capa de la mezcla de tres leches sobre las frutas. Agrega otra capa de frutas, y luego cubre nuevamente con la mezcla de tres leches.
Para el toque final, espolvorea galletas María molidas sobre la superficie, añade algunas frutas frescas y ralla un poco de chocolate blanco por encima para darle un toque de dulzura y sofisticación.

tres-en-uno-three-in-one.name: Tres-en-uno (three-in-one)
instructions: Mix orange juice, carrot juice, beet juice, and sugar together in a pitcher.

treviso-and-radish-salad-with-walnutanch.name: Treviso And Radish Salad With Walnut–anchovy Dressing

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar
Fresh parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes; let cool.
Pulse anchovies, garlic, oil, and ½ cup walnuts in a food processor to a coarse purée. Stir in vinegar, lemon zest, and lemon juice; season with salt and pepper.
Toss radicchio, celery, radishes, and parsley in a large bowl with half of the dressing, then drizzle remaining dressing over. Crush remaining walnuts and serve salad topped with walnuts.

treviso-salad-with-orange-vinaigrette-an.name: Treviso Salad With Orange Vinaigrette And Manchego

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk oil, orange juice, honey, and vinegar in a large bowl until well blended. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper.
Add Treviso to bowl with vinaigrette; toss to coat. Divide among plates. Scatter walnuts over. Using a vegetable peeler, shave cheese onto salads. Garnish with parsley and orange zest.

treviso-walnut-and-gruyere-salad.name: Treviso, Walnut, And Gruyère Salad

ingredients.item: (packed) mixed baby greens or other baby lettuces

instructions: Whisk vinegar and mustard in small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing to taste with coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Cut Treviso crosswise into 1/2-inch-wide strips; discard bottom 2 to 3 inches. Place strips in large bowl; add mixed baby greens and chives. DO AHEAD Dressing and salad can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover separately and chill. Bring dressing to room temperature and rewhisk before using.
Pour dressing over salad and toss to coat. Add cheese and walnuts; toss salad, then transfer to serving bowl.

tri-tip-steak-with-tiger-bite-sauce.name: Tri-tip Steak With Tiger Bite Sauce

ingredients.item: . tri-tip steak or two 1-lb. sirloin steaks
Purple sticky rice and little gem or butter lettuce leaves

instructions: Toast Sichuan peppercorns, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until spices are very fragrant and slightly darkened in color, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a spice mill and let cool; finely grind.
Pat steak dry; season all over with salt. Whisk oil, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and spices in a large bowl. Add steak; turn to coat. Cover and chill 4–12 hours (for the most flavor go the full time!).
Remove steak from marinade and place on a plate. Let sit at room temperature 1 hour before cooking.

Prepare a grill for medium-high indirect heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill; for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off). Grill steak over direct heat until lightly charred, about 2 minutes per side. Move steak over to indirect heat and cover grill, placing vent (if your grill has one) over steak so it draws heat up and over it. Grill, turning steak occasionally, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of steak registers 120°, 20–25 minutes for medium-rare.
Transfer steak to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes before slicing it against the grain.

While the steak is resting, place a wire rack on direct heat side of grill, arranging so bars run perpendicular to grate. Toss tomatoes with oil in a medium bowl; season with salt. Grill tomatoes in a single layer on rack, turning occasionally, until lightly charred all over and beginning to burst, about 5 minutes. Return to bowl as they’re done and let cool.

Pulse shallot, garlic, chiles, and a pinch of salt in a food processor until mixture starts to resemble a paste. (This is even better in a mortar and pestle, which will create a finer texture.) Add cilantro and pulse until very finely chopped.
Lightly crush tomatoes with your hands and add shallot mixture, lime juice, fish sauce, and oyster sauce. Season sauce with salt; let sit 10 minutes. Serve steak with sauce, rice, and lettuce.

tri-tip-with-chimichurri.name: Tri-tip With Chimichurri

ingredients.item: Tri-tip steak or two 1-pound sirloin steaks

instructions: Mix sesame seeds, paprika, 2 Tbsp. oil, 2 tsp. salt, and 2 tsp. pepper in a small bowl to combine. Rub all over steak and let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, prepare a grill for medium-high, indirect heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill; for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off). Place steak over indirect heat, cover grill, and grill, turning once, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of steak registers 115°, 20–30 minutes. Move steak to direct heat and grill until lightly charred, about 2 minutes per side, or until an instant-read thermometer registers 120° for medium-rare (temperature will continue to rise off heat). Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before slicing against the grain.
While steak is resting, combine garlic, parsley, cilantro, vinegar, agave nectar, and remaining ½ cup oil; season with salt and pepper. Serve steak with chimichurri.

tri-tip-with-chipotle-rub.name: Tri-tip With Chipotle Rub
instructions: Sprinkle tri-tip with salt. Massage Chipotle Rub into meat. Let steak sit at room temperature for 1 hour or refrigerate uncovered overnight. Bring to room temperature before grilling.

Build a two-zone fire in a charcoal grill, or preheat a gas grill to medium-high. Cook 3-4 minutes per side over direct heat until nicely charred. Transfer to low-heat side (or lower gas grill heat to medium) and cook an additional 6-8 minutes per side or until an instant-read thermometer registers 49°C for rare (steak will carry over to 52°C, or medium-rare, as it rests).
Transfer meat to a carving board; let rest for 10 minutes. Thinly slice against the grain.

triangle-pastry-with-purslane-lezzet.name: Triangle Pastry With Purslane

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı rendelenmiş taze kaşar peyniri

instructions: 1. Su hariç hamur için gerekli malzemeleri çukur bir kaba alın.
2.  Ilık suyu hamurun kıvamına göre ekleyerek yoğurun.
3.  Üzerini nemli bir bez ile örterek 45 dakika mayalandırın.
4.  Semizotunu ayıklayın.
5.  Soğanları tavla zarı büyüklüğünde doğrayın.

6.  Ayıklayıp doğradığınız semizotu yapraklarını, soğanı, peyniri, nar ekşisini, ayçiçek yağında hafif kavurduğunuz dolmalık fıstığı, tuz ve baharatları kaseye alıp elinizle malzemeler özleşene kadar harmanlayın.
7.  Hamuru tezgaha alıp ikiye bölün.
8.  Üzerine un serpip yufkadan biraz daha kalın olacak şekilde merdane yardımıyla açın.
9.  Su bardağı yardımıyla daire şeklinde kesin.
10.  Ortasına harçtan paylaştırıp üçgen şekilde kapatın.
11.  Ayçiçek yağını ısıtın.
12.  Börekleri kızartın.
13.  Servis yapın.

trick-or-treat-cheesecake.name: Trick Or Treat Cheesecake

ingredients.item: Mini chocolate-coated caramel-peanut nougat candy bars (such as snickers®)

instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Place a shallow pan 1/2-full with water on the lower oven rack to minimize cracking in the cheesecake. Spray the inside of a 9-inch springform pan with cooking spray and line with parchment paper.
Mix chocolate sandwich cookies, sugar, and butter together in a bowl; press into the bottom of the prepared pan.

Beat cream cheese and sweetened condensed milk together in a separate bowl using an electric mixer until smooth; beat in eggs, 1 at a time, until just blended. Stir candy bars and vanilla extract into cream cheese mixture; pour over crust.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges are set and center is still slightly soft, about 50 minutes. Turn off oven, leaving door open, and cool cheesecake in oven, at least 1 hour. Run a knife or spatula around the edges to loosen cheesecake; refrigerate in the pan until set, 8 hours or overnight.

tricolor-chicken-flautas-recipe-comedera.name: Tricolor Chicken Flautas Recipe
tricolor-chicken-flautas-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de flautas tricolor de pollo

ingredients.item: 9  tortillas de maíz grandes  (especiales para flautas )
500 gr de pollo cocido y desmechado
1 taza de queso panela o fresco

instructions: Para la salsa roja, cuece en una olla con suficiente agua a fuego medio el tomate, la cebolla y el ajo durante 5 minutos.
Cuando estén cocidos, retira del agua y agrega a la licuadora las verduras junto con el chile chipotle, sal y pimienta al gusto. Tritura bien y reserva.
Para la salsa verde, agrega a la licuadora los chiles jalapeños, los aguacates, tomates, cebolla, ajo, sal y pimienta. Tritura hasta obtener una mezcla homogénea. Reserva.
En una tortilla de maíz, coloca el pollo desmenuzado y enrolla sobre sí mismo. Puedes colocar picadientes en la tortilla para evitar que se abran al momento de freír. Repite con todas las tortillas.

En un sartén a fuego medio calienta la taza de aceite. Cuando tenga la temperatura indicada, fríe las flautas hasta dorar de manera uniforme, dando vueltas ocasionalmente. Cuando estén listas, retira y déjalas escurrir en una servilleta de papel.
Sirve las 3 flautas en un plato, baña con la salsa verde, seguido por la crema agria y por último, con la salsa roja. Agrega queso panela y decora con un cilantro.

tricolor-chilaquiles-recipe-comedera.name: Tricolor Chilaquiles Recipe
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 199°C.
Corta las tortillas en triángulos y acomódalas en una bandeja para hornear (de preferencia que sea una reja para que se doren de manera uniforme por ambos lados).
Hornea los triángulos de tortillas durante 8 minutos o hasta que doren. Cuando estén listos, retira del horno y reserva.

Para la salsa roja, en una olla a fuego medio alto calienta un chorro de aceite y sofríe los tomates, la cebolla, chiles guajillo, chiles de árbol y el ajo. Mezcla y cocina hasta que se suavicen. Luego vierte el agua y hierve durante 6 minutos o hasta que el agua se reduzca ala mitad.
Agrega el contenido de la olla a la licuadora y sazona con sal, licúa hasta obtener una salsa tersa. Cuela y reserva.

Para la salsa verde, en una olla a fuego medio calienta agua y cocina los tomatillos verdes, los chiles jalapeños, la cebolla y el ajo. Hierve durante 5 minutos o hasta que los tomates cambien de color.
En una licuadora agrega la mezcla de los tomates verdes junto al cilantro y la sal. Licúa hasta obtener una salsa tersa.
Coloca los totopos en un refractario y baña la mitad con la salsa verde y la otra mitad con salsa roja.
En el centro agrega el pollo desmenuzado, la crema y el queso, formando así la bandera.
Hornea hasta que el queso se gratine. Finalmente decora con cebolla, cubos de aguacate y cilantro. Sirve y disfruta.

tricolor-frappe-cocktail-recipe-with-wat.name: Tricolor Frappé Cocktail Recipe With Watermelon, Coconut And Cucumber
tricolor-frappe-cocktail-recipe-with-wat.original_name: Receta de cóctel frappé tricolor con sandía, coco y pepino
instructions: Toma las vasos donde servirás el cóctel y remoja el borde con miel y luego con el chile en polvo.
Agrega las sandías sin semillas en la licuadora.
Incorpora las fresas con el azúcar, el hielo y licúa muy bien hasta que se integre todo.
Sirve la primera capa y refrigera por 20 minutos hasta que se compacte.
Cuando pasen los minutos de refrigeración, en la licuadora lavada agrega el coco rallado, el zumo de limón, el azúcar y el hielo.
Licúa muy bien hasta que tengas el frappé.
Vierte en el vaso para crear la segunda capa. Lleva nuevamente al refrigerador por 20 minutos más.
Para la última parte del frappé, incorpora el pepino sin semilla a la licuadora.
Agrega la menta, el zumo de limón, hielo y el azúcar.
Procesa y agrega en el vaso hasta que formes las capas de frappé multicolor.
Una vez listo, decora con menta o déjalo así. ¡Disfrútalo!

tricolor-ice-cream-cake-lezzet.name: Tricolor Ice Cream Cake
instructions: 1. Çilek ve pudra şekeri el blenderinden geçirip püre haline getirin.
2.  Yuvarlak cam kasenin içini streç film ile kaplayın.
3.  Yumuşattığınız bitter çikolatayı kaba aktarın.
4.  Ortasına daha küçük bir kap yerleştirip orta kısmını havuz şeklinde açın ve derin dondurucuda 10 dakika bekletin.
5.  Yumuşattığınız meyveli dondurmayı çikolatanın üzerine döküp daha küçük bir kap ile ortasını havuz şeklinde açın.
6.  10 dakika derin dondurucuda beklettin.
7.  Çilek püresini üzerine dökün.
8.  Streç film ile kaplayıp derin dondurucuda en az 4 saat bekletin ve servis yapın.
9. Alternatif olarak kutlamalarda sunabileceğiniz dondurmalı pasta tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

tricolor-melted-cheese-recipe-comedera.name: Tricolor Melted Cheese Recipe

ingredients.item: 2   chiles poblanos asados  ( picado en rajas)

instructions: En una sartén a fuego medio alto, agrega el aceite y sofríe la cebolla y el ajo ligeramente sin dejar quemar.
Incorpora los chiles poblanos en rajas y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Deja cocinar durante 4 minutos y reserva.
En la misma sartén, derrite la mantequilla y acitrona ligeramente la cebolla.
Incorpora los champiñones y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Cocina hasta que cambien ligeramente de color. Aproximadamente 2 a 3 minutos y reserva.
En un sartén, fríe los chorizos hasta que estén doraditos, aproximadamente 5 minutos y reserva.
En un recipiente apto para el horno agrega en la 3era parte extrema, los chiles poblanos, en el centro, los champiñones y al último, el chorizo.
Agrega el queso desmenuzado sobre todos los ingredientes hasta cubrir bien y lleva al horno.
Hornea durante 10-12 minutos a 199°C hasta fundir.
Retira del horno y disfruta con tortillas de maíz o de harina.

tricolor-pasta-salad-with-shrimp-telecul.name: Tricolor Pasta Salad With Shrimp
tricolor-pasta-salad-with-shrimp-telecul.original_name: Salada de massa tricolor com camarão
instructions: Coza a massa em água temperada com sal, pelo tempo indicado na embalagem. Escorra e reserve.
Salteie o camarão numa frigideira com 30 ml do azeite e o alho esmagado. Tempere com sal a gosto e reserve.
Lave os tomates e corte-os em cubos; descasque e corte a cebola em meias-luas finas; pique a salsa.
Numa tigela, coloque o sumo de laranja, o restante azeite, a mostarda e o vinagre e misture muito bem até ficar homogéneo.
Numa taça de servir, disponha a massa, o tomate, a cebola, os camarões e a salsa. Tempere com o molho, misture bem e sirva.

tricolor-pepper-relish.name: Tricolor Pepper Relish
instructions: Cut peppers into 1/4" dice; transfer to a medium heatproof bowl. Pour 4 cups boiling water over; let steep for 5 minutes. Drain.

Stir remaining ingredients in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat until sugar dissolves. Add peppers; simmer until almost dry, 13-14 minutes. Transfer to a jar. Cover and let cool slightly; chill. Serve within 2 weeks.

trifle-lezzet.name: Trifle
instructions: 1. Lezzet çocuklarınız için de harika tatlı tarifleri sunuyor.
2.  Şimdi başlayalım.
3.  Böğürtlenlerin yarısını şeker ile birlikte ezerek püre haline getirin.
4.  Ekmekleri bardağa uygun yuvarlak bir kalıp ile kesin.
5.  Kremayı mikserle hafif katılaşıncaya kadar çırpın.
6.  Bardakların dibine 1 dilim ekmek, üzerine biraz krema ve böğürtlen püresi ekleyin.
7.  Aynı sıralamayı tekrarlayın.
8.  Buzdolabına alarak 1 saat bekletin.
9.  Buzdolabından alıp, üzerlerine böğürtlen dizin.
10.  Pudra şeker serpiştirerek servis yapın.

trifle-recipe-lezzet.name: Trifle Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı toz şeker (yaklaşık 100 g)
Süt yerine badem sütü veya laktozsuz süt kullanarak farklı beslenme tercihlerine uygun bir tatlı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Sütlü çikolata yerine bitter çikolata tercih ederek daha yoğun kakao aroması elde edebilir ya da beyaz çikolata ile daha yumuşak bir lezzet yakalayabilirsiniz.
Muz ve çileğe alternatif olarak frambuaz, böğürtlen veya kivi gibi meyveler ekleyerek tatlıya hafif ekşimsi bir denge kazandırabilirsiniz.
Kakaolu bisküvi yerine yulaflı veya sade bisküvi kullanarak daha hafif bir taban oluşturabilirsiniz.
Kremanın bir kısmını labne peyniri ile karıştırarak daha dolgun ve cheesecake benzeri bir kıvam elde edebilirsiniz.
Toz şeker miktarını azaltıp yerine bal veya akçaağaç şurubu ekleyerek farklı bir tat profili oluşturabilirsiniz.
Katmanlara ince çekilmiş fındık, badem veya ceviz serpiştirerek tatlıya ekstra doku katabilirsiniz.
Daha aromatik bir sonuç için muhallebiye çok az portakal veya limon kabuğu rendesi ilave edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Sütü, toz şekeri ve nişastayı bir tencereye alın.
2.  Orta ateşte sürekli karıştırarak pürüzsüz ve koyu bir kıvam elde edene kadar pişirin.
3. Muhallebi kıvamına geldiğinde tereyağı, çikolata ve vanilini ekleyin.
4.  Tüm malzemeler eriyip karışım parlak bir görünüm alana kadar karıştırmaya devam edin.
5. Hazırladığınız çikolatalı muhallebiyi farklı bir kaba aktarın ve yaklaşık 30 dakika oda sıcaklığında soğumaya bırakın.
6. Ayrı bir kapta kremayı pudra şekeri ile birlikte çırpın.
7.  Yoğun ve kabarık bir kıvam elde ettiğinizde buzdolabına kaldırarak dinlendirin.
8. Soğuyan muhallebiyi mikserle kısa süre çırparak daha akışkan ve pürüzsüz hale getirin.
9.  Ardından çırpılmış kremadan birkaç kaşık ekleyip tekrar çırparak karışımın daha hafif bir doku kazanmasını sağlayın.
10. Bisküvileri ayrı kaselerde iri parçalar kalacak şekilde ezin.
11.  Servis için kullanacağınız derin cam kabın tabanına önce kakaolu bisküvileri yayın.
12. Üzerine çırpılmış kremanın yarısını ekleyin ve spatula ya da kaşığın arkasıyla eşit şekilde dağıtın.
13. Kremanın üzerine eritilmiş çikolatayı gezdirin, ardından küçük küpler halinde doğradığınız muzları yerleştirin.
14. Muz katmanının üstünü çikolatalı muhallebi ile kaplayarak düzeltin.
15. Muhallebinin üzerine kremalı bisküvi parçalarını serpiştirin.
16. Kalan kremayı en üste yayarak tatlıyı tamamlayın ve tekrar eritilmiş çikolata gezdirin.
17. Son dokunuş olarak dilimlenmiş çilekleri ortasına yerleştirin, boş kalan alanları bisküvi parçalarıyla süsleyin.
18. Tatlıyı buzdolabında yaklaşık 1 saat dinlendirdikten sonra kaşıkla servis edin.
19.  Afiyet olsun.

trilece-lezzet.name: Trileçe
instructions: 1. Öncelikle yumurtaların sarısı ve beyazını farklı kaplara ayırın.
2. Yumurta aklarını tuz ile kar haline gelene kadar çırpın.
3.  Diğer bir kapta ise yumurta sarılarını toz şeker ile iyice çırpın.
4. Un, zeytinyağı vanilya ve kabartma tozunu yumurta sarılarının olduğu kaba ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
5. Yumurta aklarını spatula yardımıyla unlu karışıma yavaş yavaş karıştırarak ekleyin.
6. Karışımı yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dökün.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 40-45 dakika pişirin.
8. Şerbeti için gerekli olan tüm malzemeyi bir kaseye alın ve süt iyice köpürene kadar çırpın.
9.  Hazırladığınız şerbeti buzdolabına alıp soğumaya bırakın.
10. Karamel sosu için; şekeri yapışmaz yüzeyli bir tavaya alın ve eriyene kadar pişirin.
11.  Tereyağı ve kremayı ilave edip hızlıca karıştırın.
12. Kek ılıkken kürdan batırarak delikler açın ve soğuk şerbeti üzerine dökün.
13.  Şerbeti tamamen çektiğinde karamel sosu da üzerine ekleyin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

trini-beef-pelau.name: Trini Beef Pelau

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 3 0.5 tsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Parboiled long-grain rice (such as carolina gold parboiled rice)

instructions: Toss 3 lb. beef stew meat (such as chuck), cut into 1"–2" pieces, in a large nonreactive bowl with 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 3½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, and 1 Tbsp. coarsely ground black pepper. Add 12 scallions, coarsely chopped, 1 large Scotch bonnet or habanero chile, finely chopped, one 2” piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, ⅓ cup ketchup, 3 Tbsp. finely chopped garlic, and 1 Tbsp. coarsely chopped thyme. Using gloved hands, massage marinade into meat until well coated, about 2 minutes. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Heat ¼ cup vegetable oil in a large heavy-bottomed pot over medium-high. Sprinkle in ½ cup (packed) dark brown sugar and cook, undisturbed, until starting to sizzle and darken, 1–2 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally with a heatproof spatula, until sugar is bubbling and caramel is a dark brown (but not black) color, 3–4 minutes more. (Note: The oil will not incorporate with the melted sugar.) Immediately add beef and its marinade and stir to coat. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and cook, without stirring, until beef is brown and has released its juices, 15–20 minutes.

Add 7 large carrots (about 2 lb.), scrubbed, cut into ½” pieces, one 15-oz. can green pigeon peas, rinsed, one 13.5-oz. can full-fat unsweetened coconut milk, 2 cups parboiled long-grain rice, well rinsed, and remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir to combine. Bring liquid to a simmer, then cover pot and cook over medium-low heat until rice is tender, 40–50 minutes.
Uncover pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until some excess liquid evaporates, 6–8 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Divide pelau among bowls. Scatter 2 scallions, thinly sliced, over, dividing evenly. Serve with chopped cilantro and sliced avocado; season avocado with salt.

trini-callaloo.name: Trini Callaloo

ingredients.item: Steamed rice or baked macaroni pie

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, about 1 minute. Add scallions, cilantro, and thyme and cook, stirring, 1 minute.

Stir in collard greens and spinach just to wilt slightly, then add okra, chopped chile, squash, coconut milk, and 1 tsp. pepper; season with salt. Stir well, then place whole chile on top. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and simmer until squash is tender and greens are wilted and softened, 40–45 minutes.

Remove and discard whole chile (it should be shriveled but still intact). Using an immersion blender, purée Callaloo until smooth. (If you don’t have an immersion blender, blend in batches in a regular blender). The Callaloo should be thick and viscous. Taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Serve with rice or baked macaroni pie.

trini-stewed-eggplant.name: Trini Stewed Eggplant

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
(or more) tabasco or other spicy hot sauce

instructions: Cut top off of 1 medium globe eggplant (about 14 oz.) as close as possible to stem. Using a vegetable peeler, remove skin and discard. Slice eggplant in half lengthwise. Lay halves flat on their cut sides, then slice each half lengthwise into thirds to create long slabs. Cut each slab into large cubes.

Heat 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat about 30 seconds, add 2 tsp. Chief or madras curry powder, and stir to combine. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add eggplant and stir to coat in oil. Pour in ¼ cup water, stir again, and cover pan. Cook until eggplant is tender but not falling apart, 7–9 minutes.
Meanwhile, peel and finely chop 7 garlic cloves.

Uncover pan and pour in another ¼ cup water. Stir, re-cover, and cook 7 minutes (eggplant should be soft enough to mash easily). Uncover and mash eggplant with a fork. Mix in garlic, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. (or more) Tabasco or other spicy hot sauce and cook, uncovered, until garlic mellows and flavors have come together, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; taste and season with more salt and hot sauce if needed.
Do ahead: Eggplant can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.


Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best eggplant recipes →

trinidad-black-cake.name: Trinidad Black Cake
instructions: Place raisins, currants, prunes, and mixed peel in a food processor; process until finely chopped. Transfer to a large jar.
Pour cherry brandy, 1/2 cup brown sugar, dark rum, and mixed spice into the jar; mix well and seal. Refrigerate, occasionally stirring, until flavors blend, 2 weeks to 3 months.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and line two 9-inch cake pans with parchment paper.

Combine butter and 1 ¾ cups brown sugar in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Beat in eggs until smooth. Beat in raisin mixture until evenly incorporated. Fold in flour and vanilla extract gradually until batter is smooth and falls off the back of a lifted spoon.
Divide batter between the prepared cake pans. Cover cake pans loosely with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until cakes are firm and spring back when lightly pressed, about 2 ½ hours.
Cool cakes in the pans, 8 hours to overnight. Wrap in aluminum foil to keep moist.

trinidad-corn-soup.name: Trinidad Corn Soup

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.5–2 tsp. morton kosher salt
Homemade green seasoning or store-bought green seasoning

instructions: Place 1 cup yellow split peas in a small bowl and pour in room temperature water to cover. Let soak 30 minutes, then drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, heat a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 5 slices bacon, chopped, stirring occasionally, until browned and beginning to crisp, 7–9 minutes. Spoon off all but about 2 Tbsp. fat from pot; discard excess or save for another use. Add 1 small onion, chopped, 2 scallions, thinly sliced, 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 2 medium carrots, peeled, chopped, ½ green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, chopped, 1 seasoning pepper (pimiento), finely chopped (if using), 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper. Cook, stirring often, until onion is softened and beginning to turn golden, 5–8 minutes. Add 2 plum tomatoes, chopped, ¼ cup green seasoning, and 1 tsp. thyme leaves and stir to coat evenly. Cook, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes burst and break apart and peppers are softened slightly, 7–9 minutes.
While vegetables are cooking, blend 1 cup fresh or frozen corn kernels, a pinch of kosher salt, and ¼ cup water in a blender or food processor until texture is similar to creamed corn; set aside.

Add 2 cups 1" cubes peeled kabocha or butternut squash, one 13.5-oz. can unsweetened coconut milk, 3 cups low-sodium chicken broth, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt and reserved split peas to pot. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer 20 minutes.

While the squash is simmer, make the dumplings if desired, or skip to step 7. Mix 1 cup all-purpose flour and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl to combine. Using your hands, work in 5 Tbsp. water, a tablespoonful at a time, until a firm dough forms. Turn out onto a surface and knead  until a smooth ball forms, about 3 minutes. Let rest 10 minutes.

Break dough up into 4 equal pieces. Working one at a time, roll each piece on surface with your hands to create a ½"-thick rope. Cut ropes into 1" pieces. Add dumplings to pot and stir to combine. Re-cover pot and cook until dumplings are mostly tender, 13–17 minutes.

Add 2 ears of corn, husked, cut crosswise into 1"-thick rounds and reserved puréed corn to soup; reduce heat to medium and cook until soup is thickened and dumplings are completely tender, 9–11 minutes. Taste soup and season with more salt if needed.

Ladle soup into bowls and serve with Trinidadian hot sauce if you can get your hands on it.
Do ahead: Soup can be made 4 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over medium, thinning with water as need, before serving.

trinidad-curry-powder.name: Trinidad Curry Powder
instructions: Break open the cardamom pods, remove the seeds, and discard the pods.

Place the cardamom seeds, coriander, seeds, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and curry leaves in a heavy frying pan and toast, swirling for about 5 minutes, until the spices begin to release their aromas.
Place the toasted spices in a food processor or spice grinder and add the peppercorns and cloves. Grind the mixture to a find powder. Stir in the turmeric.
Store in an airtight container. If stored properly, curry powder will keep for at least two months.

trinity-korokke.name: Trinity Korokke

ingredients.prep: such as grapeseed, plus more as needed

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil. Cook the potatoes for 10 minutes, or until tender. Add the celery, onion, and bell pepper and boil for 4 more minutes. The veggies will be lightly boiled but still have a crisp bite. Drain the contents of the pan, transfer to a large bowl, and mash the vegetable mixture together with a large spoon, ideally a slotted spoon or a potato masher. (The celery, onion, and bell pepper will retain their shape.) Add the salt and black pepper, then chill in the fridge for 15 minutes, or until cool enough to handle.
While the potato mixture is cooling, prepare your dredging station. In a shallow bowl, combine the flour and panko. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, mayo, and milk.

Remove the potato mixture from the fridge and stir in the shredded mozzarella. Scoop out ¼-cup portions of the mixture and shape into discs. Dip each disc into the wet dredging mixture, then the dry mixture, ensuring each disc is evenly coated.

In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat until it is shimmering. Working in batches so as not to crowd the pan, fry the croquettes for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Repeat this with the rest of the croquettes, adding more oil to the pan as needed so that the oil reaches halfway up the croquettes. Serve immediately with katsu sauce or ketchup for dipping, if desired.

trinxat-de-la-cerdanya-traditional-catal.name: Trinxat De La Cerdanya (traditional Catalan Recipe)
trinxat-de-la-cerdanya-traditional-catal.original_name: Trinxat de la Cerdanya (receta tradicional catalana)

ingredients.item: 3-4 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Comienza pelando y troceando las patatas y la col en trozos pequeños. En una cazuela grande, hierve agua con sal y añade las patatas. Cocina las patatas hasta que estén medio cocidas, lo que tomará alrededor de 10-12 minutos. Luego, agrega la col a la cazuela y continúa hirviendo todo hasta que tanto las patatas como la col estén bien cocidas y tiernas, lo que tomará otros 10-12 minutos aproximadamente. Una vez cocidos, escurre bien las patatas y la col y colócalos en una fuente honda. Con la ayuda de un tenedor, comienza a “trinxar” o machacar las patatas y la col formando un puré uniforme. Deja la mezcla a un lado.

Mientras la col y las patatas reposan, calienta una sartén grande a fuego medio. En una sartén, calienta un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra y luego pela y lamina los dientes de ajo. Fríelos en el aceite hasta que estén dorados y fragantes, luego retíralos de la sartén y resérvalos. En la misma sartén, añade la panceta cortada en trozos y fríela hasta que esté crujiente.

Retira la panceta de la sartén y, con el aceite restante en la sartén, calienta la mezcla de col y patata a fuego medio-alto, cocinándola por ambos lados hasta que esté dorada y crujiente. Esto tomará unos 5-7 minutos por cada lado. Una vez que el Trinxat esté dorado y crujiente, colócalo en una fuente de servir.
Finalmente, esparce los ajos fritos y la panceta crujiente por encima del Trinxat y sírvelo inmediatamente.

trio-of-mushroom-soup-cream-of-mushroom-.name: Trio Of Mushroom Soup (cream Of Mushroom Soup)

ingredients.prep: peeled and diced into small cubes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat 1/4 cup butter and oil in a large pot over medium heat until butter melts, 1 to 2 minutes. Add onion; cook and stir until soft, about 5 minutes. Add remaining 1/4 cup butter, portobello mushrooms, baby bella mushrooms, and oyster mushrooms, and tarragon; cook and stir until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.
Stir chicken broth, potato, thyme, and oregano into the pot. Bring to a boil; let soup simmer until potato is tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove soup from heat and puree with an immersion blender until smooth.
Return soup to heat and simmer until heated through, about 5 minutes. Stir in heavy cream. Season with salt and pepper.

tripe-stew-teleculinaria.name: Tripe Stew

ingredients.item: 200 g  feijão manteiga cozido ((ou outro a gosto))

instructions: Leve ao lume uma panela grande com água abundante. Quando estiver a ferver, junte o bucho e as restantes carnes indicadas, incluindo os enchidos. Vá retirando à medida que forem cozendo. Reserve todas as carnes em local quente, bem como 200 ml da água, e mantenha a restante ao lume.
Junte as couves, cortadas em pedaços, as batatas, descascadas e cortadas ao meio, e as cenouras e o nabo, descascados e cortados em quartos, colocando-os na panela por esta ordem.
Coza o arroz num tacho à parte, utilizando os 200 ml de água que reservou e acrescentando mais 100 ml de água. Noutro tacho com água a ferver, aqueça o feijão.

Quando as batatas estiverem cozidas, retire os legumes para uma travessa de servir. Corte as carnes e os enchidos, como na vê na foto, e disponha-os também na travessa. Escorra o feijão e coloque-o igualmente na travessa. Sirva o cozido com o arroz.

tripe-traditional-recipe-argiro.name: Tripe Traditional Recipe
instructions: Αγοράζουμε από τον κρεοπώλη μοσχαρίσια κοιλιά καθαρισμένη (στομάχι) και καθαρισμένο ποδαράκι μοσχαρίσιο μπροστινό.
Πλένουμε τα υλικά και τα στραγγίζουμε.
Βάζουμε σε μια λεκάνη το πλυμένο και σπασμένο ποδαράκι και το στομάχι.
Στύβουμε δυο λεμόνια και πασπαλίζουμε 1 κ.σ χοντρό αλάτι και τρίβουμε τα υλικά με το χέρι.
Σκεπάζουμε τον πατσά και διατηρούμε στο ψυγείο για μια νύχτα ή για 5 με 6 ώρες.
Την επόμενη ημέρα ξεπλένουμε τα υλικά του πατσά σε καθαρό νερό.
Βάζουμε τον πατσά σε μεγάλη κατσαρόλα και σκεπάζουμε με κρύο νερό.
Αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση και βράζουμε 4 με 5 λεπτά.
Χύνουμε το νερό αυτό και ξεπλένουμε τον πατσά με ζεστό νερό.
Ξαναβάζουμε τον πατσά στην κατσαρόλα.
Σκεπάζουμε με ζεστό νερό περίπου 2 με 2,5 λίτρα.
Αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση και ξαφρίζουμε συνεχώς μέχρι να μην βλέπουμε πλέον αφρό στην επιφάνεια.
Χαμηλώνουμε την ένταση της εστίας και σκεπάζουμε τον πατσά.
Σιγοβράζουμε γύρω στις 2 με 2,5 ώρες μέχρι να μαλακώσει καλά.
Όταν βράσει ο πατσάς και ξεκολλάει το κρέας από το κόκαλο, βγάζουμε το ποδαράκι και αφού λίγο κρυώσει το ξεκοκαλίζουμε και το ψιλοκόβουμε.
Το ξαναβάζουμε στο ζωμό.
Το ίδιο κάνουμε και με το στομάχι.
Το βγάζουμε από τον ζωμό και το ψιλοκόβουμε ή χοντροκόβουμε ανάλογα την προτίμηση. Εγώ ψιλοκόβω πάντα τον πατσά.
Τώρα είναι η ώρα που αλατίζουμε τον πατσά και το αφήνουμε να βράσει για 15 με 20 λεπτά επιπλέον.
Αν θέλουμε να αυγοκόψουμε τον πατσά κάνουμε κλασικό αυγολέμονο με αυγά και λεμόνια.
Παραδοσιακά, σερβίρουμε τον ψιλοκομμένο πατσά σε βαθιά ζεστά πιάτα, με μπόλικη σούπα και ψιλοκομμένο πατσά.
Ραντίζουμε με σκορδοστούμπι.
Προαιρετικά προσθέτουμε μπούκοβο κατά βούληση.

tripitas-tacos-recipe-comedera.name: Tripitas Tacos Recipe
instructions: Lava perfectamente la tripa de res por dentro y por fuera.
En una olla agrega agua y coloca la carne con un poco de sal, cebolla, laurel y ajo, y dejamos hervir hasta que la carne esté perfectamente cocida, unos 90-120 minutos aproximadamente.
Una vez hervida la tripa la escurre y pícala en trozos no muy pequeños.
En una cacerola agrega la manteca y cuando esté derretida pon las tripitas a freír y espera otros 15 minutos.
Depende de tu gusto el tiempo de este proceso, si es muy frita o ligeramente frita.
Calienta unas tortillas de maíz y prepara los tacos de tripa de res tradicional acompañado con una rica salsa roja taquera, cebolla y cilantro finamente picados.

triple-berry-cheesecake-poke-cake.name: Triple Berry Cheesecake Poke Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray; line with parchment paper.

Combine cake mix, 1 cup water, eggs, and vegetable oil in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment; beat on low speed for 30 seconds. Increase speed to medium; beat for 2 minutes. Pour batter into the prepared dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until cake is golden brown, about 25 minutes. Cool at room temperature for 10 minutes. Keep oven on.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine graham cracker crumbs and melted butter in a bowl; spread evenly onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake until slightly golden, about 10 minutes. Cool to room temperature; store crumbs in an airtight container.

Meanwhile, combine strawberries, blackberries, raspberries, sugar, 1/3 cup water, and 2 tablespoons lemon juice in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, stirring occasionally, until fruit is very soft, 7 to 8 minutes. Mash berries together with a fork; cool for 5 minutes.

Poke 30 holes (5 rows of 6 holes each) into cake using the handle of a wooden spoon. Drizzle 1/3 cup sweetened condensed milk over entire cake; pour berry mixture over cake, spreading using a spatula, ensuring mixture goes into holes. Cover cake; refrigerate at least 1 hour.

Place cream cheese in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment; whisk on high speed until very smooth, at least 3 minutes. Add remaining sweetened condensed milk, 1/4 cup lemon juice, and salt; whisk for 1 minute. Spread cream cheese mixture over cooled cake. Cover cake; chill 3 hours to overnight.
Cut cake into 12 large pieces; top with graham cracker crumbs.

triple-berry-sorbet.name: Triple Berry Sorbet
instructions: Bring sugar and water to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Stir in cranberries; cook 5 minutes. Add raspberries; simmer until raspberries soften and cranberries pop, about 5 minutes more.
Strain mixture through a sieve; discard solids. Refrigerate cranberry-raspberry liquid for 2 hours.
Stir cherry juice, lime juice, and orange juice concentrate into chilled mixture.

Pour fruit juice mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to an airtight container and freeze until firm, about 2 hours. Remove from the freezer 10 minutes before serving.

triple-cheese-gluten-free-jalapeno-poppe.name: Triple Cheese Gluten-free Jalapeno Poppers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut jalapenos in half lengthwise. Put on disposable gloves to remove the seeds and membranes.
Mix goat cheese, Cheddar cheese, Monterey Jack, chili powder, cumin, and coriander until well combined. Mix bread crumbs, cotija, and oregano together in a separate bowl.
Fill each jalapeno half with equal amounts of the goat cheese mixture. Gently roll the tops of the filled peppers in the bread crumb mixture. Arrange peppers on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until bread crumbs are browned, about 20 minutes. Garnish with fresh thyme.

triple-chocolate-brownies-argiro.name: Triple Chocolate Brownies
instructions: Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε τετράγωνο ταψάκι 24×24εκ. Θα στρώσουμε μέσα βρεγμένο και τσαλακωμένο αντικολλητικό χαρτί για εύκολο ξεφορμάρισμα.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 180ºC στον αέρα.  Θα ψήσουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα.
Κόβουμε σε κομμάτια τη λευκή σοκολάτα και την κρατάμε στην άκρη. Μπορούμε να χρησιμοποιήσουμε και σταγόνες λευκής σοκολάτας.
Ψιλοκόβουμε τις δύο σοκολάτες, πικρή και γάλακτος.

Βάζουμε τις δύο ψιλοκομμένες σοκολάτες (κουβερτούρα και γάλακτος) με το βούτυρο σε μπεν μαρί να λιώσουν σε χαμηλή φωτιά, ανακατεύοντας. Μόλις λιώσει η σοκολάτα, την αφήνουμε στην άκρη να πέσει η θερμοκρασία της.
Με μίξερ χειρός, σε ένα μπολ χτυπάμε τα 3 αυγά με τη ζάχαρη, τη βανίλια και το αλάτι για 3΄-4΄. Τα αυγά με τη ζάχαρη πρέπει να γίνουν κρέμα και να πάρουν 3 φορές τον όγκο τους.
Προσθέτουμε την κρέμα γάλακτος.
Προσθέτουμε, πάντα ανακατεύοντας, τις λιωμένες χλιαρές σοκολάτες.
Τέλος, κοσκινίζουμε στο μείγμα για μπράουνις το αλεύρι και με σπάτουλα ανακατεύουμε, διπλώνοντας το μείγμα.
Ρίχνουμε και τα κομμάτια λευκής σοκολάτας. Ανακατεύουμε απαλά.
Αδειάζουμε το μείγμα στο έτοιμο ταψί.

triple-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Triple Chocolate Cake

ingredients.item: 75 grαλεύρι που φουσκώνει μόνο του κοσκινισμένο
500 mlκρέμα γάλακτος χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή
75 grαλεύρι που φουσκώνει μόνο του κοσκινισμένο
500 mlκρέμα γάλακτος χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή

instructions: Χτυπάμε στο μίξερ τα αυγά με τη ζάχαρη για 7΄-8΄ ν’ ασπρίσουν και ν’ αφρατέψουν καλά.
Προσθέτουμε το κοσκινισμένο αλεύρι με το κοσκινισμένο κακάο και τα ενώνουμε απαλά διπλώνοντας με σπάτουλα για να μη χάσουμε τον αέρα που εγκλωβίσαμε στα χτυπημένα αυγά.
Βουτυρώνουμε και αλευρώνουμε πολύ καλά μία φόρμα δαχτυλίδι ή ταψάκι με διάμετρο 23 εκ.
Το ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 180°C σε αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για 20΄-25΄, να ξεκολλάει απ’ τα τοιχώματα.
Όταν ψηθεί, αφήνουμε να περάσουν 5΄-6΄, το ξεφορμάρουμε και το αφήνουμε σε σχάρα να κρυώσει τελείως.
Ζεσταίνουμε όλα τα υλικά σε χαμηλή φωτιά να ενωθούν.
Δεν τα βράζουμε, γιατί θα κόψει το γάλα.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Σε μικρή κατσαρόλα, σε πολύ χαμηλή φωτιά λιώνουμε την πικρή σοκολάτα με την κρέμα γάλακτος.
Το ίδιο κάνουμε και με τη λευκή σοκολάτα.
Αφήνουμε λίγο να κρυώσουν.
Χτυπάμε στο μίξερ τα 500 ml κρέμα γάλακτος σε παχύρρευστη μορφή.
Παίρνουμε τα 2/3 από την παχύρρευστη κρέμα και τα ενώνουμε απαλά με τη λιωμένη λευκή σοκολάτα.
Ενώνουμε την υπόλοιπη χτυπημένη κρέμα (1/3) με τη λιωμένη πικρή σοκολάτα.
Αφήνουμε και τις δυο μους στο ψυγείο για 15΄.
Στη φόρμα που ψήσαμε το παντεσπάνι στρώνουμε μεμβράνη (να περισσεύει από τα τοιχώματα αρκετή).
Χωρίζουμε το παντεσπάνι σε 2 μέρη.
Βάζουμε στη φόρμα ένα κομμάτι.
Το αλείφουμε με πινέλο, με αρκετό σιρόπι, να ποτίσει καλά.
Απλώνουμε επάνω τη μισή μους λευκής σοκολάτας.
Καλύπτουμε με όλη τη μους πικρής σοκολάτας.
Τέλος, κάνουμε μία στρώση με την υπόλοιπη λευκή.
Καλύπτουμε με το δεύτερο παντεσπάνι.
Σιροπιάζουμε καλά με πινέλο.
Γυρίζουμε τις μεμβράνες που προεξέχουν από τη φόρμα και καλύπτουμε καλά όλη την επιφάνεια.
Τοποθετούμε στο ψυγείο για 4 ώρες – ακόμα καλύτερα για μία νύχτα.
Λιώνουμε σε πολύ χαμηλή φωτιά τη σοκολάτα γάλακτος με την κρέμα γάλακτος.
Ξεφορμάρμουμε, αφαιρούμε τις μεμβράνες και τοποθετούμε σε τουρτιέρα.
Περιχύνουμε με το γλάσο.
Αφήνουμε στο ψυγείο μέχρι να σερβίρουμε.

triple-chocolate-cheesecake.name: Triple Chocolate Cheesecake

ingredients.item: Oreos or other creme-filled chocolate sandwich cookies
Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Line bottom of pan with parchment paper. Wrap outside of pan with foil, ensuring foil covers bottom and sides completely (this will help avoid leaks).

Pulse 16 Oreos or other creme-stuffed chocolate sandwich cookies in a food processor until fine crumbs form. (Alternatively, place cookies in a large resealable plastic bag and crush to very fine crumbs using a rolling pin.)

Transfer crumbs to a medium bowl and mix in  2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, 1 Tbsp. sugar, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt until crumbs are evenly saturated with butter. Transfer to prepared pan and, using a flat-bottomed measuring cup, press crumbs evenly across bottom and about ½” up sides of pan. Bake crust until fragrant, 8–10 minutes.
Set pan inside a large skillet (12”–14”) or other ovenproof dish that can comfortably accommodate it.
Bring a medium pot of water to a simmer.

Place 8 oz. bittersweet chocolate (70% cacao), coarsely chopped, and ½ cup plus 2 Tbsp. heavy cream in a medium heatproof bowl. Place bowl over simmering water and heat, stirring occasionally, until chocolate is melted and smooth, 6–8 minutes (mixture may look slightly curdled; that is okay); remove from heat and set aside.

Pulse three 8-oz. packages cream cheese, 1 cup (200 g) sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract in a food processor until mixture is very smooth, about 1 minute. Add melted chocolate mixture and remaining ½ cup plus 2 Tbsp. heavy cream; process until combined, about 45 seconds. Add 4 large eggs and pulse until incorporated, about 45 seconds.
(Alternatively, place cream cheese, sugar, salt, and vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment. Beat on low speed, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl often, until smooth, 8–10 minutes. Beat in melted chocolate mixture and remaining heavy cream, scraping sides and bottom often, until combined, 5–7 minutes. Lightly whisk eggs in a small bowl; add to stand mixer and mix on low just until incorporated. Using a rubber spatula, fold mixture by hand to ensure chocolate is well combined.)
Pour cream cheese mixture into pan (it’s okay if crust is still warm). Pour simmering water into outer baking dish to come halfway up sides of springform pan; carefully transfer to oven.

Bake cheesecake until edges are set but a 2"–3" circle in the center still wobbles slightly (cheesecake will continue to set after baking), 50–60 minutes. Immediately remove cheesecake from hot water bath (be careful not to get water in it) and let cool until barely warm, 40–45 minutes.

Place 2 oz. bittersweet chocolate (70% cacao), coarsely chopped, in a small heatproof bowl. Heat ¼ cup heavy cream in a small saucepan until simmering; about 2 minutes. Pour over chocolate and let sit for 2 minutes, then stir with a rubber spatula until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth.

Pour chocolate ganache over cheesecake, using a small offset spatula to spread ganache evenly across surface and up to edges of pan. Chill cheesecake (no need to cover) until firm and fully set, at least 4 hours.

Unmold cheesecake. Using a large offset spatula, transfer to a serving platter. Slice into wedges and serve chilled or at room temperature.
Do Ahead: Chocolate cheesecake can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

triple-chocolate-chunk-cookie.name: Triple Chocolate Chunk Cookie
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Cream the butter or margarine with the brown sugar until light. Add the egg and mix well.
Stir in the flour, ground cinnamon, baking soda and salt. Mix in the nuts and the 4 ounces of the bittersweet, milk and white chocolates.
Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake at 191°C (190 degrees C) for 8 to 10 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool slightly. Dip cooled cookies into the Three Chocolate Glaze.

To Make Three Chocolate Glaze: Heat 1 teaspoon of the shortening with bittersweet chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly, until chocolate is melted and smooth. Remove from heat. Dip each cookie 1/2 inch deep into chocolate along one edge. Repeat with remaining shortening and chocolates. Rotate dipped edge of cookie for each type of chocolate.

triple-chocolate-chunk-cookies.name: Triple Chocolate Chunk Cookies
instructions: Combine brown sugar, butter, white sugar, and salt in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until a creamy, deep brown mixture forms. Add egg and vanilla; beat until mixture lightens and becomes smooth, 10 to 15 seconds.

Mix flour and baking soda together in a separate bowl. Add slowly to the wet ingredients until mostly incorporated, but some white traces of flour remain. Fold in milk chocolate, dark chocolate, and white chocolate using a spatula, not the mixer. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 48 hours.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C) when ready to bake.
Divide cold dough into 2 1/4-ounce portions and place on a cookie sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven until the edges start to look golden brown and crispy, 10 to 12 minutes. Do not overbake; the centers will not look fully done. Cool until cookies are set, about 30 minutes.

triple-chocolate-mousse-argiro.name: Triple Chocolate Mousse

ingredients.item: 1μεγάλο φύλλo ζελατίνης των 5 γρ. ή δύο μικρά
Καρούλια σοκολάτας λευκής, γάλακτος και πικρής ανάμεικτα
1μεγάλο φύλλo ζελατίνης των 5 γρ. ή δύο μικρά
Καρούλια σοκολάτας λευκής, γάλακτος και πικρής ανάμεικτα

instructions: Zεσταίνουμε πρώτα τα 250 γρ. κρέμα γάλακτος σε κατσαρόλα μέχρι να αχνίζει.
Σε τρία μπολ χωριστά σε μπεν μαρί λιώνουμε τις τρεις σοκολάτες. Κατεβάζουμε από τη φωτιά.
Σε μπολ βάζουμε τους κρόκους, τη ζάχαρη, τη βανίλια και το αλάτι και ομογενοποιούμε με σύρμα.
Με ροή κλωστής και ανακατεύοντας, ρίχνουμε την καυτή κρέμα στα αβγά.
Ξαναβάζουμε την κρέμα στην κατσαρόλα σε χαμηλή φωτιά με συνεχές ανακάτεμα και αφήνουμε για περίπου 4′-5′. Αν έχουμε θερμόμετρο να είναι 71ºC.
Αφού σιγοψηθεί η κρέμα, κατεβάζουμε από τη φωτιά, στύβουμε τη ζελατίνη και την προσθέτουμε.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά να διαλυθεί. Για πιο λεία υφή περνάμε την κρέμα από λεπτή σίτα.
Ισομοιράζουμε την κρέμα στις σοκολάτες, ομογενοιποιούμε και αφήνουμε στον πάγκο να κρυώσουν καλά.
Χτυπάμε την υπόλοιπη κρέμα σε παχύρρευστη μορφή.
Αραιώνουμε κάθε σοκολάτα με 2 κ.σ. κρέμα και ισομοιράζουμε την υπόλοιπη χτυπημένη κρέμα. Απαλά ανακατεύουμε.
Βάζουμε τη μους σε στρώσεις είτε σε ατομικά ποτήρια είτε σε μπολ και σερβίρουμε με σκουπ παγωτού και καρούλια σοκολάτας.
Απαραίτητη προϋπόθεση να παγώσει καλά στο ψυγείο και να σφίξει.

triple-chocolate-scones.name: Triple Chocolate Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C) and place rack in center of oven.
In a small bowl whisk together heavy cream, egg, and vanilla extract.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, sugar, baking powder and salt.

Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut the butter into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in the chocolate chips. Add the cream mixture and stir just until the dough comes together (add more cream and/or flour as necessary).
Transfer the dough to a lightly floured surface and knead a few times. Shape the dough into a 7-inch (18 cm) round and cut into eight wedges. Place them on the baking sheet.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until they are firm around the edges but a bit soft in the center. A toothpick inserted into the center of a scone will come out clean. Cool on a wire rack.
Mix the glaze ingredients together in a bowl. Drizzle on top of the scones (optional).
Enjoy!

triple-chocolate-trifle.name: Triple Chocolate Trifle
instructions: Make the pudding: In a medium pot, combine the milk, table cream, sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, and salt and whisk together until evenly incorporated. Cook over medium-high heat, whisking constantly, until starting to thicken and bubble up, about 5 minutes.

Remove the pot from the heat and whisk in the butter and vanilla. Strain the pudding through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl. Cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly against the surface of the pudding to prevent a skin from forming. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or overnight.

Make the whipped cream: In a medium bowl, combine the heavy cream, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. Whip with an electric hand mixer on high speed until stiff peaks form, 3–4 minutes, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Transfer the whipped cream to a piping bag fitted with a large tip and chill in the refrigerator until ready to use.

Make the chocolate ganache: Add heavy cream to a microwave-safe liquid measuring cup. Microwave for 1 minute, until very hot. Add the chocolate chips and let sit for 2 minutes, then stir until smooth. Transfer to a piping bag fitted with a small tip. Set aside until ready to use.
Assemble the trifles: Transfer the chocolate pudding to a piping bag fitted with a large tip.

Add about ½ cup of the pound cake cubes to the bottom of each jar, pressing down to compact. Pipe about ¼ cup of chocolate pudding and ¼ cup of the whipped cream on top.
