instructions: Tempere os bifes com sal e pimenta. Lave os cogumelos, escorra-os bem, lamine-os e reserve-os.
Frite os bifes numa frigideira com o azeite, até ficarem dourados de ambos os lados. Retire da frigideira e reserve.
Na mesma frigideira, deite os cogumelos e deixe saltear, mexendo. Junte os alhos picados, regue com o vinho branco e envolva. Deixe ferver para o álcool evaporar.
Adicione depois as natas e o café e mexa bem. Deixe ferver novamente até obter um molho cremoso. Junte os bifes fritos, envolva, polvilhe com salsa picada e sirva com arroz branco cozido.

turkey-steaks-with-mushrooms-and-turnip-.name: Turkey Steaks With Mushrooms And Turnip Greens
turkey-steaks-with-mushrooms-and-turnip-.original_name: Bifinhos de peru com cogumelos e nabiças
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com água, 1 colher (sopa) do azeite, 1 folha de louro, 1 dente de alho inteiro (com ou sem casca) e sal. Quando estiver a ferver, junte as nabiças, mexa, deixe cozer, depois escorra-as bem, coloque-as numa travessa e tape com película aderente.

Tempere a carne com o resto dos alhos picados, o sumo de limão, as folhas do tomilho, sal e pimenta. Leve ao lume uma frigideira com os restantes azeite e louro, junte os bifes e deixe fritar ligeiramente, de ambos os lados. Retire e reserve.

Na mesma frigideira, salteie os cogumelos, previamente escorridos. Regue com o vinho, deixe ferver alguns minutos, dissolva a farinha maisena no caldo de galinha, junte aos cogumelos e deixe levantar fervura.
Acrescente os bifes e a manteiga e deixe aquecer bem. Retire do lume e junte os bifes e o molho às nabiças. Polvilhe com a salsa picada e sirva.

turkey-steaks-with-mustard-sauce-telecul.name: Turkey Steaks With Mustard Sauce
turkey-steaks-with-mustard-sauce-telecul.original_name: Bifinhos de peru com molho de mostarda
instructions: Tempere os bifes com sal e pimenta. Leve uma frigideira ao lume, com um fio de azeite, deixe aquecer e frite os bifes de ambos os lados, durante 8 minutos ou até que fiquem cozinhados.
Junte o alho, previamente descascado e laminado, as mostardas e refresque com o vinho branco. Adicione as natas, envolva e deixe cozinhar até obter uma textura aveludada. Retire e reserve.
Descasque e corte as laranjas em gomos, lave e corte os tomates ao meio e coloque-os numa taça. Junte folhas de coentros e envolva.
Disponha os bifes num prato com o molho, polvilhe com cebolinho picado, acompanhe com a salada de laranja e tomate e sirva.

turkey-stock.name: Turkey Stock

ingredients.item: Special equipment: large flameproof roasting pan

instructions: Place a rack in top third of oven and preheat to 450°. Spread 3 lb. turkey wings (about 3 large wings), chopped into 2" pieces in roasting pan and roast, turning with tongs after 20 minutes, until deeply browned, about 45 minutes.

Meanwhile, in a 6-quart large stockpot over moderate heat, heat oil until hot but not smoking. Add 1 medium onion, chopped (about 2 cups), 1 medium carrot, chopped (about ½ cup), and 1 medium celery stalk with leaves, chopped (about ½ cup), and cook, stirring occasionally, until soft, about 10 minutes. Add wings and any pan juices and reduce heat to low.

Straddle roasting pan across 2 burners on high heat and cook until browned bits are sizzling, about 1 minute. Add 2 cups cold water and bring to boil, scraping up browned bits with flat wooden spatula or spoon. Pour liquid into pot and add enough cold water to cover ingredients by 1", about 14 cups.

Raise heat to high and bring to boil, skimming foam from surface. Add 6 sprigs fresh parsley, ½ tsp. dried thyme, ¼ tsp. whole black peppercorns, and 1 dried bay leaf. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered and adding water as needed to keep wings covered, 3 hours.

Strain stock through fine-mesh sieve into large bowl, discarding solids. If using immediately, let stand until yellow fat rises to surface, 1–2 minutes, then skim off and discard fat. If not using immediately, place bowl in larger bowl of iced water. Let stand, changing ice water as it warms, until stock cools to room temperature, about 30 minutes. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, then scrape off and discard fat.
Do ahead: Stock can be made ahead and refrigerated in an airtight container, such as a mason jar, up to 2 days or frozen up to 6 months. Reheat in saucepan over low heat. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in October 2007. Head this way to find out the difference between turkey stock, turkey broth, bone broth and more →

turkey-stroganoff-recipe-comedera.name: Turkey Stroganoff Recipe
turkey-stroganoff-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de strogonoff de pavo fácil
instructions: Inicia la receta y trocea la pechuga de pavo. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Calienta un sartén con aceite de oliva y sella el pavo por 7 minutos hasta que quede bien sellado.
Mientras se cocina el pavo, corta la cebolla en julianas, trocea los dientes de ajo y rebana los champiñones.
Una vez el pavo esté sellado, retira del sartén.
Agrega un poco más de aceite de oliva y saltea los dientes de ajo y la cebolla por 2 minutos. Luego, agrega los champiñones y saltea por 3 minutos más.
Pasado ese tiempo, vierte el vino blanco y cocina por 7 minutos a fuego lento hasta que se evapore. Luego, agrega la crema de leche, mezcla y cocina por 3 minutos.
Agrega el pavo, añade un poco más de sal y pimienta, mezcla y cocina a fuego lento por 7 minutos más hasta que se forme una salsa densa y deliciosa.
Apaga, deja reposar y sirve. Acompaña con tus guarniciones favoritas.
¡Disfruta!

turkey-stuffed-with-chestnuts-recipe-com.name: Turkey Stuffed With Chestnuts Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-chestnuts-recipe-com.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno de castañas

ingredients.item: 500 gr de castañas cocidas y peladas
200 gr de carne molida de cerdo
Nuez moscada y canela en polvo  (al gusto)

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C.

Limpia el pavo y sécalo con papel absorbente. Unta mantequilla en toda la superficie y sazónalo con sal, pimienta, romero y tomillo. Añade el ajo picado en la cavidad del pavo para darle un aroma especial.
En una sartén grande, derrite la mantequilla y añade la cebolla y el ajo. Cocina hasta que estén transparentes.

Agrega la carne molida de cerdo y cocina hasta que esté dorada. Incorpora la manzana, las castañas, el pan molido, el vino blanco, la nuez moscada y la canela. Cocina a fuego medio hasta que el líquido se haya evaporado y los ingredientes estén bien integrados. Rectifica de sal y pimienta.
Con cuidado, rellena el pavo con la mezcla de castañas. Cierra la cavidad con hilo de cocina para mantener el relleno en su lugar durante la cocción.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja para hornear y vierte una taza de vino blanco o caldo de pollo en el fondo de la bandeja.
Hornea el pavo durante 3.5 a 4 horas (aproximadamente 40-45 minutos por kilo), bañándolo cada hora con sus propios jugos o con más vino blanco para mantener la carne jugosa.
Para verificar que el pavo está listo, asegúrate de que la temperatura interna de la carne llegue a 74°C en la parte más gruesa del muslo.

turkey-stuffed-with-chicken-liver-a-rich.name: Turkey Stuffed With Chicken Liver: A Rich And Juicy Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-chicken-liver-a-rich.original_name: Pavo relleno de hígado de pollo: una receta rica y jugosa

ingredients.item: Aceite de oliva ((para frotar la piel))
250 gr de hígado de pollo ( limpio y cortado en cubos pequeños)
1 taza de pan rallado o miga de pan
Sal, pimienta, tomillo y romero (al gusto)

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C (177°C).
Lava bien el pavo y sécalo con toallas de papel. Frota toda la superficie del pavo con aceite de oliva, luego sazonalo con sal y pimienta.
Separa la piel del pecho del pavo cuidadosamente y coloca la mantequilla en esta área para ayudar a mantener la carne jugosa.
En una sartén, calienta un poco de aceite de oliva y sofríe la cebolla hasta que esté dorada.
Agrega el ajo y cocina un minuto más.
Añade los cubos de hígado de pollo y cocínalos hasta que estén dorados, sin sobrecocerlos para que mantengan su textura tierna.
Incorpora la manzana, el pan rallado, el vino blanco, las hierbas (tomillo, romero, perejil), sal y pimienta al gusto. Cocina por unos minutos hasta que los ingredientes estén bien integrados.
Agrega el huevo ligeramente batido y las pasas, si se usan, mezclando bien para que el relleno adquiera una consistencia compacta.
Rellena el pavo con la mezcla de hígado de pollo, asegurándote de no sobrecargarlo para permitir que el aire circule y el pavo se cocine de manera uniforme.
Cierra la cavidad del pavo con hilo de cocina o palillos de madera.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja para hornear y cúbrelo con papel aluminio.
Hornea el pavo durante aproximadamente 3-4 horas (dependiendo del peso), retirando el papel aluminio durante los últimos 45 minutos para que la piel se dore.
Deja reposar el pavo unos 20 minutos antes de servir, para que los jugos se redistribuyan.

turkey-stuffed-with-corn-and-chorizo-a-r.name: Turkey Stuffed With Corn And Chorizo: A Recipe Full Of Flavor
turkey-stuffed-with-corn-and-chorizo-a-r.original_name: Pavo relleno con maíz y chorizo: una receta cargada de sabor

ingredients.item: 1 taza de caldo de pollo o pavo
250 gr de chorizo ((retirar la piel y desmenuzar))
2 tazas de maíz amarillo  ((puede ser de lata, escurrido))
Hierbas frescas al gusto ((perejil y tomillo))

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 °C (177°C).
Seca bien el pavo con toallas de papel y úntalo generosamente con mantequilla derretida, sal y pimienta. Reserva.
En una sartén grande, calienta un poco de aceite de oliva y cocina el chorizo desmenuzado hasta que esté dorado.
Añade la cebolla, el ajo y el pimiento, cocinando hasta que estén suaves.
Agrega el maíz, las manzanas, las pasas (si las usas) y las hierbas frescas, revolviendo bien.
Incorpora el pan rallado y mezcla hasta obtener una textura uniforme. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Retira del fuego y deja enfriar.
Rellena el pavo con la mezcla de chorizo y maíz, asegurándote de no sobrecargar el interior. Puedes coser o amarrar las patas para mantener el relleno en su lugar.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja para hornear, añadiendo un poco de caldo de pollo en el fondo.
Hornea el pavo durante aproximadamente 3.5-4 horas (unos 40-45 minutos por cada kilo de pavo), bañándolo cada media hora con los jugos de la bandeja para que quede jugoso.
Cuando el pavo esté dorado y haya alcanzado una temperatura interna de 74 °C en el centro del relleno, retíralo del horno y déjalo reposar durante 20-30 minutos antes de cortarlo.

turkey-stuffed-with-fruit-recipe-comeder.name: Turkey Stuffed With Fruit Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-fruit-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno de frutas
instructions: El pavo para esta receta debe estar fresco, suave y limpio por dentro. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto muy bien.
Con una jeringa, inyecta al pavo con coñac, sobre todo en los muslos y las pechugas.
Baña al pavo con aceite de oliva hasta que quede bien untado.
Precalienta el horno a 180° C.
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Haz lo propio con el pimiento.
Calienta una sartén con aceite de oliva, sofríe la cebolla y los dientes de ajo por 2 minutos. Añade el pimiento, y saltea por 3 minutos más.
Incorpora las manzanas cortadas en cubos, los arándanos y las uvas pasas. Condimenta con sal, pimienta y las hierbas provenzales. Mezcla y cocina por unos 4 minutos.
Apaga el fuego e incorpora el pan molido y las nueces. Mezcla hasta que todo se integre.
Rellena el pavo con esta mezcla y coloca en una bandeja engrasada.
Vierte el vino blanco con unas ramitas de romero.
Hornea a 160° C por aproximadamente 2 horas o un poco más. El pavo debe quedar tierno y muy suave.
Una vez listo, lo sirves para que tus comensales tomen sus porciones favoritas.

turkey-stuffed-with-mushrooms-recipe-com.name: Turkey Stuffed With Mushrooms Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-mushrooms-recipe-com.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con champiñones
instructions: Filetea la pechuga, procurando que quede tipo mariposa.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto por ambas partes. Reserva en la nevera.
Pela y corta la cebolla en finos cubos. Trocea los dientes de ajo, y filetea los champiñones.
Corta el tocino en cuadritos.
Calienta una sartén y añade el tocino picado, saltea por unos 4 minutos hasta que vaya soltando la grasa.
Añade los dientes de ajo y la cebolla, mezcla y saltea por unos 2 minutos más.
Sazona con las hierbas provenzales, sal y pimienta. Mezcla.
Vierte el vino blanco y cocina hasta que el alcohol evapore.
Agrega los champiñones y saltea por unos 4 minutos. Incorpora, de a poco, el pan molido, mezcla y cocina hasta que integre muy bien. Apaga y reserva.
Precalienta el horno a 180° C.
Rellena muy bien el pavo con la mezcla que hicimos de champiñones, enrolla muy bien y sujeta con hilo pabilo para que se hornee sin problemas.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja engrasada, vierte un poco de vino blanco y pincela con mantequilla.
Hornea por unos 40 minutos a a 180° C o hasta que el pavo quede bien jugoso, suave y doradito.
Una vez listo, retira del horno, deja reposar y corta en porciones.
Disfruta con tus guarniciones favoritas.

turkey-stuffed-with-pistachios-recipe-co.name: Turkey Stuffed With Pistachios Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-pistachios-recipe-co.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con pistachos
instructions: Sazona las pechugas de pavo con sal y pimienta por ambos lados. Reserva.
Precalienta el horno a 180° C.
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Trocea los dientes de ajo
Calienta una sartén y derrite la mantequilla. Sofríe la cebolla y los dientes de ajo por unos 3 minutos hasta que doren. Apaga.
Trocea los pistachos.
En un bol, incorpora el queso crema, los pistachos, el tomate triturado, los arándanos, sal, pimienta y las hierbas provenzales. Mezcla muy bien hasta que obtengas una pasta.
Rellena las pechugas con la mezcla, enrolla muy bien y sujeta con un hilo pabilo. Coloca las pechugas en una bandeja y rocía con un poco de mantequilla y perejil.
Hornea de 25 a 30 minutos o hasta que queden jugosas y la carne tierna. Una vez lista, retira del horno y sirve con tus acompañantes favoritos.

turkey-stuffing-argiro.name: Turkey Stuffing

ingredients.item: 1/2 κ.γ.ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού και χυμό από 1 πορτοκάλι
1/2 κ.γ.ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού και χυμό από 1 πορτοκάλι

instructions: Αλείφουμε ελάχιστο ελαιόλαδο τα καρεδάκια ψωμιού και τα ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C για 6–7 λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσουν. Αφήνουμε στην άκρη να κρυώσουν λίγο.
Καθαρίζουμε τις μεμβράνες από τα εντόσθια, τα πλένουμε καλά και τα ψιλοκόβουμε.
Σε μεγάλο τηγάνι ή κατσαρόλα, ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο. Προσθέτουμε τον κιμά, το μπέικον και τα ψιλοκομμένα εντόσθια. Σοτάρουμε σε δυνατή φωτιά για 6–7 λεπτά μέχρι να ροδίσουν καλά.
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι ψιλοκομμένο και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 4–5 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσει.
Σβήνουμε το μείγμα με το κονιάκ, ανακατεύουμε καλά και αφήνουμε να εξατμιστεί το αλκοόλ.
Προσθέτουμε τον χυμό πορτοκαλιού και αφήνουμε να γλασάρει το μείγμα, ανακατεύοντας απαλά.
Ρίχνουμε στο τηγάνι τα ψιλοκομμένα δαμάσκηνα, τα κάστανα, τα κομμένα καρέ ψωμιού, τα μήλα, τα καρύδια, τα κουκουνάρια, το ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού και αλατοπιπερώνουμε κατά προτίμηση.
Ανακατεύουμε όλα τα υλικά καλά, αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε το μείγμα να κρυώσει λίγο πριν το χρησιμοποιήσουμε για γέμιση στη γαλοπούλα .

turkey-stuffing-roll-ups.name: Turkey Stuffing Roll-ups
instructions: Boil water and margarine together in a medium saucepan; stir in stuffing mix. Cover and remove from heat. Let stand until stuffing softens, about 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork.
Divide stuffing between turkey slices. Roll turkey around stuffing; arrange rolls in a microwave-safe dish, seam-side down. Pour gravy over rolls.
Heat in the microwave on high until gravy is bubbly, about 5 minutes.

turkey-stuffing-soup.name: Turkey Stuffing Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a stockpot over low heat. Add celery, carrots, and onion; cook and stir until tender, 8 to 10 minutes.
Stir in turkey, stuffing, tomatoes, and parsley. Pour in turkey stock. Bring soup to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, until flavors combine, about 1 hour.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook egg noodles in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, 7 to 9 minutes. Drain.
Scoop hot noodles into deep serving bowls; ladle soup on top.

turkey-taco-soup.name: Turkey Taco Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat and stir in ground turkey. Cook and stir until turkey is crumbly, evenly browned, and no longer pink. Transfer turkey to a bowl; set aside.
Cook and stir onion in the same pot until nearly translucent, about 5 minutes. Add carrots and celery. Continue to cook and stir until tender, about 8 more minutes.
Stir in corn, about 1/4 cup cilantro, garlic, taco seasoning, cumin, chili powder, dried oregano, and cooked turkey. Cook and stir until fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Mix in tomatoes with juice, kidney beans, olives, and green chile pepper. Pour in chicken broth, water, and lime juice; season with salt and black pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and continue to simmer for 20 minutes. Remove chile halves and garnish with remaining cilantro before serving.

turkey-taco-stuffed-bell-peppers.name: Turkey Taco Stuffed Bell Peppers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
Using a sharp knife, cut off the tops of each bell pepper. Use the knife to help cut out and remove the seeds and ribs from inside the peppers.
Place the peppers in a lightly greased roasting pan and set aside.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Toss in the onion, cumin, oregano, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and sauté until the onions have softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Toss in the garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Move the onions away from the center of the pan to create an open surface in the skillet. Place the ground turkey in the center of the pan and break up the meat.
Move the meat and onions to the sides of the pan to create an open surface again. Pour in the black beans, corn, and salsa and stir the mixture until evenly combined.
Spoon the mixture evenly into the hallowed bell peppers and replace the bell pepper tops.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, until the bell peppers have softened and wilted slightly.
Remove the tops of the bell peppers, spoon on a large dollop of guacamole, and replace the tops.
Enjoy!

turkey-tacos.name: Turkey Tacos
instructions: Heat a large skillet over high heat. Once hot, add a drizzle of oil to coat the bottom of the pan. Add the ground turkey and break apart with a spatula. Add the taco seasoning, salt, and pepper and stir, cooking until the meat has browned and is fully cooked through.
Stir in the tomatoes. Bring to a gentle simmer and cook for about 5 minutes, then remove from the heat.
Scoop the turkey mixture into tortillas and top with shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, and sliced avocado.
Enjoy!

turkey-tamale-pie.name: Turkey Tamale Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and 1 large pinch salt; sauté until translucent, 3 to 5 minutes. Add poblano peppers and bell pepper; season with cumin, black pepper, and oregano. Cook and stir until peppers start to soften, about 2 minutes. Add chipotles and adobo sauce; stir to combine. Remove from heat.
Stir turkey and ½ Cheddar cheese into pepper mixture. Add enchilada sauce, chicken broth, and remaining salt; stir then transfer to a 9x12-inch baking dish. Place dish on a baking sheet.

Whisk cornmeal, flour, sugar, and 1 teaspoon kosher salt together in a large bowl. Whisk in milk and eggs until becomes a thin batter; spoon over turkey filling. Scatter remaining ½ Cheddar cheese on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is browned and a toothpick comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes.

turkey-torta.name: Turkey Torta
instructions: Soak onion in vinegar 1 hour, then drain.
Mix lime juice into some sour cream.
Build a sandwich with Kaiser roll, lime sour cream, turkey, avocado, lettuce, hot sauce, cilantro, cheese, and pickled onion.

turkey-wild-rice-soup.name: Turkey Wild Rice Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a soup pot over medium heat. Add onion and celery; cook and stir until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in flour, and cook until it turns a pale, yellowish-brown color, 3 to 5 minutes.
Gradually whisk in turkey stock until smooth and no lumps of flour remain.
Stir in carrot and bring mixture to a simmer. Cook, whisking constantly, until stock is thick and smooth and carrots are tender, about 2 minutes.
Stir in turkey, wild rice, almonds, salt, and pepper; simmer until heated through, about 5 minutes.
Stir in lemon juice and half-and-half; heat until just below a boil. Serve immediately.

turkey-with-chestnuts-lezzet.name: Turkey With Chestnuts
instructions: 1. Fırını 200 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  Hindi göğüs filetoyu bir et dövücüyle inceltin.
3.  Üzerine zeytinyağı asürüp tuz ve karabiber serpin.
4.  Tereyağını tavaya alıp eritin.
5.  Adaçayı, dilimlenmiş sarmısakları ve kavrulmuş kestaneleri ekleyip birkaç dakika kavurun.
6.  Tavayı ocaktan alıp harcı ılındırın.
7.  Ekmek içi, lor peyniri, parmesan peyniri, yumurta, tuz ve karabiberi büyük bir kaseye alın.
8.  Kestaneli harcı ekleyip karıştırın.
9.  Hindi filetonun üzerine yayın.
10.  Eti rulo şeklinde sarın ve mutfak ipiyle açılmayacak şekilde bağlayın.
11.  Etin üzerine zeytinyağı sürün.
12.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serip rulo hindi etini üzerine yerleştirin.
13.  Domates püresini biraz zeytinyağı ve su ile inceltip etin üzerine gezdirin.
14.  Üzerini alüminyum folyo ile kapatıp 200 derece fırında 30 dakika pişirin.
15.  Fırın ısısını 180 dereceye indirip üzerindeki folyoyu alın ve 20 dakika daha pişirin.
16.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

turkey-with-cornbread-stuffing.name: Turkey With Cornbread Stuffing
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a pie pan.

In a bowl, mix cornmeal and water and allow to stand for 10 minutes. Meanwhile, whisk the whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Whisk the egg and vegetable oil into the wet cornmeal; stir the wet ingredients into the flour mixture until just combined and pour into the prepared pie pan.
Bake the cornbread in the preheated oven until lightly browned and a knife inserted into the center of the cornbread comes out clean, 20 to 30 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside to cool.
Reduce oven heat to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned and crisp, about 6 minutes per side; drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Crumble the bacon when cool. Stir the onion, garlic, celery, red bell pepper, poultry seasoning, sage, and oregano into the bacon drippings left in the skillet; cook and stir until the onion is translucent, about 10 minutes.

Remove cooled cornbread from the pie pan and cut into small cubes; place into a large bowl and mix in the rye bread cubes. Stir the bacon and cooked vegetables into the stuffing until well combined; drizzle the chicken broth into the dressing, stirring to evenly moisten the bread cubes.

Rinse the turkey inside and out and pat dry with paper towels. Place turkey into a large roasting pan with a lid. Fill the body and neck cavities loosely with stuffing, folding the neck skin over the stuffing and securing in place with toothpicks. Place any leftover stuffing onto a large square of aluminum foil and fold and seal the edges to enclose the stuffing. Refrigerate stuffing packet until about 45 minutes before serving time.

Place the turkey in the oven, and roast until a meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh reads 82°C (80 degrees C), 3 1/2 to 4 hours. Remove lid after about 2 1/2 hours to brown skin. Baste occasionally with pan drippings. About 45 minutes before serving, bake the extra stuffing if desired.

turkey-with-lemon-sage-butter.name: Turkey With Lemon-sage Butter

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus 1/4 cup (1/2 stick), melted

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Set a rack inside a large heavy roasting pan. Mash 1/2 cup butter, sage, lemon zest, and paprika in a bowl to combine.

Starting at neck end of turkey, loosen the skin of the breast by gently sliding your fingers underneath. Work half of lemon-sage butter under skin. Loosen skin around legs and thighs; work remaining lemon-sage butter under skin. Season turkey inside and out with salt and pepper and stuff with lemons. Transfer turkey, breast side down, to prepared pan and refrigerate, uncovered, overnight.

Let turkey stand at room temperature for 1 hour. Preheat oven to 375°. Pour hot water into pan to a depth of 1/4”. Roast turkey, basting occasionally with remaining 1/4 cup butter, for 1 hour. Using paper towels, flip turkey; roast, basting occasionally, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh registers 165°, 1–1 1/2 hours longer. Transfer to a platter. Let rest for at least 20 minutes before carving.

turkey-with-oranges-and-apples-lezzet.name: Turkey With Oranges And Apples

ingredients.item: 1 çay bardağı beyaz şarap veya elma sirkesi

instructions: 1. Hindiyi temizleyin.
2.  Sos malzemelerinin tümünü bir kapta karıştırıp hindinin her yerine elinizle sürerek yayın.
3.  Hindinin üzerini kapatarak 1 gece buzdolabında bekletin.
4.  Ertesi gün kabukları soyulmuş elma dilimleri ve soyulmuş portakal dilimlerini hindinin iç kısmına yerleştirin.
5.  Jambon dilimlerini hindinin üzerine dizin.
6.  Yağlı kağıt ve alüminyum folyo ile üzerini kapatarak önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 2 saat pişirin.
7.  Üzerindeki yağlı ve alüminyum kağıtları alarak tamamen kızarıncaya kadar pişirmeye devam edin.
8.  Hindiyi fırından çıkartıp 10 dakika dinlendirin.
9.  Üzerindeki jambon ve içindeki meyveleri alarak servis tabağına yerleştirin.
10.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.

turkey-with-rice-and-caramelized-orange-.name: Turkey With Rice And Caramelized Orange Sauce
turkey-with-rice-and-caramelized-orange-.original_name: İç Pilavlı Ve Karamelize Portakal Soslu Hindi
instructions: 1. Hindinin içerisine kekik, biberiye, sarımsak ve yarıya kesilmiş soğanları yerleştirin.
2.  Fırın ipiyle açık kısmı bağlayın ya da dikin.
3. Limon suyu, ayçiçeği yağı, tuz ve karabiberi karıştırıp hindinin üzerine sürün.
4.  180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 3-4 saat, üzeri iyice kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
5. Karamelize portakal için; Portakal kabuklarını ince şeritler halinde doğrayın ve acılığı gidinceye kadar suyunu değiştirerek 3-4 defa kaynatın.
6. Tereyağı ve şekeri tavada karamelize haline getirin.
7.  Portakal kabuklarını ekleyip karıştırın ve pişen hindinin üzerine yayın.
8. Kestaneli ve buğdaylı iç pilav; Soğan ve sarımsağı ince doğrayıp zeytinyağında soteleyin.
9.  Buğday, kuşüzümü, tarçın, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
10.  Gerekirse az su ilavesi yaparak kısık ateşte 15 dakika pişirin.
11.  Tereyağı ve kestaneleri ekleyip karıştırın ve hindinin yanında servis yapın.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

turkey-with-rosemary-lezzet.name: Turkey With Rosemary
instructions: 1. Etlere tuz ve karabiber serpiştirip yağlanmış teflon tavada iki taraflı hafifçe pişirin.
2. Biberleri temizleyip eşit uzunlukta ve kalınlıkta kesin.
3.  Üzerlerine zeytinyağı sürüp tavada hafifçe közleyin.
4. Patlıcan ezmesini hindi etlerin yarısının üzerlerine sürün.
5.  Biberleri renk değişimlerine göre üst üste dizerek ilave edin.
6.  Üzerlerini kalan hindi etleriyle kapatın.
7.  Fırça ile zeytinyağı sürüp fındığı serpiştirin.
8.  Aralarına biberiye dalı ekleyin.
9. Hazırladığınız hindi etlerini yağlanmış fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
10.  200 dereceye ayarlı fırında hafif kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
11.  Servis yapın.

turkey-wrap-with-spinach-lezzet.name: Turkey Wrap With Spinach

ingredients.item: 750 gr fileto hindi göğüs eti (tek parça)

instructions: 1. Fileto hindi etinin sarılabilmesi için döverek biraz incelttin.
2.  1 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağını tavada ısıtın.
3.  Yemeklik doğradığınız soğan ve sarımsağı ekleyip soteleyin.
4.  Soğan yumuşayınca yıkayıp iri doğradığınız ıspanağı ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Ispanaklar hafif pişmeye yakın tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
6.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  İyice soğuyan ıspanaklı harcın suyunu süzün.
8.  Bir çırpılmış yumurtayı ekleyip karıştırın.
9.  Fileto hindi etini tezgaha yayın.
10.  Üzerine biberiyeleri serpin.
11.  Jambon dilimlerini yayın.
12.  Ispanaklı harcı da yayın.
13.  Rendelenmiş kaşar peynirini serpin.
14.  Rulo şeklinde sarıp kenarlarını kürdanla kapatın veya fırın ipi ile bağlayın.
15.  Yarım yemek kaşığı tereyağını tavada ısıtın.
16.  Hindi sarmasını tavaya alıp her iki tarafını kızartın.
17.  Hindi sarmasını fırın kabına alıp üzerine kalan tereyağını aktarın ve alüminyum folyo ile kapatın.
18.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
19.  Üzerindeki alüminyum folyoyu kaldırıp 10 dakika daha pişirin.
20.  Fırından çıkarıp 5 dakika dinlendirin.
21.  Dilimleyerek servis yapın.

turkey-zucchini-meatballs-with-roasted-p.name: Turkey Zucchini Meatballs With Roasted Pepper Dipping Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine turkey, zucchini, egg, bread crumbs, olives, feta cheese, and Greek seasoning in a large bowl. Mix until evenly combined.
Form meatballs using an ice cream scoop and place onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center, about 25 minutes.

While the meatballs are baking, place Greek yogurt, red pepper strips, lemon juice, olive oil, and garlic in a food processor. Pulse until well blended. Season with salt and pepper. Serve dipping sauce alongside meatballs.

turkey-avocado-and-quinoa-salad-a-fresh-.name: Turkey, Avocado And Quinoa Salad: A Fresh And Healthy Recipe
turkey-avocado-and-quinoa-salad-a-fresh-.original_name: Ensalada de pavo, aguacate y quinoa: una receta fresca y saludable

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pechuga de pavo cocida y desmenuzada ((asada, a la plancha o al horno))
1/2 taza de quinoa blanca cruda (equivale a 1 ½ taza cocida)
1  aguacate grande maduro, cortado en cubos
1/2 taza de tomate cherry cortado en mitades
1/4 taza de cebolla morada finamente picada
1 taza de espinaca baby o rúcula
1 cda de aceite de oliva extra virgen
1 cdita de miel de abejas o sirope de agave
Sal marina y pimienta negra al gusto
Unas hojas de cilantro fresco o albahaca (opcional)

instructions: Enjuaga la quinoa con agua fría usando un colador fino para eliminar su sabor amargo natural.

Cocina la quinoa en una olla con el doble de agua (1 taza de agua por ½ taza de quinoa), agrega una pizca de sal y cocina a fuego medio durante 15 minutos o hasta que el grano esté abierto y el agua se haya absorbido. Retira del fuego, esponja con un tenedor y deja enfriar.
Mientras se enfría la quinoa, prepara el resto de los ingredientes: corta el aguacate en cubos, parte los tomates cherry, pica la cebolla y desmenuza el pavo.
En un bowl grande, mezcla la quinoa cocida, el pavo, la espinaca, los tomates, la cebolla morada y el aguacate.
En un recipiente pequeño, mezcla el aceite de oliva, el jugo de limón, la miel, sal y pimienta. Bate bien hasta emulsionar.
Vierte la vinagreta sobre la ensalada y mezcla con suavidad para no romper el aguacate.
Sirve frío o a temperatura ambiente, decorando con semillas de calabaza y cilantro fresco.

turkey-spinach-meatballs.name: Turkey-spinach Meatballs

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: thawed, squeezed in paper towels to remove excess moisture

instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Cook onion, stirring often, until soft but not brown, about 5 minutes. Add garlic, oregano, and red pepper flakes; season with salt and pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add tomato paste and 1 Tbsp. water and cook, stirring, until tomato paste coats onion and begins to darken, about 3 minutes.
Add tomatoes to saucepan, crushing with your hands as you add them. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and gently simmer until slightly thickened, 20–25 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Preheat broiler. Cover a rimmed baking sheet with foil and coat with nonstick spray.

Using your hands or a fork, gently mix egg, onion, garlic, turkey, spinach, Parmesan, breadcrumbs, parsley, fennel seeds, lemon zest, and salt in a large bowl just until combined. Scoop out turkey mixture by the ¼-cupful and form into balls (you should have about 20). Place on prepared baking sheet, spacing 2” apart; brush with oil.

Broil meatballs, turning often, until browned all over and cooked through, 15–18 minutes. Add to marinara sauce.
Do Ahead: Meatballs with marinara sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Let cool completely and freeze individual portions in resealable plastic bags. Run under tepid water to loosen from bag and gently reheat, covered, until meatballs are warmed through and sauce is bubbling, 15–20 minutes.

turkey-spinach-sliders.name: Turkey-spinach Sliders

ingredients.prep: thick stems removed, leaves chopped (about 4 cups)

ingredients.item: Slider buns or small dinner rolls

ingredients.prep: sliced red onion, and pickle slices (for serving)

instructions: Combine spinach, scallions, garlic, turkey, and cumin in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Using a fork, mix gently just to combine. Form turkey mixture into twelve 1/2-inch-thick patties.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Working in 2 batches, cook patties until golden brown and cooked through (resist the temptation to press down on patties with your spatula while cooking), about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate.
Serve turkey-spinach patties on buns with mayonnaise, onion, and pickles.
DO AHEAD: Patties can be formed 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before cooking.

turkish-chicken-kebabs.name: Turkish Chicken Kebabs
instructions: Whisk yogurt, garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, ketchup, red pepper flakes, salt, cumin, black pepper, paprika, and cinnamon together in a large bowl.
Place chicken thigh halves into the yogurt marinade and coat them thoroughly on all sides. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate, 2 to 8 hours.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Using 2 skewers for each kebab, thread half of the chicken thighs onto each pair of skewers making a fairly thick 'log' shape.

Place kebabs on the preheated grill. Do not try to turn them until they begin to unstick from the grill, 3 or 4 minutes. Turn kebabs and grill the other side for 3 to 4 minutes. Continue cooking and turning until chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 6 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).

turkish-coffee-lezzet.name: Turkish Coffee
instructions: 1. Öncelikle Türk kahvesi hazırlarken, nasıl yapılacağı seçilmelidir.
2. Sade türk kahvesi için; bir tatlı kaşığı kahve, bir fincan su kullanılır.
3. Az şekerli türk kahvesi için; bir tatlı kaşığı kahve, yarım çay kaşığı toz şeker ve bir fincan su kullanılır.
4. Orta türk kahvesi için; bir tatlı kaşığı kahve, bir çay kaşığı toz şeker (bir küp kesme şeker) ve bir fincan su kullanılır.
5. Şekerli türk kahvesi için; bir tatlı kaşığı kahve, 2 çay kaşığı toz şeker ve bir fincan su kullanılır.
6. Tüm malzemeleri cezvenin içerisine ekleyin ve karıştırın.
7.  Ocağın altını orta ateşe ayarlayın.
8. Yavaşça pişen kahve köpüklenmeye başladığında, fincanın içerisine köpüklerini dökün ve tekrar ocağa koyun.
9. İlk taşımı aldıktan sonra kahve ağır ağır pişmeye devam ediyor.
10.  Ardından ikinci taşımda cezveyi ocaktan alın ve fincana dökün.
11.  Kahveniz hazır.
12. Hazırladığınız Türk kahvesini, sultan lokumu ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

turkish-coffee-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Turkish Coffee Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı karbonat veya 2 çay kaşığı kabartma tozu
1 yemek kaşığı türk kahvesi (toz halinde, pişirilmemiş)
Beyaz un yerine tam buğday unu veya yulaf unu kullanabilirsiniz; böylece kek daha besleyici olur.
Glutensiz bir seçenek için glutensiz un karışımı tercih edilebilir.
Karbonat yerine kabartma tozu kullanabilirsiniz veya ikisini karışık kullanarak daha kabarık bir kek elde edebilirsiniz.
Toz şeker yerine esmer şeker, hindistan cevizi şekeri veya bal kullanılabilir; tat ve aroma değişir.
Sıvı yağ yerine tereyağı veya hindistancevizi yağı kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir kek için yoğurt ve az yağ kombinasyonu yeterli olabilir.
Türk kahvesi yerine hazır granül kahve veya espresso tozu kullanılabilir.
Kakao yerine bitter çikolata rendesi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
Su yerine süt veya badem sütü kullanabilirsiniz; kek daha yumuşak olur.
Vanilin yerine vanilya özütü veya portakal kabuğu rendesi kullanabilirsiniz; aroma değişir.

instructions: 1. Fırını 180°C’ye ısıtın.
2.  Kek kalıbınızı yağlayın veya yağlı kağıt serin.
3. Un, karbonat (veya kabartma tozu), kakao, Türk kahvesi, tarçın, tuz ve vanilini bir kapta karıştırın.
4. Yumurtaları ve şekeri mikserle köpürene kadar çırpın.
5. Üzerine sıvı yağ, eritilmiş tereyağı, yoğurt ve suyu ekleyip karıştırın.
6. Kuru karışımı sıvı karışıma ekleyin ve pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edene kadar spatula ile karıştırın.
7. Hamuru kek kalıbına dökün.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin.
9.  Kürdan testi ile kontrol edin; kürdan temiz çıkarsa kekiniz hazırdır.
10. Kek soğuduktan sonra dilimleyip servis edin.
11.  İsteğe göre üzerine pudra şekeri veya çikolata sosu ekleyebilirsiniz.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

turkish-coffee-pomegranate-parfait-lezze.name: Turkish Coffee Pomegranate Parfait

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı gün kurusu kayısı (şerit doğranmış)

instructions: 1. Tam yağlı yoğurdu bir kasede çırpın ve servis kuplarına birer yemek kaşığı paylaştırın.
2.  Meyveleri de başka bir kasede bir araya getirip kaşık yardımıyla yoğurdun üzerine bir miktar ilave edin.
3.  Bir kat yoğurt, bir kat meyve olacak şekilde kupları doldurun.
4.  Üzerini keçiboynuzu pekmezi ve Türk kahvesi ile süsleyip servis yapın.

turkish-coffee-truffle-recipe-lezzet.name: Turkish Coffee Truffle Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 yemek kaşığı süt (isteğe bağlı, kıvam ayarı için)
Bitter yerine sütlü çikolata kullanarak daha yumuşak ve tatlı bir truffle elde edebilirsiniz.
Beyaz çikolata ile farklı aromalar yaratmak da mümkün; bu durumda kahve aromasını biraz artırabilirsiniz.
Normal krema yerine %35–40 yağlı sıvı krema veya hindistancevizi kreması kullanabilirsiniz; vegan bir seçenek oluşturur.
Türk kahvesi yerine espresso veya granül kahve de kullanılabilir. aromayı daha yoğun seviyorsanız kahve miktarını hafifçe artırabilirsiniz.
Süt yerine badem sütü, soya sütü veya fındık sütü ekleyerek farklı aromalar yakalayabilirsiniz.
Kakao, kahve ve çikolata dışında; toz fındık, toz antep fıstığı, hindistancevizi veya tarçın serpiştirerek hem görsellik hem tat çeşitliliği katabilirsiniz.
Truffle karışımına az miktarda vanilya, portakal kabuğu rendesi ekleyerek aromayı zenginleştirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Küçük bir sos tenceresinde kremayı ısıtın ama kaynatmayın.
2.  İçine Türk kahvesini ekleyip 1 dakika kadar kısık ateşte karıştırın, kahve aromasının kremaya geçmesini sağlayın.
3. Doğranmış bitter çikolatayı cam veya metal bir kaba alın.
4.  Üzerine sıcak kahveli kremayı dökün.
5.  1 dakika bekledikten sonra pürüzsüz bir karışım elde edene kadar karıştırın.
6. Karışıma tereyağını ekleyin ve tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırın.
7.  Kıvam çok yoğun olursa 1 yemek kaşığı süt ekleyerek açabilirsiniz.
8. Karışımı oda sıcaklığında 10 dakika bekletin, ardından buzdolabında 1–2 saat kadar katılaşana kadar dinlendirin.
9. Katılaşan çikolatadan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, avuç içinde yuvarlayın.
10.  İstediğiniz kaplama malzemelerine bulayın: kakao, Türk kahvesi veya rendelenmiş çikolata.
11. Truffle’ları buzdolabında kısa süre saklayın ve servis ederken oda sıcaklığında 5–10 dakika bekletin ve servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

turkish-compound-butter.name: Turkish Compound Butter

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper or 1  0.5 tsp. hot smoked spanish paprika

instructions: Process all ingredients in a food processor until smooth.
DO AHEAD: Butter can be made 5 days ahead. Wrap tightly and chill, or freeze up to 1 month.

turkish-delight-lezzet.name: Turkish Delight
instructions: 1. Geniş bir tencerenin içerisine toz şeker, su ve limon tuzunu ilave edip karıştırıp kaynamaya bırakın.
2. Derin bir karıştırma kabının içerisine nişasta ve limon suyunu ilave edip nişasta eriyene kadar karıştıralım.
3. kaynama noktasına gelen şerbetin üzerine nişastalı karışımı ilave edip çırpma teli yardımıyla sürekli karıştırın.
4. Kaynamaya başlayıp kıvam alan lokum harcını kısık ateşte karıştırmaya devam edin.
5. Kaynadıkça kıvamı koyulaşmaya başlayan lokum harcını 45 dakika kadar hiç durmadan karıştırarak pişirmeye devam edin.
6. Tamamen kıvam alan ve rengi sarı bir hal alan lokumu kare bir borcama almadan önce borcamı biraz ıslatın ve lokumu içerisine dökün.
7. Oda sıcaklığına gelen lokumun üzerini streçleyip buzdolabında 1 gece kadar bekletin.
8. 1 gece kadar beklettiğiniz lokumu dilediğiniz boyutlarda kesin.
9. Bir kasede pudra şekeri ve nişastayı karıştırıp lokumun üzerine bir miktar dökün ve borcamdan lokumları çıkarın.
10. Lokumları kalan pudra şekerli karışıma bulayın.
11. Lokumlarınız servise hazır.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

turkish-delights-argiro.name: Turkish Delights
instructions: Σε ένα ταψί 24×24 τετράγωνο, στρώνουμε στη βάση αντικολλητικό χαρτί κομμένο ακριβώς στις διαστάσεις της βάσης. Θα σας βολέψει καλύτερα αν έχετε τσέρκι τετράγωνο για τούρτα και μία βάση. Διαφορετικά βάλτε όποιο μικρό σκεύος έχετε.
Με κόσκινο κοσκινίζουμε τη βάση του ταψιού με μπόλικο νισεστέ μέχρι να κάνει στρώμα.
Αφήνουμε στην άκρη το τελάρο για τα λουκούμια.
Σε μία κατσαρόλα βαθιά με χοντρή βάση, βάζουμε το νερό να ζεσταθεί, προσθέτουμε το ξυνό κι ανακατεύουμε να διαλυθεί.
Προσθέτουμε τη ζάχαρη και ανακατεύουμε να λιώσει.
Ρίχνουμε τη γλυκόζη, ανακατεύουμε και βράζουμε το λουκούμι μέχρι να φτάσει στους 107 °C.
Διαλύουμε καλά το κορν φλάουρ σε λίγο νερό και το προσθέτουμε ανακατεύοντας συνεχώς με σύρμα ή ξύλινη κουτάλα. Θέλει γύρω στα 8-10΄ για να αρχίσει να βράζει και σιγά σιγά να πήζει και να σφίγγει.
Βράζουμε σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά (στο 6- 7) με διαρκές ανακάτεμα ώστε να μην κολλήσει, μέχρι να φτάσει στους 123-124 °C. Θέλει περίπου 50΄ με 1 ώρα βράσιμο.
Τα λουκούμια είναι έτοιμα όταν μεγάλες φουσκάλες εμφανιστούν στο λουκούμι και το μείγμα γίνει παχύ και βαρύ με χοντρές φουσκάλες.
Σβήνουμε τη φωτιά κι ανακατεύοντας ρίχνουμε το άρωμα και το χρώμα που επιθυμούμε.

Αν θέλουμε λουκούμι με γεύση μαστίχα, θα πρέπει στο τέλος του βρασμού να ρίξουμε κοπανισμένη μαστίχα σε σκόνη και να ανακατέψουμε να λιώσει. Όμως μπορείτε να βάλετε όποια εσάνς θέλετε και ό,τι χρώμα θέλετε.
Ρίχνουμε κορν φλάουρ ή νισεστέ στο ταψί και αδειάζουμε το καυτό λουκούμι.
Πασπαλίζουμε την επιφάνεια του λουκουμιού με μια λεπτή στρώση ζάχαρη άχνη.
Ακουμπάμε το καυτό τσέρκι με το λουκούμι πάνω σε μια σχάρα ώστε να αρχίσει να κρυώνει.
Ισιώνουμε την επιφάνεια κουνώντας απαλά το ταψί με προσοχή γιατί καίει.
Αφήνουμε να σταθεί το λουκούμι και να σταθεροποιηθεί το λιγότερο για 12 ώρες.
Αναποδογυρίζουμε τα λουκούμια πάνω σε ξύλο κοπής που έχουμε πασπαλίσει ζάχαρη άχνη με λίγο νισεστέ.
Με ένα πινέλο σκουπίζουμε το νισεστέ που είχε στη βάση του ταψιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε και επάνω στο λουκούμι ζάχαρη άχνη.

Βουτώντας το μαχαίρι σε νισεστέ ή άχνη, κόβουμε σε κομμάτια της αρεσκείας μας. Κομμάτια γύρω στα 2,5 με 3 εκατοστά για κάθε λουκούμι είναι ιδανικό μέγεθος εκτός αν θέλετε να κάνετε μικρές ακανόνιστες μπουκιές λουκούμια. Γι’ αυτό, το πάχος του ταψιού πρέπει να είναι ανάλογο.
Κοσκινίζουμε την άχνη με τον νισεστέ.
Αφού κόψουμε τα λουκούμια, βάζουμε όλα τα κομμάτια στο ταψί και πασπαλίζουμε με νισεστέ και άχνη ζάχαρη.
Ανακατεύουμε με τα χέρια. Τα λαχταριστά λουκούμια είναι έτοιμα.

turkish-delights-with-nuts-lezzet.name: Turkish Delights With Nuts
instructions: 1. Milföy hamurlarını 10 dakika oda ısısında bekletin ve yuvarlak kurabiye kalıbı ile kesin.
2.  Minik silikon kek kalıplarına yerleştirin.
3.  Hamurların içlerine yarım çay kaşığı kadar fıstık ezmesi doldurun.
4.  Üzerine fıstık ve fındık yerleştirin.
5.  200 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
6.  Fırından çıkardıktan sonra kuruyemişlerin üzerine bal gezdirin ve servis yapın.

turkish-doner-kebab.name: Turkish Doner Kebab
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Combine flour, oregano, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, Italian seasoning, black pepper, and cayenne pepper in a large bowl. Add ground lamb and knead until thoroughly mixed together, about 3 minutes.
Shape seasoned lamb mixture and place into a loaf pan; set on top of a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven, turning halfway to ensure even browning, for about 1 hour and 20 minutes.
Wrap loaf in aluminum foil and let rest for about 10 minutes. Slice as thinly as possible to make doner kebab pieces.

turkish-eggs-cilbir.name: Turkish Eggs (cilbir)
instructions: To make the yogurt spread: Place yogurt in a medium bowl and grate in garlic; mix to combine. Season with pepper, salt, and cayenne. Add dill and mix thoroughly. Set aside at room temperature.

To make Aleppo butter: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat; heat until bubbles begin to burst. Add chile flakes, paprika, and cumin. Stir until color is uniform. Turn off heat and let spices infuse.
To make the parsley and jalapeño oil: Grind parsley and jalapeño together in a mortar. Drizzle in olive oil and season with salt; stir to combine.

To make poached eggs: Fill a large saucepan with 2 to 3 inches of water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, add vinegar, and keep water at a gentle simmer. Crack an egg into a small bowl, then gently slip egg into water, holding the bowl just above surface of water. Repeat with remaining eggs. Cook until whites are firm and yolks have thickened but are not hard, 2 ½ to 3 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon, pat dry on a kitchen towel, and place onto a warm plate.

Dollop yogurt mixture onto serving plates. Use the back of a spoon to spread yogurt, carving ridges into the top to catch oil. Drizzle some jalapeño oil. Top with eggs and 1 to 2 spoonfuls of Aleppo butter. Sprinkle sea salt on top.

turkish-eggs-with-yogurt-cilbir-pequerec.name: Turkish Eggs With Yogurt (çilbir)

ingredients.item: 1 cucharadita de pimentón dulce o picante

instructions: En un bol, mezcla el yogur con los dientes de ajo picados y una pizca de sal. Deja reposar a temperatura ambiente.

Llena una cacerola con agua y añade el vinagre. Lleva a ebullición y luego reduce a fuego lento. Rompe los huevos uno a uno en un tazón pequeño y deslízalos cuidadosamente en el agua. Cocina durante 3-4 minutos para obtener huevos escalfados con yemas líquidas. Retira con una espumadera y colócalos sobre papel absorbente.
En una sartén pequeña, derrite la mantequilla a fuego medio. Añade el pimentón y cocina hasta que la mantequilla tome un color rojo intenso y tenga un aroma fragante, aproximadamente 1-2 minutos.

Divide el yogur con ajo entre los platos de servir. Coloca dos huevos escalfados encima de cada porción de yogur. Rocía con la mantequilla de pimentón caliente y decora con brotes frescos si lo deseas

turkish-lamb-kebabs.name: Turkish Lamb Kebabs

ingredients.item: Sea salt and finely ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: trimmed of most of the fat and cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) chunks

instructions: Mix together the garlic, olive oil, tomato paste, spices, thyme, and salt and pepper to taste.
Add the meat to the marinade and toss. Let marinate for at least 2 hours.
Prepare a charcoal fire in an outdoor grill, switch on the gas if you have an outdoor gas grill, or preheat the broiler to high.

Thread the meat onto 7 long skewers and the tomatoes onto an eighth one. Grill over high heat or broil 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until the meat and tomatoes are done to your liking. Slip the meat and tomatoes off the skewers onto flatbread and serve immediately.

turkish-orange-salad-with-mediterranean-.name: Turkish Orange Salad With Mediterranean Dressing
instructions: Slice a little piece off the top and bottom of each orange so you have a stable cutting surface. Trim away all skin and pith with a small sharp knife without taking too much off the fruit. Slice oranges horizontally and arrange on a serving platter.
Combine onion, olive oil, lemon juice, and salt in a bowl and pour over the oranges. Grind fresh pepper over the salad and arrange black olives on top.

turkish-pasta-with-yogurt-sauce-the-vira.name: Turkish Pasta With Yogurt Sauce, The Viral Recipe That Is Sweeping Tiktok
turkish-pasta-with-yogurt-sauce-the-vira.original_name: Pasta turca con salsa de yogur, la receta viral que arrasa en TikTok

ingredients.item: 450 g de carne picada de ternera
1 cucharada de concentrado de pimiento o de tomate (15 g)
400 g pasta corta (p.ej. conchas, fussili, farfalle, medio rigattoni, etc.)
1 g de menta seca o 3 g de menta fresca
15 g de concentrado de pimientos o de tomate
Una pizca de pimienta cayena o pul biber

instructions: En un bol, mezclar 250 g de yogur griego con los dientes de ajo picados y sal y pimienta al gusto. Remover bien hasta obtener una consistencia cremosa y homogénea. Reservar.

En un cazo pequeño, derretir 50 g de mantequilla a fuego bajo. Añadir el concentrado de pimiento o tomate, la menta seca, el pimentón dulce y, si se desea, una pizca de pimienta de cayena. Remover durante 1–2 minutos hasta que todos los ingredientes estén bien integrados. Reservar.

En una sartén grande, dorar 450 g de carne picada de ternera a fuego medio durante 2–3 minutos, hasta que esté casi cocida. La carne soltará algo de grasa, por lo que no es necesario añadir aceite. Agregar 2 cebollas picadas, la sal y la pimienta al gusto, el curry, el comino, el pimentón dulce y el concentrado de pimiento o tomate.
Mezclar bien y cocinar unos 3 minutos más, hasta que las cebollas estén tiernas y transparentes. Retirar del fuego.
Hervir agua en una olla grande, añadir sal generosamente y cocinar la pasta según las instrucciones del paquete hasta que esté al dente. Escurrir bien.

Colocar una porción de pasta en un plato hondo o cuenco. Añadir una parte de la salsa de yogur con ajo, repartir la carne picada por encima, rociar con un poco de la mantequilla con pimentón y decorar con perejil o cilantro y los tomates cherry. Servir inmediatamente.

turkish-red-lentil-soup-with-mint.name: Turkish Red Lentil Soup With Mint

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until beginning to soften, about 2 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Add diced tomatoes and cook for 10 minutes.

Stir in chicken stock, lentils, bulgur, rice, tomato paste, mint, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until lentils and rice are tender, about 30 minutes.
Puree soup with an immersion blender until smooth.

turkish-spiced-chicken-kebabs-with-pomeg.name: Turkish-spiced Chicken Kebabs With Pomegranate Relish And Tahini Yogurt

ingredients.prep: each halved lengthwise, then cut crosswise into 3 pieces

instructions: Combine lemon juice, Baharat Seasoning , and garlic in medium bowl; stir to blend. Let stand 5 minutes. Whisk in yogurt and tahini. Season tahini yogurt to taste with salt. DO AHEAD Can be made up to 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Mix all ingredients in medium bowl. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Whisk first 4 ingredients in large bowl. Add chicken. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Marinate at room temperature at least 1 hour and up to 2 hours.

Preheat broiler. Thread 6 chicken pieces onto each skewer. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Place on small rimmed baking sheet. Broil chicken until cooked through, 5 to 6 minutes per side. Arrange kebabs on platter. Serve with tahini yogurt, pomegranate relish, and warm pita breads.

turkish-style-eggs-and-tomatoes.name: Turkish-style Eggs And Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: heirloom, and/or on the vine), halved, cut into wedges if large

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place 1½ lb. tomatoes (such as cherry, heirloom, and/or on the vine), halved, cut into wedges if large, in a large fine-mesh sieve set over a large bowl; sprinkle ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt over and toss to combine. Let sit at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Meanwhile, mix 3 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1½ cups plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 1 tsp. extra-virgin olive oil, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl. Spread yogurt mixture over a platter.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil and 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium-high until butter is melted and mixture is sizzling, about 1 minute. Remove pan from heat; add 1½ tsp. smoked paprika, ½ tsp. Aleppo-style pepper, and remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and swirl to combine. Set spiced oil mixture aside.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Crack 4 large eggs into pan (it’s okay if they touch). Cover (use a baking sheet if needed) and cook until whites are set but yolks are still runny, 2–3 minutes. Transfer eggs to platter, arranging over yogurt.

Spoon reserved tomatoes over eggs and yogurt. Pour any tomato liquid in bowl into reserved spiced oil mixture and stir to combine; drizzle over eggs and tomatoes. Top with dill sprigs and mint leaves; sprinkle with flaky sea salt and more Aleppo-style pepper.

turkish-style-poached-eggs-with-brown-bu.name: Turkish-style Poached Eggs With Brown Butter Garlic Chips

ingredients.prep: such as parsley or dill; for serving

instructions: Season 1 cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt well with kosher salt and stir to combine. Set aside for serving.

Heat 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a medium skillet over medium. Arrange 2½ cups bite-size pieces country-style bread (from about ¼ loaf) in an even layer in skillet and cook, undisturbed, until golden and crisp, 3–4 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until crisp on all sides, about 2 minutes more. Transfer to a plate.
Fill a medium saucepan three-quarters full with water and bring to a bare simmer.

Meanwhile, crack 1 of 4 large eggs, room temperature, into a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl, letting more liquid part of egg white drain off (this step eliminates the strands of egg white that can form when the egg hits the hot water). Transfer egg to another small bowl. Repeat with a second egg.

Gently slide each egg into water in saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally and swirling eggs around in pan, until whites are opaque and set but yolks are still runny, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to another plate. Repeat process with remaining 2 eggs.

Rinse and wipe out saucepan. Combine 5 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and remaining 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in pan and cook over medium heat, swirling pan occasionally, until butter melts, foams, and is just starting to brown and garlic is golden, about 5 minutes. Add 1 tsp. Aleppo-style pepper, ½ tsp. smoked paprika, and a big pinch of salt. Cook, swirling pan often, until spices are fragrant and garlic is golden brown and crisp, about 1 minute. Remove garlicky spiced butter from heat.

Divide reserved yogurt between 2 plates and spread into an even layer. Top with bread and poached eggs, dividing evenly. Drizzle garlicky spiced butter over and scatter chopped tender herbs (such as parsley or dill) on top.

turmeric-accordion-potatoes-lezzet.name: Turmeric Accordion Potatoes
instructions: 1. Patatesleri iyice yıkayıp kabuğunu soymadan nemli bir bezle temizleyin.
2.  Keskin bir bıçak yardımıyla dibini kesmeyecek şekilde çok ince dilimleyin.
3.  Sarımsakları çok ince kesip bir kaseye alın.
4.  Çok ince doğranmış kapya biberi, zerdeçalı ve sıvı yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Hazırladığınız bu karışımı patates dilimlerinin aralarına yerleştirin.
6. Üzerine kalan sıvı yağı dökün.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında, yarım saat pişirin.
8.  Fırından almadan 5 dakika önce üzerine tereyağı parçaları serpip tekrar fırına verin.
9.  5 dakika sonra fırından alın, ince kıyılmış dereotu serpin ve bekletmeden servis yapın.

turmeric-and-coconut-braised-cabbage-wit.name: Turmeric And Coconut-braised Cabbage With Chickpeas

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: cilantro leaves, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: To start, prep your ingredients: Slice ½ medium head of green cabbage (about 2 lb.) through core to make 4 wedges. Peel and finely chop 2 medium shallots (about 4 oz.). Peel one 1" piece ginger with a spoon and finely chop. Using the side of your knife, crush 2 garlic cloves, remove and discard papery skins, and finely chop. Halve 1 serrano or other green chile lengthwise and, if you don’t want it too hot, scrape out seeds and white membrane with the back of the knife; discard. If you prefer some heat, leave as is. Finely chop chile. Set shallots, ginger, garlic, and chile aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large high-sided skillet with lid or wide Dutch oven over medium-high. Add cabbage, cut side down, and season with kosher salt. Cook, undisturbed, until lightly charred underneath, about 5 minutes. Turn over and cook, undisturbed, until charred, about 5 minutes. Transfer cabbage to a plate.
Shake one 13.5-oz. can unsweetened coconut milk to ensure it’s well mixed; open can. Open one 15.5-oz. can chickpeas and rinse in a colander under running water.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same skillet over medium-high. Add reserved shallots, ginger, garlic, and chile, and cook, stirring with a wooden spoon, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1 tsp. brown mustard seeds, 1 tsp. ground cumin, and 1 tsp. turmeric powder and cook, stirring, until mustard seeds are popping, about 1 minute.
Add coconut milk, chickpeas, ½ cup vegetable stock or water, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Stir to combine.

Place cabbage wedges back into pan and, using a large spoon, baste cabbage with coconut milk; bring mixture to a boil. Cover, reduce heat to low, and cook until cabbage is tender, 15–20 minutes. Taste and season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Scoop some steamed white rice into each bowl and divide cabbage and chickpeas over; top with cilantro leaves. Serve with lime wedges, for squeezing over.

turmeric-and-ginger-smoothie-recipe-come.name: Turmeric And Ginger Smoothie Recipe
turmeric-and-ginger-smoothie-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de smoothie de cúrcuma y jengibre

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de cúrcuma  (fresca rallada o en polvo)
1 cdita de jengibre (fresco rallado o en polvo)

instructions: Pela el plátano y corta en rodajas.
Incorpora en la licuadora el plátano cortado, la cúrcuma y el jengibre.
Vierte el zumo de naranja, la miel y la pizca de pimienta. Licúa muy bien hasta obtener una bebida homogénea.
Agrega los cubos de hielo y procesa hasta darle la textura de smoothie.
Sirve y acompaña con rodajas de naranja. ¡Disfruta!

turmeric-artichoke-lezzet.name: Turmeric Artichoke
instructions: 1. İç baklaları bir gün öncesinden suda bekletip kaynar suda 5 dakika haşlayın.
2.  Geniş bir tencerenin dibine kıyılmış soğanları yayın.
3.  Üzerine sırasıyla önce baklaları, çok ince dilimlenmiş (sebze soyacağı ile soyabilirsiniz) sonra da doğranmış enginarları serpin.
4.  Enginarların üzerine limon suyunu ekleyin.
5.  Zeytinyağı, tuz, şeker ve zerdeçalı küçük bir kapta karıştırdıktan sonra bu karışımı tencereye ilave edin.
6.  Sıcak suyu da ekleyin.
7.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
8.  Kısık ateşte enginarlar yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
9.  Sıcak servis yapın.

turmeric-black-pepper-tempeh.name: Turmeric Black Pepper Tempeh
instructions: Coarsely chop 2 shallots. Heat 2 tablespoons neutral or coconut oil and the shallots in a medium saucepan over medium-high. Cook until the shallots start to brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Add 1 cup long-grain white rice and stir to combine. Add 1¾ cups water and 1 teaspoon salt and bring to a boil. Cover, reduce the heat to low, and cook for 17 minutes. Remove from the heat and keep covered.

Cut 1 (8-ounce) block tempeh crosswise into four pieces, then into squares. Cut each square through the middle so they are half as thick. Cut each square into triangles (you’ll have 32 but who’s counting). In a measuring cup, stir together ¼ cup unseasoned rice vinegar, 3 tablespoons maple syrup, 2 teaspoons ground turmeric, and 2 teaspoons black pepper. Season with salt. Pluck the leaves and tender stems of 1 to 2 cups soft herbs (dill, cilantro, basil)—whatever needs using up. Transfer the herbs to a medium bowl.

Heat 2 tablespoons neutral or coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add the tempeh, season with salt, and cook, without touching, until golden underneath, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip the pieces and repeat on the other side, adding more oil if needed. Reduce the heat to medium-low, pour in the turmeric mixture, and stir until the mixture is glazy, 1 to 2 minutes.

Season the herbs with salt and pepper, then toss with enough juice from 1 lime to lightly coat. Fluff the rice with a fork. Eat the tempeh on top of the rice with a jungle of herbs and another squeeze from the lime (I like to put the herbs under the tempeh so they wilt just slightly).

turmeric-bread-lezzet.name: Turmeric Bread
instructions: 1. Un, tuz, maya, zerdeçal ve mahlebi geniş bir kapta harmanlayın.
2.  Yumurta, yoğurt ve zeytinyağını ekleyip karı��tırın.
3.  Yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edecek şekilde azar azar su ilave edip yoğurun.
4.  Hamur kıvam aldığında üzerini nemli bir bezle örtüp bir saat dinlendirin.
5.  Mayalanan hamuru tekrar yoğurun.
6.  Şekillendirip yağlı kağıt serili bir fırın tepisine alın.
7.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle örterek 40 dakika daha dinlendirin.
8.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
9.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.

turmeric-breakfast-cake-lezzet.name: Turmeric Breakfast Cake
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları büyük bir çırpma kabına kırıp köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
2.  Süzme yoğurdu ve zeytinyağını ilave edin.
3.  Birkaç dakika daha çırpma teliyle çırpın.
4.  Ayrı bir kapta unları, baharatı ve kabartma tozunu harmanlayın.
5.  Yumurtalı karışıma ilave edin.
6.  Kıyılmış yeşillikleri de ekleyin.
7.  Tüm malzemeyi karıştırın.
8.  Yağlanmış kek kalıbına dökün.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 dereceye ayarlı fırında 35-40 dakika, pişirin.
10.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

turmeric-caramel-cod.name: Turmeric Caramel Cod

ingredients.item: -oz. cod or other flaky whitefish fillets

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced white onion, mint leaves, and cilantro leaves with tender stems (for serving)

instructions: Slice 3 limes in half and squeeze through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl (you should have about 5 Tbsp. juice); discard seeds. Cut remaining lime into wedges and set aside for serving.

Whisk lime juice, brown sugar, soy sauce, turmeric, cayenne, and a pinch of salt in a small saucepan to combine. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cook, swirling pan occasionally to keep mixture from bubbling up, until thickened, about 8 minutes. Let caramel cool slightly (it will continue to thicken as it cools).

Meanwhile, pat fish dry, then season with salt. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook fish until flesh is opaque, cooked through, and flakes easily with a fork, about 3 minutes per side.
Divide rice among plates and top each with a fillet. Spoon warm caramel over. Top with white onion, mint, and cilantro. Serve with reserved lime wedges for squeezing over.

turmeric-cashew-chicken.name: Turmeric Cashew Chicken

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, excess fat trimmed, cut into 2" pieces

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: cilantro sprigs, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Place ⅔ cup raw cashews in a small bowl and pour in hot water to cover. Let sit until softened (you should be able to crush a nut easily between 2 fingers), 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, finely grate 2 garlic cloves and half of one 2" piece ginger, peeled, into a medium bowl. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs, excess fat trimmed, cut into 2" pieces, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and toss to combine. Let chicken sit while you make the sauce.

Drain cashews and transfer to a blender. Coarsely chop remaining 1" piece ginger, peeled. Add ginger, 1 small jalapeño, halved, 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 1 tsp. cumin seeds, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, remaining 3 garlic cloves, remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1½ cups water to blender and blend until smooth. Set cashew sauce aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken, tossing occasionally, until cooked through, about 3 minutes. Add reserved cashew sauce and cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is slightly thickened, about 3 minutes.
Divide steamed rice among shallow bowls and spoon cashew chicken over; top with cilantro sprigs. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

turmeric-coconut-milk-lezzet.name: Turmeric Coconut Milk

ingredients.item: 1-2 su bardağı hindistan cevizi sütü (veya 2 yemek kaşığı hindistan cevizi tozu ve 1-2 su bardağı su)
1 cm’lik küp bir taze zerdeçal parçası

instructions: 1. Metabolizmanın çalışmasını hızlandıran Hindistan cevizi ve yeni nöronların oluşmasında rol oynayan zerdeçalın buluşması… Zerdeçallıkarışımlara karabiber katmayı unutmayın çünkü vücut tarafından yararlı minerallerinin emilimini kolaylaştırır.

turmeric-coffee-latte.name: Turmeric Coffee Latte
instructions: Combine coconut milk, vanilla extract, stevia sweetener, turmeric, ginger, and cinnamon in a saucepan. Heat over medium heat until warm, about 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat. Blend until frothy using an immersion blender.
Pour espresso into a serving mug. Top off with frothed milk mixture.

turmeric-eggs-with-kale-yogurt-and-bacon.name: Turmeric Eggs With Kale, Yogurt, And Bacon

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into large pieces

ingredients.item: Urfa pepper or other mild red pepper flakes and lime wedges

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 191°C. Bake bacon on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet until brown and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Tear into large pieces; reserve fat for another use.

Meanwhile, spread out kale on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil. Massage leaves with oil and season with salt. Bake, tossing halfway through, until lightly browned around edges and crisp-tender, 5–7 minutes.
Season yogurt with salt. Divide among plates and top with bacon and kale.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add eggs one at a time, shaking skillet between additions to keep them from sticking together. Cook, tilting skillet toward you and spooning oil over egg whites until whites are set, about 2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat, keeping skillet tilted, and add turmeric to oil. Baste egg whites with turmeric oil.
Divide eggs among plates and drizzle turmeric oil over. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and squeeze limes over.

turmeric-fish-with-rice-noodles-and-herb.name: Turmeric Fish With Rice Noodles And Herbs

ingredients.prep: white parts very thinly sliced lengthwise, green parts cut into 2-inch pieces

instructions: Mix chile, fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, half of garlic, and ¼ cup cold water in a small bowl until sugar dissolves; set nuoc cham aside.
Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix ginger, turmeric, 2 Tbsp. oil, and remaining garlic in a medium bowl. Add fish and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high until shimmering. Add fish mixture and cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown and just cooked through, 4–5 minutes. Add dill and scallion greens, toss a few times, then continue to cook until greens are barely wilted, about 30 seconds.
Divide noodles, fish mixture, and peanuts among bowls. Top with scallion whites. Serve with nuoc cham alongside.

turmeric-fried-eggs-breakfast-bowl.name: Turmeric Fried Eggs Breakfast Bowl

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into large pieces

ingredients.item: Urfa pepper or other mild red pepper flakes and lime wedges

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 375°. Bake bacon on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet until brown and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Tear into large pieces; reserve fat for another use.

Meanwhile, spread out kale on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil. Massage leaves with oil and season with salt. Bake, tossing halfway through, until lightly browned around edges and crisp-tender, 5–7 minutes.
Season yogurt with salt. Divide among plates and top with bacon and kale.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add eggs one at a time, shaking skillet between additions to keep them from sticking together. Cook, tilting skillet toward you and spooning oil over egg whites until whites are set, about 2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat, keeping skillet tilted, and add turmeric to oil. Baste egg whites with turmeric oil.
Divide eggs among plates and drizzle turmeric oil over. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and squeeze limes over.

turmeric-golden-milk-with-turmeric-paste.name: Turmeric Golden Milk With Turmeric Paste
instructions: To make the turmeric paste: Combine 1/2 cup water, turmeric, and pepper in a small saucepan over low heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened, 7 to 9 minutes. Stir in 1 teaspoon water and continue cooking until thickened into a paste, 7 to 9 minutes. Allow to cool completely, 15 to 20 minutes. Store turmeric paste in an airtight glass jar in the refrigerator.

To make turmeric milk: Whisk almond milk, 1 teaspoon of the homemade turmeric paste, coconut oil, ginger, and cinnamon in a saucepan. Place over low heat until hot, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in honey. Strain milk mixture into 2 mugs.

turmeric-honey-paste.name: Turmeric Honey Paste
instructions: Mix honey, turmeric, coconut oil, and black pepper together in a resealable container using a butter knife until thoroughly combined. Cover and store in the refrigerator.

turmeric-iced-coffee-latte.name: Turmeric Iced Coffee Latte
instructions: Pour coconut milk, vanilla extract, and 1 packet stevia powder into a glass and stir to combine. Fill glass with ice cubes.

Combine water, instant coffee granules, 1 packet stevia powder, turmeric, ginger and cinnamon in a microwave-safe glass; stir to mix. Microwave for 30 seconds. Stir. Continue microwaving at 15-second intervals until hot and foamy. Carefully pour over the iced coconut milk.

turmeric-lentil-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Turmeric Lentil Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 6 su bardağı sıcak su veya et/sebze suyu
Kırmızı mercimek yerine sarı mercimek kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun aromalı bir tat için mercimeğin 2–3 yemek kaşığını yeşil mercimek ile karıştırabilirsiniz (pişirme süresi biraz uzayabilir).
Soğan yerine arpacık soğan kullanarak daha hafif bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
Soğansız yapmak isterseniz 1 diş sarımsak ile aroma verebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine tereyağı kullanarak daha klasik bir lezzet yakalayabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir sonuç için sadece 1 yemek kaşığı yağ yeterli olacaktır.
Vegan versiyon için sadece zeytinyağı tercih edebilirsiniz.
Zerdeçala ek olarak bir tutam toz zencefil ekleyebilirsiniz.
Hafif acılık için acı toz biber kullanılabilir.
Kimyon yerine çok az köri ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.
Su yerine sebze suyu veya tavuk suyu kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha kremamsı bir sonuç için pişirme sonunda 1–2 yemek kaşığı krema ekleyebilirsiniz.
Limon suyu yerine birkaç damla nar ekşisi farklı bir asidite sağlar.
üzerine yoğurt gezdirerek daha yumuşak bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Mercimekleri bol suyla güzelce yıkayın ve süzün.
2. Soğanı küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
3.  Tencereye yağı alın ve soğanı kısık–orta ateşte yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
4. Zerdeçalı ekleyip 20–30 saniye yağla birlikte çevirin; bu aşama aromasını ortaya çıkarır.
5. Yıkanmış mercimekleri ilave edin ve birkaç dakika karıştırarak kavurun.
6. Üzerine sıcak suyu ekleyin.
7.  Tuz ve baharatları ilave edin.
8. Orta ateşte mercimekler tamamen yumuşayana kadar yaklaşık 20–25 dakika pişirin.
9. Çorbayı blenderdan geçirerek pürüzsüz kıvam elde edin.
10. Gerekirse biraz sıcak su ekleyerek kıvamını ayarlayın ve 1–2 dakika daha kaynatıp ocaktan alın ve servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

turmeric-matzo-balls.name: Turmeric Matzo Balls

ingredients.prep: usually 1-1 1/2 bags out of a box

instructions: In a medium bowl whisk the eggs and the oil.
Add the turmeric into the egg mixture. Whisk to incorporate to an even yellow color.
Sprinkle in 1/2 cup (1 bag) of the matzo ball mix. Stir in with a fork, mixing as little as possible. Don't overwork it. Chill in refrigerator for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring a pot of water or chicken stock to a boil.

Wet your hands in a bowl of cold water. Using your hand, and manipulating as little as possible, scoop out a ping-pong-ball size of the mixture, adding more matzo ball mix or matzo meal as needed. Form into a ball with your fingertips, using no real pressure. Bring the water down to a simmer. Drop the balls into the water. Cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes.

turmeric-potato-salad-lezzet.name: Turmeric Potato Salad
instructions: 1. Öncelikle patatesleri soyup az tuzlu suyla haşlayın.
2.  Ardından kabuklarını soyun ve dilimleyin.
3. Patatesleri geniş bir kaba aldıktan sonra, soğan ve maydanozu ince ince doğrayın.
4.  Doğradığınız malzemeleri de patatesin içerisine ekleyin ve özdeşleşene kadar karıştırın.
5. Sosu için; sarımsak, hardal, kekik, karabiber, sirke, zencefil ve zerdeçalı mikserden geçirin.
6. Hazırladığınız sosu, patateslerin üzerinde gezdirin ve bir kez karıştırın.
7. Zerdeçallı patates salatasını, fırında tavuk ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
8.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.
9. Zerdeçallı Patates Salatasının Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Salata yapımında küçük haşlamalık patates kullanmanız daha iyi olacaktır.
10. Haşlama işleminin hızlı olması için, suya mutlaka tuz ekleyin.
11.  Patateslerin pişip pişmediğini çatal ile kontrol edebilirsiniz.
12. Haşlanan patatesleri soğuk suya koyun ve birkaç dakika bekletin.
13.  Böylece kabuklarını daha kolay çıkartabilirsiniz.
14. Hazırladığınız sosu, salatayı servis edeceğiniz zaman dökün.
15.  Aksi takdirde salatanız çok sulu olacaktır.
16. 1 Porsiyon Zerdeçallı Patates Salatası Kaç Kaloridir?Zerdeçallı patates salatasının bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 70 kaloridir.
17.  Karbonhidrat değeri düşük olduğu için, bu tarifi diyet listelerinize ekleyebilirsiniz.
18.  Dilerseniz, klasik patates salatası tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.
19. Öğle ve akşam öğünlerinde tüketebileceğiniz hafif diyet yemekleri mi arıyorsunuz? Vitamin bakımından zengin olan nefis hardal soslu ton balığı salatası tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

turmeric-rice-pilaf-recipe-lezzet.name: Turmeric Rice Pilaf Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı pirinç (tercihen baldo veya osmancık)
2 su bardağı sıcak su veya tavuk/et suyu
1 yemek kaşığı dolmalık fıstık veya kuş üzümü (isteğe bağlı, süsleme için)
Jasmine, basmati veya esmer pirinç kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha besleyici bir seçenek için kinoa veya karabuğday gibi tahıllar ekleyebilirsiniz.
Pirinç yerine bulgur kullanmak isterseniz, ince bulgur ile zerdeçallı bulgur pilavı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir pilav için su ve az miktarda sıvı yağla da pişirebilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine zeytinyağı, avokado yağı veya hindistancevizi yağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Tereyağı ve zeytinyağı karışımı ile daha zengin aromalı bir pilav elde edebilirsiniz.
Saf zerdeçal tozu, safran veya hafif tarçın ekleyerek farklı aromalar yaratabilirsiniz.
Beyaz biber veya az miktarda kırmızı biber ile pilava hafif bir ısı ve aroma katabilirsiniz.
İsteğe bağlı olarak bir tutam kimyon veya yenibahar ekleyerek pilavın lezzetini zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Kavrulmuş dolmalık fıstık, kuş üzümü veya badem ile pilavınızı hem görsel hem de lezzet açısından zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Taze otlar (maydanoz, dereotu, taze kekik) ile pilavın aromasını artırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Pirinçleri birkaç kez soğuk suyla yıkayıp nişastasını arındırın.
2.  Ardından süzün ve 15–20 dakika kadar ılık suda bekletin.
3. Tereyağı veya zeytinyağını tencereye alın.
4.  (İsterseniz küçük doğranmış soğan ekleyip şeffaflaşana kadar kavurabilirsiniz.
5. ) Zerdeçalı ekleyip 30 saniye kadar kavurun, böylece yağla bütünleşir ve aroması açığa çıkar.
6. Süzülmüş pirinci tencereye ilave edin ve 2–3 dakika boyunca kavurun.
7.  Pirinçler zerdeçal ve yağla iyice karışmalı, hafif saydamlaşmalıdır.
8. Sıcak su veya tavuk/et suyunu ekleyin.
9.  Tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip bir kez karıştırın.
10. Tencerenin kapağını kapatın ve kısık ateşte yaklaşık 15 dakika pişirin.
11.  Pilav suyunu tamamen çekene kadar kapağı açmayın.
12. Ocağı kapattıktan sonra pilavı 5–10 dakika demlenmeye bırakın.
13.  Ardından çatalla hafifçe karıştırarak servis edin.
14. Üzerine kavrulmuş dolmalık fıstık veya kuş üzümü serperek görselliği artırabilirsiniz.

turmeric-rice-pongal.name: Turmeric Rice Pongal

ingredients.prep: candy or golden would all work well), peeled and finely sliced

instructions: To make the pickle, pour the vinegar into a small saucepan set over a high heat. Add the mustard seeds, sugar, salt, cinnamon and cloves and bring to a gentle boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for 3–5 minutes. Remove from the heat and leave to cool completely. When cool, pour over the beets, green chiles, and onion in a bowl (don’t use a metal one because it can react with the vinegar). Transfer to a clean airtight jar and let it pickle for about 30 minutes before using. It will keep for up to a week in the fridge.

To make the pongal, pour the dal into a saucepan and rinse loosely under the tap, then drain well. Add the butter and cook over a low-medium heat for 5–7 minutes, stirring often, until it begins to smell toasted and aromatic, but hasn’t yet gone brown. Add the rice, salt and water, and turn up the heat to bring to a boil, then lower the heat to a simmer. Cover with a lid and forget about it for 15 minutes.

Take off the lid, add the coconut milk, asafoetida, ginger and turmeric, and keep stirring as it cooks on the same heat for a few minutes until it achieves a creamy rice pudding consistency. If you find it a bit too thick, add a tablespoon or two of water, and stir for a couple of minutes to loosen it up, until you get the consistency you like. When the rice is cooked, remove from the heat and cover to keep warm.

To cook the eggs, fill a medium-sized saucepan with water, and place over medium-high heat until it gets to a gentle rolling boil. Set a timer for 6½ minutes, then gently lower the eggs into the water using a slotted spoon. Get a medium-sized bowl ready, filled about one-third full of cold water and 6 or 7 ice cubes.
